question: How does the breadth look like?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_window_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date AS window_end_date_52w,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date_52w
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
)
SELECT
  w.window_start_date_52w AS window_start_date_52w,
  w.window_end_date_52w AS window_end_date_52w,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_campus_accounts_52w,
  SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_mg_52w
FROM data_867 d
CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_window_bounds w
WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date_52w
  AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date_52w
  AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
GROUP BY
  w.window_start_date_52w,
  w.window_end_date_52w;

question: Are we too dependent on certain regions for revenue?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867 d
),
time_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date AS window_end_date,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
region_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS region_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= tw.window_start_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= tw.window_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
nation_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS nation_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= tw.window_start_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= tw.window_end_date
),
contribution_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    r.region_sales_52w,
    n.nation_sales_52w,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY r.region_sales_52w DESC, r.campus_region ASC) AS region_rank,
    CAST(
      ROUND((r.region_sales_52w / NULLIF(n.nation_sales_52w, 0)) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER
    ) AS region_contribution_52w_pct_int
  FROM region_agg_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_agg_cte n
),
concentration_summary_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank = 1 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_1_region_contribution_52w_pct_int,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank <= 2 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_2_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.region_rank <= 3 THEN c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS top_3_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int
  FROM contribution_cte c
)
SELECT
  tw.window_start_date AS window_start_date,
  tw.window_end_date AS window_end_date,
  c.campus_region,
  c.region_sales_52w,
  c.nation_sales_52w,
  CONCAT(c.region_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "region_contribution_52w%",
  c.region_rank,
  CONCAT(cs.top_1_region_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_1_region_contribution_52w%",
  CONCAT(cs.top_2_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_2_regions_contribution_52w%",
  CONCAT(cs.top_3_regions_contribution_52w_pct_int, '%') AS "top_3_regions_contribution_52w%"
FROM contribution_cte c
CROSS JOIN time_window_cte tw
CROSS JOIN concentration_summary_cte cs
ORDER BY c.region_sales_52w DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: Provide weekly sales trend by area and nation

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
base_last52w AS (
  SELECT
    s.week_end_date,
    s.relmora_total_mg,
    s.campus_region
  FROM data_867 s
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND s.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
),
weekly_pivot_sales AS (
  SELECT
    b.week_end_date,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'Central' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_central,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'Great Lakes' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_great_lakes,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'North East' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_north_east,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'Mid Atlantic' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_mid_atlantic,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.campus_region = 'South East' THEN b.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_south_east,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(b.relmora_total_mg), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_nation
  FROM base_last52w b
  GROUP BY
    b.week_end_date
)
SELECT
  w.week_end_date,
  w.sales_central,
  w.sales_great_lakes,
  w.sales_north_east,
  w.sales_mid_atlantic,
  w.sales_south_east,
  w.sales_nation
FROM weekly_pivot_sales w
ORDER BY
  w.week_end_date ASC;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts by BC potential segment

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_start_cte AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS start_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
windowed_base_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_start_cte s
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN s.start_week_end_date AND m.max_week_end_date
),
parent_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS parent_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
  GROUP BY parent_id, parent_account_name
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ps.parent_id,
    ps.parent_account_name,
    ps.parent_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(100 * ps.parent_sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0),
        '%'
      )
    END AS parent_contribution_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(100 * ps.parent_sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS parent_contribution_52w_value
  FROM parent_sales_cte ps
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  parent_sales_52w,
  parent_contribution_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY parent_contribution_52w_value DESC, parent_sales_52w DESC, parent_account_name ASC;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts by BC potential segment

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_start_cte AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS start_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
windowed_base_cte AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM data_867 b
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_start_cte s
  WHERE b.week_end_date BETWEEN s.start_week_end_date AND m.max_week_end_date
),
segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS segment_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
  GROUP BY
    parent_id,
    parent_account_name,
    campus_tier
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM windowed_base_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ss.parent_id,
    ss.parent_account_name,
    ss.campus_tier,
    CAST(ROUND(ss.segment_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS segment_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nt.national_total_sales_52w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (100 * ss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0)
          END,
          0
        ),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(
        ROUND((100 * ss.segment_sales_52w) / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER
      )
    END AS contribution_52w_value
  FROM segment_sales_cte ss
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  campus_tier,
  segment_sales_52w,
  contribution_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY
  contribution_52w_value DESC,
  segment_sales_52w DESC;

import pandas as pd import plotly.express as px df_plot = df.copy() df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_PCT"] = ( df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_52W"].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False).replace("", "0") ) df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_PCT"] = pd.to_numeric(df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_PCT"], errors="coerce").fillna(0) df_plot["SEGMENT_SALES_52W"] = pd.to_numeric(df_plot["SEGMENT_SALES_52W"], errors="coerce").fillna(0) df_plot = df_plot[df_plot["SEGMENT_SALES_52W"] > 0].copy() tier_order = ["Tier 1", "Tier 2", "Tier 3", "No Tier"] df_plot["CAMPUS_TIER"] = pd.Categorical(df_plot["CAMPUS_TIER"], categories=tier_order, ordered=True) tier_summary = ( df_plot.groupby("CAMPUS_TIER", dropna=False, observed=False) .agg( segment_sales_52w=("SEGMENT_SALES_52W", "sum"), parent_count=("PARENT_ID", "nunique"), ) .reset_index() ) tier_summary = tier_summary.sort_values("segment_sales_52w", ascending=False) total_sales = tier_summary["segment_sales_52w"].sum() tier_summary["sales_share_pct"] = (tier_summary["segment_sales_52w"] / total_sales * 100).where(total_sales != 0, 0) fig = px.bar( tier_summary, x="CAMPUS_TIER", y="segment_sales_52w", text=tier_summary["sales_share_pct"].map(lambda v: f"{v:.1f}%"), custom_data=["sales_share_pct", "parent_count"], title="Relmora Sales (Rolling 52 Weeks) by Campus Tier", labels={ "CAMPUS_TIER": "Campus Tier", "segment_sales_52w": "Relmora Sales (mg, 52w)", }, ) fig.update_traces( hovertemplate=( "Campus Tier=%{x}" "
Relmora Sales (52w)=%{y:,}" "
Share of total=%{customdata[0]:.2f}%" "
# Parents=%{customdata[1]:,}" "" ) ) fig.update_layout( xaxis={"categoryorder": "array", "categoryarray": tier_order}, yaxis_tickformat=",", uniformtext_minsize=10, uniformtext_mode="hide", bargap=0.25, )

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m ON 1 = 1
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND t.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
  ) x
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(week_end_date) AS min_r4w_week
      FROM r4w_weeks_cte
    ) b
      ON d.week_end_date < b.min_r4w_week
  ) y
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
weeks_count_cte AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r4w_weeks_cte) AS r4w_week_cnt,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p4w_weeks_cte) AS p4w_week_cnt
),
r4w_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS r4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY t.campus_account_type
),
p4w_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_p4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY t.campus_account_type
),
child_type_combined_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(r.campus_account_type, p.campus_account_type) AS campus_account_type,
    COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) AS sales_4w,
    COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS sales_p4w,
    r.r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    p.p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM r4w_by_child_type_cte r
  FULL OUTER JOIN p4w_by_child_type_cte p
    ON r.campus_account_type = p.campus_account_type
),
national_r4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS national_r4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
national_p4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_p4w,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS national_p4w_included_week_end_dates
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
national_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.national_sales_4w,
    p.national_sales_p4w,
    r.national_r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    p.national_p4w_included_week_end_dates,
    wc.r4w_week_cnt,
    wc.p4w_week_cnt,
    CASE
      WHEN (wc.r4w_week_cnt <> 4 OR wc.p4w_week_cnt <> 4) THEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) > 0
                THEN 100
              WHEN (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                THEN 0
              ELSE (
                (
                  (COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) -
                  (COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0))
                ) * 100.0
                / NULLIF((COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(wc.p4w_week_cnt, 0)), 0)
              )
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0)
                   / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0), 0)
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
    END AS national_growth_int,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.national_sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.national_sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_abs_change_4w
  FROM national_r4w_cte r
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_cte p
  CROSS JOIN weeks_count_cte wc
),
final_result_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    c.r4w_included_week_end_dates,
    c.p4w_included_week_end_dates,
    n.national_sales_4w,
    n.national_sales_p4w,
    n.national_growth_int,
    n.national_abs_change_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN (n.r4w_week_cnt <> 4 OR n.p4w_week_cnt <> 4) THEN
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) > 0
                THEN 100
              WHEN (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                   AND (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) = 0
                THEN 0
              ELSE (
                (
                  (COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.r4w_week_cnt, 0)) -
                  (COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0))
                ) * 100.0
                / NULLIF((COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) / NULLIF(n.p4w_week_cnt, 0)), 0)
              )
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
      ELSE
        CAST(
          ROUND(
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              WHEN COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE ((COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0)
                   / NULLIF(COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0), 0)
            END
          , 0) AS INTEGER
        )
    END AS child_growth_int,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(c.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(c.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w
  FROM child_type_combined_cte c
  CROSS JOIN national_growth_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  sales_4w,
  sales_p4w,
  CONCAT(child_growth_int, '%') AS growth_4w_pct,
  abs_change_4w,
  r4w_included_week_end_dates,
  p4w_included_week_end_dates,
  CAST(ROUND(national_sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_4w,
  CAST(ROUND(national_sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_p4w,
  CONCAT(national_growth_int, '%') AS national_growth_4w_pct,
  national_abs_change_4w AS national_abs_change_4w,
  CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(child_growth_int - national_growth_int, 0) AS INTEGER), '%') AS growth_gap_vs_nation_4w_pp,
  CASE
    WHEN child_growth_int > national_growth_int THEN 'Higher'
    WHEN child_growth_int < national_growth_int THEN 'Lower'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS performance_vs_nation
FROM final_result_cte
ORDER BY campus_account_type ASC;

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date

),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (

),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date

      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d

),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
    WHERE d.week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
  ) y
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(t.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_r4w,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte w) AS r4w_weeks_included
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    t.campus_account_type
),
p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,

  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    t.campus_account_type
),
child_type_combined_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(r.campus_account_type, p.campus_account_type) AS campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_r4w,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(((COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0), 0)
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS growth_4w_pct_value,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_4w_pct,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_r4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w,
    COALESCE(r.r4w_weeks_included, (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte w)) AS r4w_weeks_included,
    COALESCE(p.p4w_weeks_included, (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM p4w_weeks_cte w)) AS p4w_weeks_included
  FROM r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte r
  FULL OUTER JOIN p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte p
    ON r.campus_account_type = p.campus_account_type
),
nation_r4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(t.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_r4w_nation,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte w) AS r4w_weeks_included
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
nation_p4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(t.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w_nation,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) FROM p4w_weeks_cte w) AS p4w_weeks_included
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
nation_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    n4.sales_r4w_nation,
    n13.sales_p4w_nation,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(((n4.sales_r4w_nation - n13.sales_p4w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(n13.sales_p4w_nation, 0), 0)
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS growth_4w_nation_pct_value,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN n13.sales_p4w_nation = 0 AND n4.sales_r4w_nation = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((n4.sales_r4w_nation - n13.sales_p4w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(n13.sales_p4w_nation, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_4w_nation_pct,
    n4.r4w_weeks_included,
    n13.p4w_weeks_included
  FROM nation_r4w_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN nation_p4w_cte n13
),
final_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_account_type,
    c.sales_r4w,
    c.sales_p4w,
    c.growth_4w_pct,
    c.abs_change_4w,
    n.sales_r4w_nation,
    n.sales_p4w_nation,
    n.growth_4w_nation_pct,
    CONCAT(CAST((c.growth_4w_pct_value - n.growth_4w_nation_pct_value) AS INTEGER), '%') AS growth_gap_vs_nation_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN c.growth_4w_pct_value > n.growth_4w_nation_pct_value THEN 'Higher'
      WHEN c.growth_4w_pct_value < n.growth_4w_nation_pct_value THEN 'Lower'
      ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS vs_nation_flag,
    c.r4w_weeks_included,
    c.p4w_weeks_included
  FROM child_type_combined_cte c
  CROSS JOIN nation_growth_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  sales_r4w,
  sales_p4w,
  growth_4w_pct,
  abs_change_4w,
  sales_r4w_nation,
  sales_p4w_nation,
  growth_4w_nation_pct,
  growth_gap_vs_nation_pct,
  vs_nation_flag,
  r4w_weeks_included,
  p4w_weeks_included
FROM final_cte
ORDER BY campus_account_type ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
base_last52w AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    d.campus_region,
    d.relmora_total_mg
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date)
    AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
weekly_area_sales AS (
  SELECT
    b.week_end_date,
    b.campus_region,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(b.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_sales
  FROM base_last52w b
  GROUP BY
    b.week_end_date,
    b.campus_region
),
weekly_national_sales AS (
  SELECT
    b.week_end_date,
    'Nation' AS campus_region,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(b.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_sales
  FROM base_last52w b
  GROUP BY
    b.week_end_date
),
union_area_and_nation AS (
  SELECT week_end_date, campus_region, weekly_sales
  FROM weekly_area_sales
  UNION ALL
  SELECT week_end_date, campus_region, weekly_sales
  FROM weekly_national_sales
)
SELECT

  u.campus_region,
  u.weekly_sales
FROM union_area_and_nation u
ORDER BY

  u.campus_region ASC;

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 4 weeks compared to previous 4 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
weeks_ranked_cte AS (
  SELECT
    week_end_date,
    week_rank,
    CASE
      WHEN week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'R4W'
      WHEN week_rank BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 'P4W'
      WHEN week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 52 THEN 'R52W'
    END AS period_flag
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank
    FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
      FROM data_867
      WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) d
  )
  WHERE week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 52
),
period_week_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN period_flag = 'R4W' THEN weeks_count END), 0) AS r4w_week_count,
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN period_flag = 'P4W' THEN weeks_count END), 0) AS p4w_week_count
  FROM (
    SELECT
      period_flag,
      COUNT(DISTINCT week_end_date) AS weeks_count
    FROM weeks_ranked_cte
    WHERE period_flag IN ('R4W', 'P4W')
    GROUP BY period_flag
  ) c
),
area_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_prev_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R52W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_sales_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_sales_prev_4w,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R52W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
final_area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region AS "campus_region (Area)",
    CAST(ROUND(a.sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(ROUND(a.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(a.sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_sales_52w > 0
              THEN (a.sales_52w * 1.0 / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0)) * 100
            ELSE 0
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN a.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND a.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN a.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND a.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        THEN 'Higher'
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN a.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND a.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (a.sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((a.sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        <
        (
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN
              COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
              THEN 0
            ELSE
              ROUND(
                (
                  (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                  (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
                )
                / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
                0
              )
          END
        )
        THEN 'Lower'
      ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_r4w",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_p4w",
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN n.national_sales_52w > 0
          THEN (a.sales_52w * 1.0 / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0)) * 100
        ELSE 0
      END,
      0
    ) AS contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM area_period_sales_cte a
  CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte n
  CROSS JOIN period_week_counts_cte c
  LEFT JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON w.period_flag IN ('R4W', 'P4W')
  GROUP BY
    a.campus_region,
    a.sales_52w,
    a.sales_4w,
    a.sales_prev_4w,
    n.national_sales_52w,
    n.national_sales_4w,
    n.national_sales_prev_4w,
    c.r4w_week_count,
    c.p4w_week_count
),
nation_row_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'Nation' AS "campus_region (Area)",
    CAST(ROUND(n.national_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(ROUND(n.national_sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(n.national_sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    '100%' AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN
            COALESCE(n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            AND COALESCE(n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0), 0) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (n.national_sales_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.r4w_week_count, 0)) -
                (n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0))
              )
              / NULLIF((n.national_sales_prev_4w * 1.0 / NULLIF(c.p4w_week_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    'Equal' AS "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'R4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_r4w",
    CASE
      WHEN c.r4w_week_count = 4 AND c.p4w_week_count = 4 THEN NULL
      ELSE LISTAGG(CASE WHEN w.period_flag = 'P4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date) END, ', ')
           WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date)
    END AS "weeks_included_p4w",
    100 AS contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM national_period_sales_cte n
  CROSS JOIN period_week_counts_cte c
  LEFT JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON w.period_flag IN ('R4W', 'P4W')
  GROUP BY
    n.national_sales_52w,
    n.national_sales_4w,
    n.national_sales_prev_4w,
    c.r4w_week_count,
    c.p4w_week_count
),
final_union_cte AS (
  SELECT
    "campus_region (Area)",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    "weeks_included_r4w",
    "weeks_included_p4w",
    contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM final_area_metrics_cte

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    "campus_region (Area)",
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
    "weeks_included_r4w",
    "weeks_included_p4w",
    contribution_pct_value_sort
  FROM nation_row_cte
)
SELECT
  "campus_region (Area)",
  sales_52w,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
  "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
  "nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
  "vs_nation (Higher/Lower/Equal)",
  "weeks_included_r4w",
  "weeks_included_p4w"
FROM final_union_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_value_sort DESC;

question: Provide weekly sales trend by area and nation

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
base_last52w AS (
  SELECT
    s.week_end_date,
    s.campus_region,
    s.relmora_total_mg
  FROM data_867 s
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE s.week_end_date >= DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date)
    AND s.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
weekly_area_sales AS (
  SELECT
    b.week_end_date,
    b.campus_region,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(b.relmora_total_mg), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_sales
  FROM base_last52w b
  GROUP BY
    b.week_end_date,
    b.campus_region
),
weekly_national_sales AS (
  SELECT
    b.week_end_date,
    'Nation' AS campus_region,
    CAST(COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(b.relmora_total_mg), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_sales
  FROM base_last52w b
  GROUP BY
    b.week_end_date
),
union_area_and_nation AS (
  SELECT week_end_date, campus_region, weekly_sales
  FROM weekly_area_sales
  UNION ALL
  SELECT week_end_date, campus_region, weekly_sales
  FROM weekly_national_sales
)
SELECT
  u.week_end_date,
  u.campus_region,
  u.weekly_sales
FROM union_area_and_nation u
ORDER BY
  u.week_end_date ASC,
  u.campus_region ASC;

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 4 weeks compared to previous 4 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
weeks_ranked_cte AS (
  SELECT
    week_end_date,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank_desc,
    CASE
      WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'R4W'
      WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 'P4W'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS period_flag
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.week_end_date
    FROM data_867 t
    WHERE t.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  ) d
  QUALIFY week_rank_desc BETWEEN 1 AND 52
),
r52w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_region,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.week_rank_desc BETWEEN 1 AND 52
  GROUP BY t.campus_region
),
national_r52w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.week_rank_desc BETWEEN 1 AND 52
),
r4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_region,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'R4W'
  GROUP BY t.campus_region
),
p4w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_region,
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'P4W'
  GROUP BY t.campus_region
),
national_r4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'R4W'
),
national_p4w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(t.relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN weeks_ranked_cte w
    ON t.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE t.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND w.period_flag = 'P4W'
),
areas_cte AS (
  SELECT campus_region FROM r52w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM r4w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM p4w_area_sales_cte
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region,
    CAST(COALESCE(r52.sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(COALESCE(r4.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(COALESCE(p4.sales_prev_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    n52.national_sales_52w,
    n4.national_sales_4w,
    np4.national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM areas_cte a
  LEFT JOIN r52w_area_sales_cte r52
    ON r52.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN r4w_area_sales_cte r4
    ON r4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN p4w_area_sales_cte p4
    ON p4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte np4
),
area_metrics_formatted_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_52w > 0
            THEN ROUND((sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0), 0)
          ELSE 0
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((sales_4w - sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((national_sales_4w - national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN
        CASE
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN sales_prev_4w = 0 AND sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(ROUND(((sales_4w - sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_prev_4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END
        >=
        CASE
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(ROUND(((national_sales_4w - national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END
        THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS vs_nation,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN national_sales_52w > 0
          THEN ROUND((sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(national_sales_52w, 0), 0)
        ELSE 0
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM area_metrics_cte
),
national_row_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'Nation' AS campus_region,
    CAST(n52.national_sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(n4.national_sales_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(np4.national_sales_prev_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(CAST(CASE WHEN n52.national_sales_52w > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS INTEGER), '%') AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((n4.national_sales_4w - np4.national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(np4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN np4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((n4.national_sales_4w - np4.national_sales_prev_4w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(np4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0), 0)
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    'Equal' AS vs_nation,
    CASE WHEN n52.national_sales_52w > 0 THEN 100 ELSE 0 END AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r4w_total_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_p4w_total_cte np4
),
final_union_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_52w,
    growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM area_metrics_formatted_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_52w,
    growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
    vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM national_row_cte
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  sales_52w,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  contribution_pct_52w,
  growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
  nation_growth_pct_4w_vs_prev_4w,
  vs_nation
FROM final_union_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_52w_value DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_window_start_cte AS (
  SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
)
SELECT
  s.week_end_date,
  SUM(s.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales
FROM data_867 s
CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
CROSS JOIN rolling_window_start_cte r
WHERE s.week_end_date >= r.window_start_week_end_date
  AND s.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
GROUP BY
  s.week_end_date
ORDER BY
  s.week_end_date ASC;

question: What were the sales in the recent quarter?

trace.text:
WITH max_wed AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_qtr_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date
  FROM max_wed
),
prior_qtr_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    recent_quarter_start_date,
    recent_quarter_end_date,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date
  FROM recent_qtr_bounds
),
quarter_flags AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    recent_quarter_start_date,
    recent_quarter_end_date,
    prior_quarter_start_date,
    prior_quarter_end_date,
    IFF(max_week_end_date >= recent_quarter_end_date, 1, 0) AS recent_quarter_complete,
    IFF(max_week_end_date >= prior_quarter_end_date, 1, 0) AS prior_quarter_complete
  FROM prior_qtr_bounds
),
recent_quarter_label AS (
  SELECT MIN(d.quarter_year) AS quarter_year_recent
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN max_wed m
    ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
),
recent_total AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS recent_quarter_total_sales
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN quarter_flags q
    ON d.date >= q.recent_quarter_start_date
   AND d.date <= q.recent_quarter_end_date
),
prior_total AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS prior_quarter_total_sales
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN quarter_flags q
    ON d.date >= q.prior_quarter_start_date
   AND d.date <= q.prior_quarter_end_date
),
recent_weeks_included AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
  ) w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_flags q
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.recent_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.recent_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 >= 3
),
prior_weeks_included AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
  ) w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_flags q
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.prior_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 >= 3
),
recent_weekly AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS recent_quarter_weekly_total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_weeks_count,
    CAST(
      SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date), 0)
      AS INTEGER
    ) AS recent_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS weeks_included_recent_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN recent_weeks_included w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
prior_weekly AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS prior_quarter_weekly_total_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS prior_quarter_weeks_count,
    CAST(
      SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date), 0)
      AS INTEGER
    ) AS prior_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS weeks_included_prior_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN prior_weeks_included w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
)
SELECT
  rql.quarter_year_recent AS quarter_year_recent,
  CASE
    WHEN qf.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND qf.prior_quarter_complete = 1
      THEN CAST(rt.recent_quarter_total_sales AS INTEGER)
    ELSE rw.recent_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int
  END AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN qf.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND qf.prior_quarter_complete = 1
      THEN CAST(pt.prior_quarter_total_sales AS INTEGER)
    ELSE pw.prior_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int
  END AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN qf.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND qf.prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(pt.prior_quarter_total_sales, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(rt.recent_quarter_total_sales, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              ELSE ((COALESCE(rt.recent_quarter_total_sales, 0) - COALESCE(pt.prior_quarter_total_sales, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(pt.prior_quarter_total_sales, 0), 0)) * 100
            END
          ELSE
            CASE
              WHEN COALESCE(pw.prior_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(rw.recent_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int, 0) > 0 THEN 100
              ELSE ((COALESCE(rw.recent_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int, 0) - COALESCE(pw.prior_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(pw.prior_quarter_weekly_avg_sales_int, 0), 0)) * 100
            END
        END
      ) AS INTEGER
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS growth_qoq_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN qf.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND qf.prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN 'TOTAL'
    ELSE 'WEEKLY_AVERAGE'
  END AS comparison_basis,
  CASE
    WHEN qf.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND qf.prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN NULL
    ELSE rw.weeks_included_recent_quarter
  END AS weeks_included_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN qf.recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND qf.prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN NULL
    ELSE pw.weeks_included_prior_quarter
  END AS weeks_included_prior_quarter
FROM quarter_flags qf
CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_label rql
CROSS JOIN recent_total rt
CROSS JOIN prior_total pt
CROSS JOIN recent_weekly rw
CROSS JOIN prior_weekly pw;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts by BC potential segment

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
r52w_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date AS window_end,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
base_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.window_start AND w.window_end
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_total_sales_52w
  FROM base_52w_cte
),
segment_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_tier,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS segment_sales_52w
  FROM base_52w_cte
  GROUP BY campus_tier
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.campus_tier,
    CAST(ROUND(s.segment_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS segment_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(t.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(100 * s.segment_sales_52w / NULLIF(t.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0), '%')
    END AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(t.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND(100 * s.segment_sales_52w / NULLIF(t.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0)
    END AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM segment_sales_cte s
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte t
)
SELECT
  campus_tier,
  segment_sales_52w,
  contribution_pct_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_52w_value DESC, campus_tier ASC;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts which are academic, IDNs and Community

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
r52w_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_week_end_date,
    max_week_end_date AS window_end_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
base_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_week_end_date
    AND d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_week_end_date
),
mapped_bucket_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN campus_account_type = 'ACADEMIC' THEN 'Academic'
      WHEN campus_account_type = 'COMMUNITY' THEN 'Community'
      ELSE 'Community'
    END AS mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    relmora_total_mg
  FROM base_52w_cte
),
bucket_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM mapped_bucket_cte
  GROUP BY mapped_parent_account_bucket
),
national_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM mapped_bucket_cte
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    b.mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    CAST(ROUND(b.sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN n.national_sales_52w = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        CAST(
          ROUND((b.sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER
        ),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_52w,
    CAST(
      ROUND((b.sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_52w_value
  FROM bucket_sales_cte b
  CROSS JOIN national_sales_cte n
),
ensure_three_buckets_cte AS (
  SELECT column1 AS mapped_parent_account_bucket
  FROM VALUES ('Academic'), ('IDN'), ('Community')
),
final_cte AS (
  SELECT
    e.mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    COALESCE(c.sales_52w, 0) AS sales_52w,
    COALESCE(c.contribution_52w, '0%') AS contribution_52w,
    COALESCE(c.contribution_52w_value, 0) AS contribution_52w_value
  FROM ensure_three_buckets_cte e
  LEFT JOIN contribution_calc_cte c
    ON e.mapped_parent_account_bucket = c.mapped_parent_account_bucket
)
SELECT
  mapped_parent_account_bucket,
  sales_52w,
  contribution_52w
FROM final_cte
ORDER BY contribution_52w_value DESC, mapped_parent_account_bucket ASC;

question: What were the sales in the recent quarter?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_calendar_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS quarter_end_date,
    m.max_week_end_date AS max_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
recent_quarter_completeness AS (
  SELECT
    b.quarter_start_date,
    b.quarter_end_date,
    b.max_week_end_date,
    CASE WHEN b.max_week_end_date >= b.quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_complete_quarter
  FROM recent_quarter_calendar_bounds b
),
quarter_year_for_recent_quarter AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT d.quarter_year
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
)
SELECT
  SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS sales_recent_quarter
FROM data_867 d
CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_completeness c
CROSS JOIN quarter_year_for_recent_quarter q
WHERE
  (
    c.is_complete_quarter = 1
    AND d.quarter_year = q.quarter_year
  )
  OR
  (
    c.is_complete_quarter = 0
    AND d.date >= c.quarter_start_date
    AND d.date <= c.quarter_end_date
  );

      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND(100 * ss.segment_sales_52w / NULLIF(nt.national_total_sales_52w, 0), 0)
    END AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM segment_sales_cte ss
  CROSS JOIN national_total_sales_cte nt
)
SELECT
  parent_id,
  parent_account_name,
  segment_sales_52w,
  contribution_pct_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY
  contribution_pct_52w_value DESC,
  segment_sales_52w DESC,
  parent_account_name ASC;

mapped_parent_type_cte AS (

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 4 weeks compared to previous 4 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
week_ranks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) d
  WHERE d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
window_classification_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_region,
    t.relmora_total_mg,
    t.week_end_date,
    CASE
      WHEN wr.week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'recent_4w'
      WHEN wr.week_rank BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 'previous_4w'
    END AS window_flag
  FROM data_867 t
  JOIN week_ranks_cte wr
    ON t.week_end_date = wr.week_end_date
  WHERE wr.week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 8
),
area_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.campus_region,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN w.window_flag = 'recent_4w' THEN w.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN w.window_flag = 'previous_4w' THEN w.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w
  FROM window_classification_cte w
  GROUP BY w.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN w.window_flag = 'recent_4w' THEN w.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN w.window_flag = 'previous_4w' THEN w.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM window_classification_cte w
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    aps.campus_region,
    aps.sales_4w,
    aps.sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nps.national_sales_4w > 0
              THEN (aps.sales_4w / NULLIF(nps.national_sales_4w, 0)) * 100
            ELSE 0
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_pct_recent_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN aps.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND aps.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN aps.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND aps.sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((aps.sales_4w - aps.sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(aps.sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((nps.national_sales_4w - nps.national_sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(nps.national_sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN aps.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND aps.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN aps.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND aps.sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(((aps.sales_4w - aps.sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(aps.sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100, 0)
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(((nps.national_sales_4w - nps.national_sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(nps.national_sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100, 0)
          END
        )
        THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS performance_vs_nation
  FROM area_period_sales_cte aps
  CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
),
nation_row_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'Nation' AS campus_region,
    nps.national_sales_4w AS sales_4w,
    nps.national_sales_prev_4w AS sales_prev_4w,
    '100%' AS contribution_pct_recent_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((nps.national_sales_4w - nps.national_sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(nps.national_sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nps.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND nps.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((nps.national_sales_4w - nps.national_sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(nps.national_sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    'Higher' AS performance_vs_nation
  FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
),
final_union_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_recent_4w,
    growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    performance_vs_nation
  FROM area_metrics_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    contribution_pct_recent_4w,
    growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
    performance_vs_nation
  FROM nation_row_cte
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  sales_4w,
  sales_prev_4w,
  contribution_pct_recent_4w,
  growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
  nation_growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w,
  performance_vs_nation
FROM final_union_cte
ORDER BY sales_4w DESC;

import pandas as pd import plotly.graph_objects as go from plotly.subplots import make_subplots df_plot = df.copy() # Clean/convert percent fields for c in [ "CONTRIBUTION_PCT_RECENT_4W", "GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_4W_VS_PREVIOUS_4W", "NATION_GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_4W_VS_PREVIOUS_4W", ]: df_plot[c + "_NUM"] = ( df_plot[c].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False).str.strip().replace("", "0") ) df_plot[c + "_NUM"] = pd.to_numeric(df_plot[c + "_NUM"], errors="coerce").fillna(0) # Separate Nation to keep regions readable, but still provide it as reference line nation = df_plot[df_plot["CAMPUS_REGION"].astype(str).str.upper() == "NATION"].copy() regions = df_plot[df_plot["CAMPUS_REGION"].astype(str).str.upper() != "NATION"].copy() regions = regions.sort_values("SALES_4W", ascending=False) nation_growth = float(nation["GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_4W_VS_PREVIOUS_4W_NUM"].iloc[0]) if len(nation) else None x = regions["CAMPUS_REGION"].astype(str).tolist() fig = make_subplots(specs=[[{"secondary_y": True}]]) # Base metric: Sales (two periods) on primary axis fig.add_trace( go.Bar( name="Sales (Recent 4W)", x=x, y=regions["SALES_4W"], marker_color="#1f77b4", hovertemplate="Region=%{x}
Sales (Recent 4W)=%{y:,}", ), secondary_y=False, ) fig.add_trace( go.Bar( name="Sales (Previous 4W)", x=x, y=regions["SALES_PREV_4W"], marker_color="#aec7e8", hovertemplate="Region=%{x}
Sales (Previous 4W)=%{y:,}", ), secondary_y=False, ) # Growth metric on secondary axis fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( name="Growth % (Recent vs Previous 4W)", x=x, y=regions["GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_4W_VS_PREVIOUS_4W_NUM"], mode="lines+markers", line=dict(color="#d62728", width=2), marker=dict(size=8), hovertemplate="Region=%{x}
Growth=%{y:.0f}%", ), secondary_y=True, ) # Nation growth reference line on secondary axis if nation_growth is not None: fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( name=f"Nation Growth ({nation_growth:.0f}%)", x=x, y=[nation_growth] * len(x), mode="lines", line=dict(color="#d62728", width=2, dash="dash"), hovertemplate=f"Nation Growth={nation_growth:.0f}%", ), secondary_y=True, ) fig.update_layout( barmode="group", title="Sales (Recent 4W vs Previous 4W) and Growth % by Campus Region", legend_title_text="Metrics", xaxis_title="Campus Region", yaxis_title="Sales (relmora_total_mg)", yaxis2_title="Growth (%)", template="plotly_white", hovermode="x unified", ) fig.update_yaxes(tickformat=",.0f", secondary_y=False) fig.update_yaxes(ticksuffix="%", tickformat=",.0f", secondary_y=True) fig.update_xaxes(categoryorder="array", categoryarray=x)

  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
base_filtered_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*

parent_sales_cte AS (

          0
        ),
        '%'
      )

    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(nt.national_sales_52w, 0) = 0 THEN 0

max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
window_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_week_end_date,
    max_week_end_date AS window_end_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte

  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN window_bounds_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.window_start_week_end_date AND w.window_end_week_end_date
),
national_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_total_sales_mg_52w
  FROM filtered_52w_cte
),
type_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_account_type,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS group_sales_mg_52w
  FROM filtered_52w_cte
  GROUP BY campus_account_type
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    t.campus_account_type,
    t.group_sales_mg_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN n.national_total_sales_mg_52w = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        CAST(ROUND(100.0 * t.group_sales_mg_52w / NULLIF(n.national_total_sales_mg_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_pct_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN n.national_total_sales_mg_52w = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(100.0 * t.group_sales_mg_52w / NULLIF(n.national_total_sales_mg_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS contribution_pct_52w_value
  FROM type_sales_cte t
  CROSS JOIN national_total_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  group_sales_mg_52w,
  contribution_pct_52w AS contribution_pct_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY contribution_pct_52w_value DESC, campus_account_type ASC;

base_filtered_cte AS (

WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
r52w_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date AS window_end,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AS window_start
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
base_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN r52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.window_start
    AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end
),
mapped_parent_bucket_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN b.campus_account_type = 'ACADEMIC' THEN 'Academic'
      WHEN b.campus_account_type = 'COMMUNITY' THEN 'Community'
      ELSE 'IDN'
    END AS mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    b.relmora_total_mg
  FROM base_52w_cte b
),
national_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM mapped_parent_bucket_cte
),
bucket_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM mapped_parent_bucket_cte
  GROUP BY mapped_parent_account_bucket
),
contribution_cte AS (
  SELECT
    bs.mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    bs.sales_52w,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN ns.national_sales_52w = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(100 * bs.sales_52w / NULLIF(ns.national_sales_52w, 0), 0)
      END
      AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w_value,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CAST(
          CASE
            WHEN ns.national_sales_52w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(100 * bs.sales_52w / NULLIF(ns.national_sales_52w, 0), 0)
          END AS INTEGER
        ) AS VARCHAR
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_pct_52w
  FROM bucket_sales_cte bs
  CROSS JOIN national_sales_cte ns
)
SELECT
  mapped_parent_account_bucket,
  sales_52w,
  contribution_pct_52w
FROM contribution_cte
ORDER BY
  contribution_pct_52w_value DESC,
  sales_52w DESC;

question: How does account adoption look like across regions?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(DAY, 1, DATEADD(WEEK, -52, m.max_week_end_date)) AS window_start_week_end_date,
    m.max_week_end_date AS window_end_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
base_52w AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN rolling_52w_window_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_week_end_date
    AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_week_end_date
    AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
region_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS active_accounts_52w,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_52w
  FROM base_52w
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
nation_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS nation_active_accounts_52w,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS nation_relmora_total_mg_52w
  FROM base_52w
)
SELECT
  r.campus_region,
  r.active_accounts_52w,
  r.relmora_total_mg_52w,
  CONCAT(ROUND((r.active_accounts_52w / NULLIF(n.nation_active_accounts_52w, 0)) * 100, 2), '%') AS active_accounts_contribution_52w,
  CONCAT(ROUND((r.relmora_total_mg_52w / NULLIF(n.nation_relmora_total_mg_52w, 0)) * 100, 2), '%') AS relmora_total_mg_contribution_52w,
  n.nation_active_accounts_52w,
  n.nation_relmora_total_mg_52w
FROM region_agg_cte r
CROSS JOIN nation_agg_cte n
ORDER BY r.active_accounts_52w DESC;

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT d.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m ON 1 = 1
  WHERE d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte
  ) x
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(week_end_date) AS boundary_week
      FROM r4w_weeks_cte
    ) b ON d.week_end_date < b.boundary_week
  ) y
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_account_type,
    ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_r4w_mg,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS r4w_week_count,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS weeks_included_r4w
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_account_type
),
p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_account_type,
    ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_p4w_mg,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS p4w_week_count,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS weeks_included_p4w
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_account_type
),
child_type_combined_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(r.campus_account_type, p.campus_account_type) AS campus_account_type,
    COALESCE(r.sales_r4w_mg, 0) AS sales_4w_mg,
    COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_mg, 0) AS sales_p4w_mg,
    COALESCE(r.r4w_week_count, 0) AS r4w_week_count,
    COALESCE(p.p4w_week_count, 0) AS p4w_week_count,
    r.weeks_included_r4w,
    p.weeks_included_p4w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(r.r4w_week_count, 0) != COALESCE(p.p4w_week_count, 0)
           AND COALESCE(r.r4w_week_count, 0) > 0
           AND COALESCE(p.p4w_week_count, 0) > 0
        THEN ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_r4w_mg, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(r.r4w_week_count, 0), 0), 0)
      ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_r4w_mg, 0), 0)
    END AS weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(r.r4w_week_count, 0) != COALESCE(p.p4w_week_count, 0)
           AND COALESCE(r.r4w_week_count, 0) > 0
           AND COALESCE(p.p4w_week_count, 0) > 0
        THEN ROUND(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_mg, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.p4w_week_count, 0), 0), 0)
      ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_mg, 0), 0)
    END AS weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg
  FROM r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte r
  FULL OUTER JOIN p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte p
    ON r.campus_account_type = p.campus_account_type
),
r4w_national_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_4w_mg_nation,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS r4w_week_count_nation,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS weeks_included_r4w_nation
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN r4w_weeks_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
p4w_national_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_p4w_mg_nation,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS p4w_week_count_nation,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date) AS weeks_included_p4w_nation
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN p4w_weeks_cte w
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
),
national_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.sales_4w_mg_nation,
    p.sales_p4w_mg_nation,
    r.r4w_week_count_nation,
    p.p4w_week_count_nation,
    r.weeks_included_r4w_nation,
    p.weeks_included_p4w_nation,
    CASE
      WHEN r.r4w_week_count_nation != p.p4w_week_count_nation
           AND r.r4w_week_count_nation > 0
           AND p.p4w_week_count_nation > 0
        THEN ROUND(r.sales_4w_mg_nation / NULLIF(r.r4w_week_count_nation, 0), 0)
      ELSE ROUND(r.sales_4w_mg_nation, 0)
    END AS weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg_nation,
    CASE
      WHEN r.r4w_week_count_nation != p.p4w_week_count_nation
           AND r.r4w_week_count_nation > 0
           AND p.p4w_week_count_nation > 0
        THEN ROUND(p.sales_p4w_mg_nation / NULLIF(p.p4w_week_count_nation, 0), 0)
      ELSE ROUND(p.sales_p4w_mg_nation, 0)
    END AS weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation
  FROM r4w_national_sales_cte r
  CROSS JOIN p4w_national_sales_cte p
),
final_result_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_account_type,
    ROUND(c.sales_4w_mg, 0) AS sales_4w_mg,
    ROUND(c.sales_p4w_mg, 0) AS sales_p4w_mg,
    ROUND(c.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg, 0) AS weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg,
    ROUND(c.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg, 0) AS weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN c.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND c.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN c.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND c.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND(((c.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg - c.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg) / NULLIF(c.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg, 0)) * 100, 0)
    END AS growth_4w_pct_child_value,
    ROUND(c.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg - c.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg, 0) AS abs_change_4w_mg,
    ROUND(n.sales_4w_mg_nation, 0) AS sales_4w_mg_nation,
    ROUND(n.sales_p4w_mg_nation, 0) AS sales_p4w_mg_nation,
    ROUND(n.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg_nation, 0) AS weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg_nation,
    ROUND(n.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation, 0) AS weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation,
    CASE
      WHEN n.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation = 0 AND n.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg_nation > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN n.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation = 0 AND n.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg_nation = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE ROUND(((n.weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg_nation - n.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation) / NULLIF(n.weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation, 0)) * 100, 0)
    END AS growth_4w_pct_nation_value,
    c.weeks_included_r4w,
    c.weeks_included_p4w
  FROM child_type_combined_cte c
  CROSS JOIN national_growth_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  sales_4w_mg,
  sales_p4w_mg,
  weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg,
  weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg,
  CONCAT(growth_4w_pct_child_value, '%') AS growth_4w_pct_child,
  abs_change_4w_mg,
  sales_4w_mg_nation,
  sales_p4w_mg_nation,
  weekly_avg_sales_4w_mg_nation,
  weekly_avg_sales_p4w_mg_nation,
  CONCAT(growth_4w_pct_nation_value, '%') AS growth_4w_pct_nation,
  CASE
    WHEN growth_4w_pct_child_value > growth_4w_pct_nation_value THEN 'Higher'
    WHEN growth_4w_pct_child_value < growth_4w_pct_nation_value THEN 'Lower'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS vs_nation_flag,
  weeks_included_r4w,
  weeks_included_p4w
FROM final_result_cte
ORDER BY campus_account_type ASC;
