question: How does account adoption look like across regions?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
base_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_id,
    d.campus_region,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS campus_relmora_total_mg_52w,
    CASE WHEN SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS adopted_flag,
    1 AS total_flag
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date)
    AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    d.campus_id,
    d.campus_region
),
region_rollup_cte AS (
  SELECT
    b.campus_region,
    CAST(SUM(b.adopted_flag) AS INTEGER) AS adopted_accounts_52w,
    CAST(SUM(b.total_flag) AS INTEGER) AS total_accounts_52w,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        (SUM(b.adopted_flag) / NULLIF(SUM(b.total_flag), 0)) * 100
      , 0)
    , '%') AS adoption_rate_52w,
    CAST(SUM(b.campus_relmora_total_mg_52w) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_mg_52w
  FROM base_52w_cte b
  GROUP BY
    b.campus_region
),
national_rollup_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(b.adopted_flag) AS INTEGER) AS national_adopted_accounts_52w,
    CAST(SUM(b.total_flag) AS INTEGER) AS national_total_accounts_52w,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        (SUM(b.adopted_flag) / NULLIF(SUM(b.total_flag), 0)) * 100
      , 0)
    , '%') AS national_adoption_rate_52w,
    CAST(SUM(b.campus_relmora_total_mg_52w) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_mg_52w
  FROM base_52w_cte b
)
SELECT
  r.campus_region,
  r.adopted_accounts_52w,
  r.total_accounts_52w,
  r.adoption_rate_52w,
  r.relmora_mg_52w,
  n.national_adopted_accounts_52w,
  n.national_total_accounts_52w,
  n.national_adoption_rate_52w,
  n.national_relmora_mg_52w
FROM region_rollup_cte r
CROSS JOIN national_rollup_cte n
ORDER BY
  r.adopted_accounts_52w DESC;

question: How does new account addition look like by tier type?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
base_valid_shipments AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
first_week_by_campus AS (
  SELECT
    campus_id,
    MIN(week_end_date) AS first_week_end_date
  FROM base_valid_shipments
  GROUP BY campus_id
),
first_tier_by_campus AS (
  SELECT
    b.campus_id,
    f.first_week_end_date,
    MAX(b.campus_tier) AS campus_tier
  FROM base_valid_shipments b
  INNER JOIN first_week_by_campus f
    ON b.campus_id = f.campus_id
   AND b.week_end_date = f.first_week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    b.campus_id,
    f.first_week_end_date
),
new_campuses_in_52w AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    ft.campus_id,
    ft.campus_tier
  FROM first_tier_by_campus ft
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date m
  WHERE ft.first_week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
),
counts_by_tier AS (
  SELECT
    campus_tier,
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_52w
  FROM new_campuses_in_52w
  GROUP BY campus_tier
),
total_new AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS total_new_accounts_52w
  FROM new_campuses_in_52w
)
SELECT
  c.campus_tier,
  c.new_accounts_52w,
  CONCAT(
    COALESCE(
      ROUND(100.0 * c.new_accounts_52w / NULLIF(t.total_new_accounts_52w, 0), 0),
      0
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS contribution_to_total
FROM counts_by_tier c
CROSS JOIN total_new t
ORDER BY c.new_accounts_52w DESC;

question: Which regions are driving quarterly performance?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_rows_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
),
current_quarter_id_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT r.quarter_year AS current_quarter_year
  FROM rolling_52w_rows_cte r
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE r.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.current_quarter_year,
    m.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS current_quarter_end_date,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS prev_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS prev_quarter_end_date,
    IFF(
      m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))),
      TRUE,
      FALSE
    ) AS current_quarter_complete,
    IFF(
      m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)),
      TRUE,
      FALSE
    ) AS prev_quarter_complete
  FROM current_quarter_id_cte c
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
normalization_decision_cte AS (
  SELECT
    qb.*,
    NOT (qb.current_quarter_complete AND qb.prev_quarter_complete) AS normalization_required
  FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
),
quarter_labels_cte AS (
  SELECT
    nd.*,
    (
      SELECT r2.quarter_year
      FROM rolling_52w_rows_cte r2
      WHERE r2.week_end_date BETWEEN nd.prev_quarter_start_date AND nd.prev_quarter_end_date
      QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r2.week_end_date DESC) = 1
    ) AS prev_quarter_year
  FROM normalization_decision_cte nd
),
weeks_in_scope_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    r.week_end_date
  FROM rolling_52w_rows_cte r
),
included_weeks_flags_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    q.current_quarter_year,
    q.prev_quarter_year,
    q.normalization_required,
    IFF(
      q.normalization_required
      AND GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.current_quarter_start_date)
          <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end_date)
      AND DATEDIFF(
            DAY,
            GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.current_quarter_start_date),
            LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end_date)
          ) + 1 >= 3,
      1,
      0
    ) AS include_week_current_qtr,
    IFF(
      q.normalization_required
      AND GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.prev_quarter_start_date)
          <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prev_quarter_end_date)
      AND DATEDIFF(
            DAY,
            GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.prev_quarter_start_date),
            LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prev_quarter_end_date)
          ) + 1 >= 3,
      1,
      0
    ) AS include_week_prev_qtr
  FROM weeks_in_scope_cte w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_labels_cte q
),
weekly_average_weeks_list_cte AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(current_quarter_year) AS quarter_year,
    LISTAGG(
      IFF(include_week_current_qtr = 1, TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), NULL),
      ', '
    ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS included_weeks_current_quarter,
    LISTAGG(
      IFF(include_week_prev_qtr = 1, TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), NULL),
      ', '
    ) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS included_weeks_prev_quarter
  FROM included_weeks_flags_cte
),
region_quarter_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    q.current_quarter_year AS quarter_year,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        IFF(
          q.normalization_required,
          SUM(IFF(f.include_week_current_qtr = 1, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
          / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IFF(f.include_week_current_qtr = 1, r.week_end_date, NULL)), 0),
          SUM(IFF(r.quarter_year = q.current_quarter_year, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
        ),
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        IFF(
          q.normalization_required,
          SUM(IFF(f.include_week_prev_qtr = 1, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
          / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IFF(f.include_week_prev_qtr = 1, r.week_end_date, NULL)), 0),
          SUM(IFF(r.quarter_year = q.prev_quarter_year, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
        ),
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales_prev
  FROM rolling_52w_rows_cte r
  CROSS JOIN quarter_labels_cte q
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_flags_cte f
    ON f.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    r.campus_region,
    q.current_quarter_year,
    q.normalization_required,
    q.prev_quarter_year
),
national_quarter_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.current_quarter_year AS quarter_year,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        IFF(
          q.normalization_required,
          SUM(IFF(f.include_week_current_qtr = 1, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
          / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IFF(f.include_week_current_qtr = 1, r.week_end_date, NULL)), 0),
          SUM(IFF(r.quarter_year = q.current_quarter_year, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
        ),
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS national_quarterly_sales,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        IFF(
          q.normalization_required,
          SUM(IFF(f.include_week_prev_qtr = 1, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
          / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT IFF(f.include_week_prev_qtr = 1, r.week_end_date, NULL)), 0),
          SUM(IFF(r.quarter_year = q.prev_quarter_year, r.relmora_total_mg, 0))
        ),
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS national_quarterly_sales_prev
  FROM rolling_52w_rows_cte r
  CROSS JOIN quarter_labels_cte q
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_flags_cte f
    ON f.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
  GROUP BY
    q.current_quarter_year,
    q.normalization_required,
    q.prev_quarter_year
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    rqs.quarter_year,
    rqs.campus_region,
    rqs.quarterly_sales,
    rqs.quarterly_sales_prev,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN rqs.quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND rqs.quarterly_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN rqs.quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND rqs.quarterly_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((rqs.quarterly_sales - rqs.quarterly_sales_prev) / NULLIF(rqs.quarterly_sales_prev, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_qoq%",
    nqs.national_quarterly_sales,
    nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND nqs.national_quarterly_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND nqs.national_quarterly_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((nqs.national_quarterly_sales - nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev) / NULLIF(nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "national_growth_qoq%",
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN rqs.quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND rqs.quarterly_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN rqs.quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND rqs.quarterly_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((rqs.quarterly_sales - rqs.quarterly_sales_prev) / NULLIF(rqs.quarterly_sales_prev, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND nqs.national_quarterly_sales > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev = 0 AND nqs.national_quarterly_sales = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((nqs.national_quarterly_sales - nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev) / NULLIF(nqs.national_quarterly_sales_prev, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
        THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS performance_vs_nation,
    IFF(q.normalization_required, w.included_weeks_current_quarter, NULL) AS included_weeks_current_quarter,
    IFF(q.normalization_required, w.included_weeks_prev_quarter, NULL) AS included_weeks_prev_quarter
  FROM region_quarter_sales_cte rqs
  CROSS JOIN national_quarter_sales_cte nqs
  CROSS JOIN quarter_labels_cte q
  CROSS JOIN weekly_average_weeks_list_cte w
)
SELECT
  quarter_year,
  campus_region,
  quarterly_sales,
  quarterly_sales_prev,
  "growth_qoq%",
  national_quarterly_sales,
  national_quarterly_sales_prev,
  "national_growth_qoq%",
  performance_vs_nation,
  included_weeks_current_quarter,
  included_weeks_prev_quarter
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY
  TRY_TO_NUMBER(REPLACE("growth_qoq%", '%', '')) DESC,
  quarterly_sales DESC;

question: Which regions are driving quarterly performance?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_window_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AS rolling_start_week_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
current_period_quarter_label_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    d.quarter_year AS current_quarter_year
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
),
quarter_boundaries_and_prev_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,

    c.current_quarter_year,

    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS current_quarter_end_date,

    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_end_date,

    CASE
      WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS current_qtr_complete,
    CASE
      WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS prev_qtr_complete,
    CASE
      WHEN
        m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)))
        AND m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))
      THEN 0
      ELSE 1
    END AS normalization_required
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
  CROSS JOIN current_period_quarter_label_cte c
),
windowed_rows_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN rolling_window_cte rw
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN rw.rolling_start_week_end_date AND rw.max_week_end_date
),
quarter_rows_cte AS (
  SELECT
    wr.campus_region,
    wr.week_end_date,
    wr.quarter_year,
    wr.relmora_total_mg,
    qb.current_quarter_year,
    CASE
      WHEN qb.normalization_required = 0 AND wr.quarter_year = qb.current_quarter_year THEN 1
      WHEN qb.normalization_required = 1
        AND (
          LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.current_quarter_end_date)
          >= GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.current_quarter_start_date)
        )
        AND DATEDIFF(
          DAY,
          GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.current_quarter_start_date),
          LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.current_quarter_end_date)
        ) + 1 >= 3
      THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_current_qtr,
    CASE
      WHEN qb.normalization_required = 0 AND wr.quarter_year <> qb.current_quarter_year THEN 1
      WHEN qb.normalization_required = 1
        AND (
          LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.previous_quarter_end_date)
          >= GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.previous_quarter_start_date)
        )
        AND DATEDIFF(
          DAY,
          GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.previous_quarter_start_date),
          LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.previous_quarter_end_date)
        ) + 1 >= 3
      THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_prev_qtr,
    qb.normalization_required
  FROM windowed_rows_cte wr
  CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_and_prev_quarter_cte qb
  WHERE
    (
      qb.normalization_required = 0
      AND wr.quarter_year IN (
        qb.current_quarter_year,
        TO_CHAR(qb.previous_quarter_start_date, '"Q"Q-YY')
      )
    )
    OR (
      qb.normalization_required = 1
      AND (
        (
          LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.current_quarter_end_date)
          >= GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.current_quarter_start_date)
          AND DATEDIFF(
            DAY,
            GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.current_quarter_start_date),
            LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.current_quarter_end_date)
          ) + 1 >= 3
        )
        OR
        (
          LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.previous_quarter_end_date)
          >= GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.previous_quarter_start_date)
          AND DATEDIFF(
            DAY,
            GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, wr.week_end_date), qb.previous_quarter_start_date),
            LEAST(wr.week_end_date, qb.previous_quarter_end_date)
          ) + 1 >= 3
        )
      )
    )
),
coverage_validation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    qb.current_quarter_start_date,
    qb.previous_quarter_end_date,
    rw.rolling_start_week_end_date,
    rw.max_week_end_date
  FROM quarter_boundaries_and_prev_quarter_cte qb
  CROSS JOIN rolling_window_cte rw
  WHERE qb.previous_quarter_end_date >= rw.rolling_start_week_end_date
),
region_quarter_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.campus_region,
    q.normalization_required,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q.is_current_qtr = 1 THEN q.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS total_sales_current_qtr,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q.is_prev_qtr = 1 THEN q.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS total_sales_prev_qtr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN q.is_current_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END) AS weeks_in_current_qtr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN q.is_prev_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END) AS weeks_in_prev_qtr,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT TO_VARCHAR(CASE WHEN q.is_current_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TO_VARCHAR(CASE WHEN q.is_current_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END)) AS included_weeks_current_qtr,
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT TO_VARCHAR(CASE WHEN q.is_prev_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY TO_VARCHAR(CASE WHEN q.is_prev_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END)) AS included_weeks_prev_qtr
  FROM quarter_rows_cte q
  GROUP BY
    q.campus_region,
    q.normalization_required
),
region_quarter_sales_basis_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    CASE
      WHEN r.normalization_required = 0 THEN CAST(ROUND(r.total_sales_current_qtr, 0) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(r.total_sales_current_qtr / NULLIF(r.weeks_in_current_qtr, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CASE
      WHEN r.normalization_required = 0 THEN CAST(ROUND(r.total_sales_prev_qtr, 0) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(r.total_sales_prev_qtr / NULLIF(r.weeks_in_prev_qtr, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS quarterly_sales_prev_qtr,
    CASE
      WHEN r.normalization_required = 1 THEN r.included_weeks_current_qtr
      ELSE NULL
    END AS included_weeks_current_qtr,
    CASE
      WHEN r.normalization_required = 1 THEN r.included_weeks_prev_qtr
      ELSE NULL
    END AS included_weeks_prev_qtr,
    r.normalization_required
  FROM region_quarter_sales_cte r
),
national_quarter_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.normalization_required,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q.is_current_qtr = 1 THEN q.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_total_sales_current_qtr,
    SUM(CASE WHEN q.is_prev_qtr = 1 THEN q.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_total_sales_prev_qtr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN q.is_current_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END) AS national_weeks_in_current_qtr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN q.is_prev_qtr = 1 THEN q.week_end_date ELSE NULL END) AS national_weeks_in_prev_qtr
  FROM quarter_rows_cte q
  GROUP BY q.normalization_required
),
national_quarter_sales_basis_cte AS (
  SELECT
    n.normalization_required,
    CASE
      WHEN n.normalization_required = 0 THEN CAST(ROUND(n.national_total_sales_current_qtr, 0) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(n.national_total_sales_current_qtr / NULLIF(n.national_weeks_in_current_qtr, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CASE
      WHEN n.normalization_required = 0 THEN CAST(ROUND(n.national_total_sales_prev_qtr, 0) AS INTEGER)
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(n.national_total_sales_prev_qtr / NULLIF(n.national_weeks_in_prev_qtr, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr
  FROM national_quarter_sales_cte n
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          (r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr / NULLIF(n.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr, 0)) * 100,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "contribution_quarterly%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr - r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_quarterly%",
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND n.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND n.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((n.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr - n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "nation_growth_quarterly%",
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr - r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(r.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND n.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND n.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((n.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr - n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(n.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
      THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS vs_nation,
    r.included_weeks_current_qtr,
    r.included_weeks_prev_qtr
  FROM region_quarter_sales_basis_cte r
  CROSS JOIN national_quarter_sales_basis_cte n
  INNER JOIN coverage_validation_cte v
    ON 1 = 1
  WHERE r.normalization_required = n.normalization_required
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
  quarterly_sales_prev_qtr,
  "contribution_quarterly%",
  "growth_quarterly%",
  "nation_growth_quarterly%",
  vs_nation,
  included_weeks_current_qtr,
  included_weeks_prev_qtr
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY quarterly_sales_current_qtr DESC;

question: What were the sales in the recent quarter?

trace.text:
WITH max_week AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_q AS (
  SELECT quarter_year AS recent_quarter_year
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date = (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week)
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY quarter_year) = 1
),
recent_parts AS (
  SELECT
    recent_quarter_year,
    CAST(SUBSTR(recent_quarter_year, 2, 1) AS INTEGER) AS recent_qtr_num,
    CAST(2000 + CAST(SUBSTR(recent_quarter_year, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) AS INTEGER) AS recent_year_num
  FROM recent_q
),
bounds AS (
  SELECT
    rp.recent_quarter_year,
    rp.recent_qtr_num,
    rp.recent_year_num,
    DATE_FROM_PARTS(
      rp.recent_year_num,
      CASE rp.recent_qtr_num WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 4 WHEN 3 THEN 7 WHEN 4 THEN 10 END,
      1
    ) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1,
      DATEADD(QUARTER, 1,
        DATE_FROM_PARTS(
          rp.recent_year_num,
          CASE rp.recent_qtr_num WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 4 WHEN 3 THEN 7 WHEN 4 THEN 10 END,
          1
        )
      )
    ) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    CASE
      WHEN rp.recent_qtr_num = 1 THEN 4
      ELSE rp.recent_qtr_num - 1
    END AS prior_qtr_num,
    CASE
      WHEN rp.recent_qtr_num = 1 THEN rp.recent_year_num - 1
      ELSE rp.recent_year_num
    END AS prior_year_num,
    DATE_FROM_PARTS(
      CASE WHEN rp.recent_qtr_num = 1 THEN rp.recent_year_num - 1 ELSE rp.recent_year_num END,
      CASE (CASE WHEN rp.recent_qtr_num = 1 THEN 4 ELSE rp.recent_qtr_num - 1 END)
        WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 4 WHEN 3 THEN 7 WHEN 4 THEN 10
      END,
      1
    ) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1,
      DATEADD(QUARTER, 1,
        DATE_FROM_PARTS(
          CASE WHEN rp.recent_qtr_num = 1 THEN rp.recent_year_num - 1 ELSE rp.recent_year_num END,
          CASE (CASE WHEN rp.recent_qtr_num = 1 THEN 4 ELSE rp.recent_qtr_num - 1 END)
            WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 4 WHEN 3 THEN 7 WHEN 4 THEN 10
          END,
          1
        )
      )
    ) AS prior_quarter_end_date
  FROM recent_parts rp
),
flags AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    mw.max_week_end_date,
    IFF(mw.max_week_end_date >= b.recent_quarter_end_date, TRUE, FALSE) AS recent_quarter_complete,
    IFF(mw.max_week_end_date >= b.prior_quarter_end_date, TRUE, FALSE) AS prior_quarter_complete
  FROM bounds b
  CROSS JOIN max_week mw
),
weeks_distinct AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
weeks_recent AS (
  SELECT
    wd.week_end_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -6, wd.week_end_date) AS week_start_date
  FROM weeks_distinct wd
),
included_recent AS (
  SELECT
    wr.week_end_date
  FROM weeks_recent wr
  CROSS JOIN flags f
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(wr.week_start_date, f.recent_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(wr.week_end_date, f.recent_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 >= 3
),
included_prior AS (
  SELECT
    wr.week_end_date
  FROM weeks_recent wr
  CROSS JOIN flags f
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(wr.week_start_date, f.prior_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(wr.week_end_date, f.prior_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 >= 3
),
weekly_recent AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_recent_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  INNER JOIN included_recent ir
    ON d.week_end_date = ir.week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weekly_prior AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_prior_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  INNER JOIN included_prior ip
    ON d.week_end_date = ip.week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
norm_recent AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(wr.weekly_sales_recent_quarter), 0) AS total_recent_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT wr.week_end_date) AS weeks_count_recent,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(wr.week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wr.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter
  FROM weekly_recent wr
),
norm_prior AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(wp.weekly_sales_prior_quarter), 0) AS total_prior_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT wp.week_end_date) AS weeks_count_prior,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(wp.week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wp.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter
  FROM weekly_prior wp
),
totals_complete AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = f.recent_quarter_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN f.prior_quarter_start_date AND f.prior_quarter_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN flags f
)
SELECT
  f.recent_quarter_year AS recent_quarter_year,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
        THEN tc.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter
      ELSE (nr.total_recent_included / NULLIF(nr.weeks_count_recent, 0))
    END
    AS INTEGER
  ) AS sales_recent_quarter,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
        THEN tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
      ELSE (np.total_prior_included / NULLIF(np.weeks_count_prior, 0))
    END
    AS INTEGER
  ) AS sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
                THEN tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
              ELSE (np.total_prior_included / NULLIF(np.weeks_count_prior, 0))
            END
            AS INTEGER
          ) = 0
          AND CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
                THEN tc.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter
              ELSE (nr.total_recent_included / NULLIF(nr.weeks_count_recent, 0))
            END
            AS INTEGER
          ) > 0
            THEN 100
          WHEN CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
                THEN tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
              ELSE (np.total_prior_included / NULLIF(np.weeks_count_prior, 0))
            END
            AS INTEGER
          ) = 0
          AND CAST(
            CASE
              WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
                THEN tc.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter
              ELSE (nr.total_recent_included / NULLIF(nr.weeks_count_recent, 0))
            END
            AS INTEGER
          ) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(
            (
              (
                CAST(
                  CASE
                    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
                      THEN tc.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter
                    ELSE (nr.total_recent_included / NULLIF(nr.weeks_count_recent, 0))
                  END
                  AS INTEGER
                )
                - CAST(
                  CASE
                    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
                      THEN tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
                    ELSE (np.total_prior_included / NULLIF(np.weeks_count_prior, 0))
                  END
                  AS INTEGER
                )
              ) * 100
            ) / NULLIF(
              CAST(
                CASE
                  WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete
                    THEN tc.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter
                  ELSE (np.total_prior_included / NULLIF(np.weeks_count_prior, 0))
                END
                AS INTEGER
              ),
              0
            )
            AS INTEGER
          )
        END AS INTEGER
      ),
      0
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS growth_qoq,
  CASE
    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete AND f.prior_quarter_complete THEN 'TOTAL'
    ELSE 'WEEKLY_AVERAGE'
  END AS normalization_basis,
  nr.included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter AS included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
  np.included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter AS included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter
FROM flags f
CROSS JOIN totals_complete tc
CROSS JOIN norm_recent nr
CROSS JOIN norm_prior np;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts which are academic, IDNs and Community

trace.text:
WITH
  max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
  ),
  rolling_52w_cte AS (
    SELECT d.*
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN max_date_cte m
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date)
      AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
  ),
  mapped_parent_bucket_cte AS (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN campus_account_type = 'ACADEMIC' THEN 'ACADEMIC'
        WHEN campus_account_type = 'COMMUNITY' THEN 'COMMUNITY'
        ELSE 'IDN'
      END AS mapped_parent_account_bucket,
      relmora_total_sls
    FROM rolling_52w_cte
  ),
  national_total_cte AS (
    SELECT SUM(relmora_total_sls) AS national_sales_52w
    FROM mapped_parent_bucket_cte
  ),
  bucket_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
      mapped_parent_account_bucket,
      SUM(relmora_total_sls) AS sales_52w
    FROM mapped_parent_bucket_cte
    GROUP BY mapped_parent_account_bucket
  ),
  contribution_cte AS (
    SELECT
      b.mapped_parent_account_bucket,
      CAST(b.sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
      CONCAT(
        CAST(
          ROUND((100.0 * b.sales_52w) / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER
        ),
        '%'
      ) AS contribution_52w
    FROM bucket_sales_cte b
    CROSS JOIN national_total_cte n
  )
SELECT
  mapped_parent_account_bucket,
  sales_52w,
  contribution_52w
FROM contribution_cte
ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(contribution_52w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC,
  mapped_parent_account_bucket ASC;

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child account type and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT s.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 s
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m ON 1 = 1
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND s.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
recent_4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte
  ) x
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
prior_4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte d
    JOIN (
      SELECT MIN(week_end_date) AS boundary_week
      FROM recent_4w_weeks_cte
    ) b
      ON d.week_end_date < b.boundary_week
  ) y
  WHERE rn <= 4
),
r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(s.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w
  FROM data_867 s
  JOIN recent_4w_weeks_cte w
    ON s.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY s.campus_account_type
),
p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(s.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w
  FROM data_867 s
  JOIN prior_4w_weeks_cte w
    ON s.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY s.campus_account_type
),
child_types_domain_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT s.campus_account_type
  FROM data_867 s
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
child_type_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_account_type,
    COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) AS sales_4w,
    COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS sales_p4w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0)) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS growth_4w_pct_value,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w
  FROM child_types_domain_cte d
  LEFT JOIN r4w_sales_by_child_type_cte r
    ON d.campus_account_type = r.campus_account_type
  LEFT JOIN p4w_sales_by_child_type_cte p
    ON d.campus_account_type = p.campus_account_type
),
nation_r4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(s.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_nation
  FROM data_867 s
  JOIN recent_4w_weeks_cte w
    ON s.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
nation_p4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(ROUND(SUM(s.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w_nation
  FROM data_867 s
  JOIN prior_4w_weeks_cte w
    ON s.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
  WHERE s.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
nation_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.sales_4w_nation,
    p.sales_p4w_nation,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_nation, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_4w_nation, 0) > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_nation, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_4w_nation, 0) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((COALESCE(r.sales_4w_nation, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_nation, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_nation, 0), 0)) * 100, 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS growth_4w_pct_value_nation,
    CAST(ROUND(COALESCE(r.sales_4w_nation, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w_nation
  FROM nation_r4w_sales_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_p4w_sales_cte p
),
weeks_included_cte AS (
  SELECT 'R4W' AS window_label, week_end_date
  FROM recent_4w_weeks_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'P4W' AS window_label, week_end_date
  FROM prior_4w_weeks_cte
),
weeks_pivot_cte AS (
  SELECT
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN window_label = 'R4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS r4w_week_end_dates_included,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN window_label = 'P4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS p4w_week_end_dates_included
  FROM weeks_included_cte
),
final_output_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_account_type,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(c.sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.growth_4w_pct_value, 0), '%') AS growth_4w_pct,
    CAST(ROUND(c.abs_change_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w,
    CAST(ROUND(n.sales_4w_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_nation,
    CAST(ROUND(n.sales_p4w_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(n.growth_4w_pct_value_nation, 0), '%') AS growth_4w_pct_nation,
    CAST(ROUND(n.abs_change_4w_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(c.growth_4w_pct_value - n.growth_4w_pct_value_nation, 0), '%') AS growth_gap_vs_nation_pp,
    CASE
      WHEN c.growth_4w_pct_value > n.growth_4w_pct_value_nation THEN 'Higher'
      WHEN c.growth_4w_pct_value < n.growth_4w_pct_value_nation THEN 'Lower'
      ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS vs_nation,
    w.r4w_week_end_dates_included,
    w.p4w_week_end_dates_included
  FROM child_type_growth_cte c
  CROSS JOIN nation_growth_cte n
  CROSS JOIN weeks_pivot_cte w
)
SELECT
  campus_account_type,
  sales_4w,
  sales_p4w,
  growth_4w_pct,
  abs_change_4w,
  sales_4w_nation,
  sales_p4w_nation,
  growth_4w_pct_nation,
  abs_change_4w_nation,
  growth_gap_vs_nation_pp,
  vs_nation,
  r4w_week_end_dates_included,
  p4w_week_end_dates_included
FROM final_output_cte
ORDER BY campus_account_type ASC;

question: What is the sales growth in recent 4 weeks by child BC potential segment and how does that compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks_ranked_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY w.week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
    WHERE d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  ) w
),
r4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM distinct_weeks_ranked_cte
  WHERE week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 4
),
p4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM distinct_weeks_ranked_cte
  WHERE week_rank BETWEEN 5 AND 8
),
week_sets_cte AS (
  SELECT 'R4W' AS window_label, week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'P4W' AS window_label, week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte
),
window_week_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ws.window_label,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ws.week_end_date) AS weeks_in_window
  FROM week_sets_cte ws
  GROUP BY ws.window_label
),
counts_pivot_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN window_label = 'R4W' THEN weeks_in_window ELSE 0 END) AS r4w_weeks_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN window_label = 'P4W' THEN weeks_in_window ELSE 0 END) AS p4w_weeks_count
  FROM window_week_counts_cte
),
weekly_flagged_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_tier AS child_bc_potential_segment,
    ws.window_label,
    d.week_end_date,
    d.relmora_total_mg
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN week_sets_cte ws
    ON d.week_end_date = ws.week_end_date
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= DATEADD(WEEK, -7, m.max_week_end_date)
),
segment_window_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    child_bc_potential_segment,
    window_label,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_mg
  FROM weekly_flagged_sales_cte
  GROUP BY child_bc_potential_segment, window_label
),
national_window_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    window_label,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS nation_sales_mg
  FROM weekly_flagged_sales_cte
  GROUP BY window_label
),
segment_pivot_cte AS (
  SELECT
    s.child_bc_potential_segment,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.window_label = 'R4W' THEN s.sales_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sales_r4w_mg,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.window_label = 'P4W' THEN s.sales_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS sales_p4w_mg
  FROM segment_window_sales_cte s
  GROUP BY s.child_bc_potential_segment
),
national_pivot_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN n.window_label = 'R4W' THEN n.nation_sales_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS nation_sales_r4w_mg,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN n.window_label = 'P4W' THEN n.nation_sales_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS nation_sales_p4w_mg
  FROM national_window_sales_cte n
),
included_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN window_label = 'R4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS r4w_week_end_dates_included,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN window_label = 'P4W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS p4w_week_end_dates_included
  FROM week_sets_cte
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    sp.child_bc_potential_segment,
    CAST(ROUND(sp.sales_r4w_mg, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_r4w_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(sp.sales_p4w_mg, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(np.nation_sales_r4w_mg, 0) AS INTEGER) AS nation_sales_r4w_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(np.nation_sales_p4w_mg, 0) AS INTEGER) AS nation_sales_p4w_mg,
    cp.r4w_weeks_count,
    cp.p4w_weeks_count,
    CASE
      WHEN cp.r4w_weeks_count = cp.p4w_weeks_count THEN
        CASE
          WHEN sp.sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND sp.sales_r4w_mg > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN sp.sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND sp.sales_r4w_mg = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(ROUND(((sp.sales_r4w_mg - sp.sales_p4w_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sp.sales_p4w_mg, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END
      ELSE
        CASE
          WHEN (sp.sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0)) = 0 AND (sp.sales_r4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.r4w_weeks_count, 0)) > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN (sp.sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0)) = 0 AND (sp.sales_r4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.r4w_weeks_count, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(
            ROUND(
              (
                (
                  (sp.sales_r4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.r4w_weeks_count, 0)) -
                  (sp.sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0))
                ) * 100.0
              ) / NULLIF((sp.sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0)), 0),
              0
            ) AS INTEGER
          )
        END
    END AS segment_growth_4w_pct_int,
    CASE
      WHEN cp.r4w_weeks_count = cp.p4w_weeks_count THEN
        CASE
          WHEN np.nation_sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND np.nation_sales_r4w_mg > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN np.nation_sales_p4w_mg = 0 AND np.nation_sales_r4w_mg = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(ROUND(((np.nation_sales_r4w_mg - np.nation_sales_p4w_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(np.nation_sales_p4w_mg, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END
      ELSE
        CASE
          WHEN (np.nation_sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0)) = 0 AND (np.nation_sales_r4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.r4w_weeks_count, 0)) > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN (np.nation_sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0)) = 0 AND (np.nation_sales_r4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.r4w_weeks_count, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(
            ROUND(
              (
                (
                  (np.nation_sales_r4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.r4w_weeks_count, 0)) -
                  (np.nation_sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0))
                ) * 100.0
              ) / NULLIF((np.nation_sales_p4w_mg / NULLIF(cp.p4w_weeks_count, 0)), 0),
              0
            ) AS INTEGER
          )
        END
    END AS nation_growth_4w_pct_int
  FROM segment_pivot_cte sp
  CROSS JOIN national_pivot_cte np
  CROSS JOIN counts_pivot_cte cp
)
SELECT
  f.child_bc_potential_segment,
  f.sales_r4w_mg,
  f.sales_p4w_mg,
  CONCAT(ROUND(f.segment_growth_4w_pct_int, 0), '%') AS growth_4w_pct,
  f.nation_sales_r4w_mg,
  f.nation_sales_p4w_mg,
  CONCAT(ROUND(f.nation_growth_4w_pct_int, 0), '%') AS nation_growth_4w_pct,
  CONCAT(ROUND((f.segment_growth_4w_pct_int - f.nation_growth_4w_pct_int), 0), '%') AS delta_vs_nation_growth_4w_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN f.segment_growth_4w_pct_int > f.nation_growth_4w_pct_int THEN 'Higher'
    ELSE 'Lower'
  END AS performance_vs_nation_flag,
  iw.r4w_week_end_dates_included,
  iw.p4w_week_end_dates_included
FROM final_metrics_cte f
CROSS JOIN included_weeks_cte iw
ORDER BY f.child_bc_potential_segment ASC;

question: What were the sales in the recent quarter?

trace.text:
WITH max_date AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_label AS (
  SELECT quarter_year AS quarter_year_recent
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date = (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_date)
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY quarter_year) = 1
),
recent_quarter_boundaries AS (
  SELECT
    md.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', md.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', md.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', md.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_start,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', md.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_end
  FROM max_date md
),
quarter_completeness_flags AS (
  SELECT
    rqb.max_week_end_date,
    rqb.recent_quarter_start,
    rqb.recent_quarter_end,
    rqb.prior_quarter_start,
    rqb.prior_quarter_end,
    CASE WHEN rqb.max_week_end_date >= rqb.recent_quarter_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_complete,
    CASE WHEN rqb.max_week_end_date >= rqb.prior_quarter_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_quarter_complete
  FROM recent_quarter_boundaries rqb
),
weeks_included_recent_quarter AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    (
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.recent_quarter_start),
        LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.recent_quarter_end)
      ) + 1
    ) AS overlap_days
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_flags q
  WHERE
    (
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.recent_quarter_start),
        LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.recent_quarter_end)
      ) + 1
    ) >= 3
),
weeks_included_prior_quarter AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    (
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.prior_quarter_start),
        LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end)
      ) + 1
    ) AS overlap_days
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_flags q
  WHERE
    (
      DATEDIFF(
        DAY,
        GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), q.prior_quarter_start),
        LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end)
      ) + 1
    ) >= 3
),
weeks_lists AS (
  SELECT
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(r.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(p.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p.week_end_date) FROM weeks_included_prior_quarter p) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.week_end_date) AS recent_weeks_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.week_end_date) FROM weeks_included_prior_quarter p) AS prior_weeks_count
  FROM weeks_included_recent_quarter r
),
totals_complete AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = rql.quarter_year_recent THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS recent_sales_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year <> rql.quarter_year_recent AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN q.prior_quarter_start AND q.prior_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS prior_sales_total
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_label rql
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_flags q
),
totals_included_weeks AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM weeks_included_recent_quarter) THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS recent_sales_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM weeks_included_prior_quarter) THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS prior_sales_total
  FROM data_867 d
),
final_calc AS (
  SELECT
    rql.quarter_year_recent,
    q.recent_quarter_complete,
    q.prior_quarter_complete,
    wl.included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
    wl.included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter,
    wl.recent_weeks_count,
    wl.prior_weeks_count,
    tc.recent_sales_total AS recent_sales_total_complete,
    tc.prior_sales_total AS prior_sales_total_complete,
    tw.recent_sales_total AS recent_sales_total_weeks,
    tw.prior_sales_total AS prior_sales_total_weeks
  FROM recent_quarter_label rql
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_flags q
  CROSS JOIN weeks_lists wl
  CROSS JOIN totals_complete tc
  CROSS JOIN totals_included_weeks tw
)
SELECT
  quarter_year_recent AS quarter_year_recent,
  CASE
    WHEN recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND prior_quarter_complete = 1
      THEN CAST(recent_sales_total_complete AS INTEGER)
    ELSE CAST((recent_sales_total_weeks / NULLIF(recent_weeks_count, 0)) AS INTEGER)
  END AS sales_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND prior_quarter_complete = 1
      THEN CAST(prior_sales_total_complete AS INTEGER)
    ELSE CAST((prior_sales_total_weeks / NULLIF(prior_weeks_count, 0)) AS INTEGER)
  END AS sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN
          CASE
            WHEN prior_sales_total_complete = 0 AND recent_sales_total_complete > 0 THEN 100
            ELSE CAST(((recent_sales_total_complete - prior_sales_total_complete) / NULLIF(prior_sales_total_complete, 0)) * 100 AS INTEGER)
          END
        ELSE
          CASE
            WHEN CAST((prior_sales_total_weeks / NULLIF(prior_weeks_count, 0)) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST((recent_sales_total_weeks / NULLIF(recent_weeks_count, 0)) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
            ELSE CAST((
              (
                CAST((recent_sales_total_weeks / NULLIF(recent_weeks_count, 0)) AS INTEGER)
                - CAST((prior_sales_total_weeks / NULLIF(prior_weeks_count, 0)) AS INTEGER)
              )
              / NULLIF(CAST((prior_sales_total_weeks / NULLIF(prior_weeks_count, 0)) AS INTEGER), 0)
            ) * 100 AS INTEGER)
          END
      END
    , 0)
  , '%') AS "growth_qoq%",
  CASE
    WHEN recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN 'TOTAL_SALES'
    ELSE 'WEEKLY_AVG_NORMALIZED'
  END AS basis_used,
  included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter AS included_week_end_dates_recent_quarter,
  included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter AS included_week_end_dates_prior_quarter
FROM final_calc;

WITH max_week_end_date AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_lookup AS (
  SELECT MIN(d.quarter_year) AS quarter_year_recent
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN max_week_end_date m
    ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
),
recent_quarter_calendar_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    r.quarter_year_recent,
    TO_DATE(CONCAT('20', SPLIT_PART(r.quarter_year_recent, '-', 2), '-01-01')) AS year_start_date,
    CAST(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(r.quarter_year_recent, '-', 1), 'Q', '') AS INTEGER) AS quarter_num
  FROM recent_quarter_lookup r
),
recent_quarter_calendar_dates AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year_recent,
    DATEADD(
      MONTH,
      (quarter_num - 1) * 3,
      year_start_date
    ) AS quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(
      DAY,
      -1,
      DATEADD(
        MONTH,
        quarter_num * 3,
        year_start_date
      )
    ) AS quarter_end_date
  FROM recent_quarter_calendar_bounds
),
recent_quarter_completeness AS (
  SELECT
    d.quarter_year_recent,
    d.quarter_start_date,
    d.quarter_end_date,
    m.max_week_end_date,
    (m.max_week_end_date >= d.quarter_end_date) AS recent_quarter_is_complete
  FROM recent_quarter_calendar_dates d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date m
),
recent_quarter_weeks_included AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 s
  CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_completeness c
  WHERE c.recent_quarter_is_complete = FALSE
    AND GREATEST(
          0,
          DATEDIFF(
            DAY,
            GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, s.week_end_date), c.quarter_start_date),
            LEAST(s.week_end_date, c.quarter_end_date)
          ) + 1
        ) >= 3
),
recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(s.relmora_total_mg) AS INTEGER) AS total_sales_in_incomplete_quarter,
    CAST(
      SUM(s.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT w.week_end_date), 0) AS INTEGER
    ) AS weekly_sales_recent_quarter,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(w.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY w.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_for_weekly_average
  FROM data_867 s
  JOIN recent_quarter_weeks_included w
    ON s.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
)
SELECT
  c.quarter_year_recent,
  c.recent_quarter_is_complete,
  CASE
    WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
      THEN CAST(SUM(s.relmora_total_mg) AS INTEGER)
    ELSE NULL
  END AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
      THEN NULL
    ELSE wa.weekly_sales_recent_quarter
  END AS weekly_sales_recent_quarter,
  CASE
    WHEN c.recent_quarter_is_complete = TRUE
      THEN NULL
    ELSE wa.included_week_end_dates_for_weekly_average
  END AS included_week_end_dates_for_weekly_average
FROM recent_quarter_completeness c
LEFT JOIN data_867 s
  ON s.quarter_year = c.quarter_year_recent
LEFT JOIN recent_quarter_weekly_average_sales wa
  ON c.recent_quarter_is_complete = FALSE
GROUP BY
  c.quarter_year_recent,
  c.recent_quarter_is_complete,
  wa.weekly_sales_recent_quarter,
  wa.included_week_end_dates_for_weekly_average;

WITH max_wed AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_q AS (
  SELECT
    d.quarter_year AS recent_quarter_year,
    CAST(SPLIT_PART(d.quarter_year, '-', 2) AS INTEGER) AS yy,
    CAST(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(d.quarter_year, '-', 1), 'Q', '') AS INTEGER) AS qn
  FROM data_867 d
  INNER JOIN max_wed m
    ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.quarter_year) = 1
),
recent_q_ctx AS (
  SELECT
    recent_quarter_year,
    DATE_FROM_PARTS(2000 + yy, (qn - 1) * 3 + 1, 1) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, 3, DATE_FROM_PARTS(2000 + yy, (qn - 1) * 3 + 1, 1))) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    qn,
    yy
  FROM recent_q
),
prior_q_ctx AS (
  SELECT
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date,
    CONCAT(
      'Q',
      CAST(DATE_PART(QUARTER, DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date)) AS VARCHAR),
      '-',
      LPAD(CAST(MOD(DATE_PART(YEAR, DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date)), 100) AS VARCHAR), 2, '0')
    ) AS prior_quarter_year
  FROM recent_q_ctx r
),
flags AS (
  SELECT
    r.recent_quarter_year,
    r.recent_quarter_start_date,
    r.recent_quarter_end_date,
    p.prior_quarter_year,
    p.prior_quarter_start_date,
    p.prior_quarter_end_date,
    m.max_week_end_date,
    CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_complete_flag,
    CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_quarter_complete_flag
  FROM recent_q_ctx r
  CROSS JOIN prior_q_ctx p
  CROSS JOIN max_wed m
),
totals AS (
  SELECT
    f.recent_quarter_year,
    f.prior_quarter_year,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = f.recent_quarter_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_total,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = f.prior_quarter_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_total
  FROM flags f
  CROSS JOIN data_867 d
  GROUP BY
    f.recent_quarter_year,
    f.prior_quarter_year
),
recent_weeks AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS week_sales
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN flags f
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), f.recent_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(d.week_end_date, f.recent_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 >= 3
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
prior_weeks AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS week_sales
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN flags f
  WHERE
    DATEDIFF(
      DAY,
      GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date), f.prior_quarter_start_date),
      LEAST(d.week_end_date, f.prior_quarter_end_date)
    ) + 1 >= 3
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weekly_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(rw.week_sales) AS INTEGER) AS recent_total_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT rw.week_end_date) AS recent_weeks_included,
    CAST(SUM(pw.week_sales) AS INTEGER) AS prior_total_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pw.week_end_date) AS prior_weeks_included,
    CAST(SUM(rw.week_sales) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT rw.week_end_date), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_weekly_avg,
    CAST(SUM(pw.week_sales) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pw.week_end_date), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_weekly_avg,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(rw.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rw.week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(pw.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY pw.week_end_date) AS prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
  FROM recent_weeks rw
  CROSS JOIN prior_weeks pw
)
SELECT
  f.recent_quarter_year,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
        THEN t.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_total
      ELSE w.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_weekly_avg
    END AS INTEGER
  ) AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
  f.prior_quarter_year,
  CAST(
    CASE
      WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
        THEN t.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_total
      ELSE w.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_weekly_avg
    END AS INTEGER
  ) AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN (
          CASE
            WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
              THEN t.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_total
            ELSE w.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_weekly_avg
          END
        ) = 0
        AND (
          CASE
            WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
              THEN t.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_total
            ELSE w.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_weekly_avg
          END
        ) > 0
          THEN 100
        ELSE CAST(
          ROUND(
            (
              (
                CASE
                  WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
                    THEN t.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_total
                  ELSE w.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_weekly_avg
                END
              ) - (
                CASE
                  WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
                    THEN t.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_total
                  ELSE w.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_weekly_avg
                END
              )
            ) * 100.0
            / NULLIF(
              (
                CASE
                  WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
                    THEN t.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_total
                  ELSE w.quarterly_sales_prior_quarter_weekly_avg
                END
              ),
              0
            ),
            0
          ) AS INTEGER
        )
      END AS INTEGER
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS "growth_qoq_%",
  CASE
    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
      THEN 'TOTAL'
    ELSE 'WEEKLY_AVG'
  END AS comparison_basis,
  f.recent_quarter_complete_flag,
  f.prior_quarter_complete_flag,
  CASE
    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
      THEN NULL
    ELSE w.recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates
  END AS recent_quarter_included_week_end_dates,
  CASE
    WHEN f.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND f.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1
      THEN NULL
    ELSE w.prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
  END AS prior_quarter_included_week_end_dates
FROM flags f
CROSS JOIN totals t
CROSS JOIN weekly_avgs w;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_52w_region_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region AS campus_region,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.relmora_total_mg > 0 THEN d.campus_id END) AS active_accounts_52w,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
prior_52w_region_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region AS campus_region,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_p52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -103, m.max_week_end_date) AND DATEADD(WEEK, -52, m.max_week_end_date)
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
recent_52w_national_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.relmora_total_mg > 0 THEN d.campus_id END) AS national_active_accounts_52w,
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
),
prior_52w_national_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -103, m.max_week_end_date) AND DATEADD(WEEK, -52, m.max_week_end_date)
),
final_join_and_calcs_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region AS campus_region,
    r.active_accounts_52w AS active_accounts_52w,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        (r.active_accounts_52w / NULLIF(nr.national_active_accounts_52w, 0)) * 100
      , 0)::INTEGER,
      '%'
    ) AS active_account_contribution_52w_pct,
    r.relmora_total_mg_52w AS relmora_total_mg_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p.relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND r.relmora_total_mg_52w > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN COALESCE(p.relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND r.relmora_total_mg_52w = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(
          ((r.relmora_total_mg_52w - p.relmora_total_mg_p52w) / NULLIF(p.relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0)) * 100
        , 0)::INTEGER
      END,
      '%'
    ) AS growth_52w_pct,
    nr.national_relmora_total_mg_52w AS national_relmora_total_mg_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND nr.national_relmora_total_mg_52w > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN COALESCE(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND nr.national_relmora_total_mg_52w = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(
          ((nr.national_relmora_total_mg_52w - np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w) / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0)) * 100
        , 0)::INTEGER
      END,
      '%'
    ) AS national_growth_52w_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(p.relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND r.relmora_total_mg_52w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN COALESCE(p.relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND r.relmora_total_mg_52w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(
              ((r.relmora_total_mg_52w - p.relmora_total_mg_p52w) / NULLIF(p.relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0)) * 100
            , 0)::INTEGER
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND nr.national_relmora_total_mg_52w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN COALESCE(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0) = 0 AND nr.national_relmora_total_mg_52w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(
              ((nr.national_relmora_total_mg_52w - np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w) / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p52w, 0)) * 100
            , 0)::INTEGER
          END
        )
      THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS higher_lower_vs_nation
  FROM recent_52w_region_cte r
  LEFT JOIN prior_52w_region_cte p
    ON r.campus_region = p.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN recent_52w_national_cte nr
  CROSS JOIN prior_52w_national_cte np
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  active_accounts_52w,
  active_account_contribution_52w_pct,
  relmora_total_mg_52w,
  growth_52w_pct,
  national_relmora_total_mg_52w,
  national_growth_52w_pct,
  higher_lower_vs_nation
FROM final_join_and_calcs_cte
ORDER BY active_accounts_52w DESC;

question: Which regions are driving quarterly performance?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_label_cte AS (
  SELECT MIN(quarter_year) AS current_quarter_year
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.quarter_year
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    WHERE d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
  ) x
),
quarter_calendar_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS current_quarter_end_date,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS prior_quarter_end_date
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.max_week_end_date,
    q.current_quarter_start_date,
    q.current_quarter_end_date,
    q.prior_quarter_start_date,
    q.prior_quarter_end_date,
    IFF(q.max_week_end_date >= q.current_quarter_end_date, TRUE, FALSE) AS current_quarter_complete,
    IFF(q.max_week_end_date >= q.prior_quarter_end_date, TRUE, FALSE) AS prior_quarter_complete,
    IFF(
      (q.max_week_end_date >= q.current_quarter_end_date) AND (q.max_week_end_date >= q.prior_quarter_end_date),
      FALSE,
      TRUE
    ) AS normalization_required
  FROM quarter_calendar_bounds_cte q
),
windowed_rows_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    d.quarter_year,
    d.campus_region,
    d.relmora_total_mg
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
),
quarter_period_assignment_cte AS (
  SELECT
    wr.*,
    pc.normalization_required,
    cql.current_quarter_year,
    CASE
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = FALSE
        AND wr.quarter_year = cql.current_quarter_year
        THEN 'CURRENT'
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = FALSE
        AND wr.quarter_year <> cql.current_quarter_year
        THEN 'PRIOR'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS period_label_totals_only
  FROM windowed_rows_cte wr
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  CROSS JOIN current_quarter_label_cte cql
),
included_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    pc.normalization_required,
    pc.current_quarter_start_date,
    pc.current_quarter_end_date,
    pc.prior_quarter_start_date,
    pc.prior_quarter_end_date,
    CASE
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = TRUE
       AND (
         DATEDIFF(
           DAY,
           GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), pc.current_quarter_start_date),
           LEAST(w.week_end_date, pc.current_quarter_end_date)
         ) + 1
       ) >= 3
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS include_current_qtr,
    CASE
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = TRUE
       AND (
         DATEDIFF(
           DAY,
           GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), pc.prior_quarter_start_date),
           LEAST(w.week_end_date, pc.prior_quarter_end_date)
         ) + 1
       ) >= 3
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS include_prev_qtr
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM windowed_rows_cte) w
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
),
included_weeks_lists_cte AS (
  SELECT
    pc.normalization_required,
    LISTAGG(IFF(iw.include_current_qtr = 1, TO_VARCHAR(iw.week_end_date), NULL), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY iw.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    LISTAGG(IFF(iw.include_prev_qtr = 1, TO_VARCHAR(iw.week_end_date), NULL), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY iw.week_end_date) AS included_week_end_dates_prev_qtr
  FROM period_completeness_cte pc
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_cte iw
    ON iw.normalization_required = pc.normalization_required
  GROUP BY pc.normalization_required
),
included_week_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    pc.normalization_required,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN iw.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN iw.week_end_date END) AS included_weeks_current_qtr,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN iw.include_prev_qtr = 1 THEN iw.week_end_date END) AS included_weeks_prev_qtr
  FROM period_completeness_cte pc
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_cte iw
    ON iw.normalization_required = pc.normalization_required
  GROUP BY pc.normalization_required
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    qpa.campus_region,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN MAX(pc.normalization_required) = FALSE THEN
            SUM(CASE WHEN qpa.period_label_totals_only = 'CURRENT' THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
          ELSE
            SUM(CASE WHEN iw.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(MAX(iwc.included_weeks_current_qtr), 0)
        END,
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN MAX(pc.normalization_required) = FALSE THEN
            SUM(CASE WHEN qpa.period_label_totals_only = 'PRIOR' THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
          ELSE
            SUM(CASE WHEN iw.include_prev_qtr = 1 THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(MAX(iwc.included_weeks_prev_qtr), 0)
        END,
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales_prev_qtr
  FROM quarter_period_assignment_cte qpa
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_cte iw
    ON iw.week_end_date = qpa.week_end_date
   AND iw.normalization_required = pc.normalization_required
  LEFT JOIN included_week_counts_cte iwc
    ON iwc.normalization_required = pc.normalization_required
  GROUP BY qpa.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN MAX(pc.normalization_required) = FALSE THEN
            SUM(CASE WHEN qpa.period_label_totals_only = 'CURRENT' THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
          ELSE
            SUM(CASE WHEN iw.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(MAX(iwc.included_weeks_current_qtr), 0)
        END,
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN MAX(pc.normalization_required) = FALSE THEN
            SUM(CASE WHEN qpa.period_label_totals_only = 'PRIOR' THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
          ELSE
            SUM(CASE WHEN iw.include_prev_qtr = 1 THEN qpa.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(MAX(iwc.included_weeks_prev_qtr), 0)
        END,
        0
      ) AS INTEGER
    ) AS national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr
  FROM quarter_period_assignment_cte qpa
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_cte iw
    ON iw.week_end_date = qpa.week_end_date
   AND iw.normalization_required = pc.normalization_required
  LEFT JOIN included_week_counts_cte iwc
    ON iwc.normalization_required = pc.normalization_required
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    rps.campus_region,
    rps.quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND rps.quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND rps.quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((rps.quarterly_sales_current_qtr - rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "growth_quarterly%",
    nps.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND nps.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND nps.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((nps.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr - nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS "national_growth_quarterly%",
    CASE
      WHEN
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND rps.quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND rps.quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((rps.quarterly_sales_current_qtr - rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(rps.quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        )
        >
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND nps.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr = 0 AND nps.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((nps.national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr - nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr) / NULLIF(nps.national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        )
      THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS vs_nation,
    CASE WHEN iwlist.normalization_required = TRUE THEN iwlist.included_week_end_dates_current_qtr ELSE NULL END AS included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    CASE WHEN iwlist.normalization_required = TRUE THEN iwlist.included_week_end_dates_prev_qtr ELSE NULL END AS included_week_end_dates_prev_qtr
  FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
  CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
  CROSS JOIN included_weeks_lists_cte iwlist
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
  quarterly_sales_prev_qtr,
  "growth_quarterly%",
  national_quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
  national_quarterly_sales_prev_qtr,
  "national_growth_quarterly%",
  vs_nation,
  included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
  included_week_end_dates_prev_qtr
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY quarterly_sales_current_qtr DESC;

question: How does new account addition look like by tier type?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
base_valid_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
first_ship_week_by_campus_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_id,
    MIN(week_end_date) AS first_week_end_date
  FROM base_valid_sales_cte
  GROUP BY campus_id
),
first_ship_attributes_by_campus_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    b.campus_id,
    b.campus_tier
  FROM base_valid_sales_cte b
  INNER JOIN first_ship_week_by_campus_cte f
    ON b.campus_id = f.campus_id
   AND b.week_end_date = f.first_week_end_date
),
new_campuses_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    f.campus_id,
    MAX(a.campus_tier) AS campus_tier
  FROM first_ship_week_by_campus_cte f
  INNER JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    ON 1 = 1
  INNER JOIN first_ship_attributes_by_campus_cte a
    ON a.campus_id = f.campus_id
  WHERE f.first_week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
  GROUP BY f.campus_id
),
counts_by_tier_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_tier,
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_52w
  FROM new_campuses_52w_cte
  GROUP BY campus_tier
),
total_new_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS total_new_accounts_52w
  FROM new_campuses_52w_cte
),
final_calculation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.campus_tier,
    c.new_accounts_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN t.total_new_accounts_52w = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        CAST(ROUND(100.0 * c.new_accounts_52w / NULLIF(t.total_new_accounts_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER),
        '%'
      )
    END AS contribution_to_total_new_accounts_52w
  FROM counts_by_tier_cte c
  CROSS JOIN total_new_cte t
)
SELECT
  campus_tier,
  new_accounts_52w,
  contribution_to_total_new_accounts_52w
FROM final_calculation_cte
ORDER BY new_accounts_52w DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date

),
active_accounts_by_week_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    week_end_date,
    campus_id
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
first_active_week_per_account_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_id,
    MIN(week_end_date) AS first_active_week_end_date
  FROM active_accounts_by_week_cte
  GROUP BY campus_id
),
new_business_counts_cte AS (

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN f.first_active_week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
      THEN f.campus_id
    END) AS new_business_accounts_r13w,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN f.first_active_week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AND DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date)
      THEN f.campus_id
    END) AS new_business_accounts_p13w
  FROM first_active_week_per_account_cte f
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
)
SELECT
  CAST(n.new_business_accounts_r13w AS INTEGER) AS new_business_accounts_r13w,
  CAST(n.new_business_accounts_p13w AS INTEGER) AS new_business_accounts_p13w,
  CONCAT(

      CASE
        WHEN n.new_business_accounts_p13w = 0 AND n.new_business_accounts_r13w > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN n.new_business_accounts_p13w = 0 AND n.new_business_accounts_r13w = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE CAST(
          (
            (n.new_business_accounts_r13w - n.new_business_accounts_p13w)
            / NULLIF(n.new_business_accounts_p13w, 0)::FLOAT
          ) * 100 AS INTEGER
        )
      END
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS "new_business_growth_r13w_vs_p13w%"

first_active_week_per_campus_cte AS (

  GROUP BY
    campus_id
),
rolling_windows_cte AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
    max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_week_end_date,

  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
new_business_counts_cte AS (

          WHEN new_business_accounts_p13w = 0 AND new_business_accounts_r13w = 0 THEN 0

        END

  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
region_sales_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,

  FROM data_867 d

),
national_sales_52w_cte AS (

    AND d.week_end_date <= dw.max_week_end_date
),
final_rows AS (
  SELECT
    rs.campus_region,
    CAST(ROUND(rs.sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(ROUND(ns.national_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_52w,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        ROUND(
          CASE
            WHEN ns.national_sales_52w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE (rs.sales_52w / NULLIF(ns.national_sales_52w, 0)) * 100
          END,
          0
        ) AS INTEGER
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS contribution_52w_pct
  FROM region_sales_52w_cte rs
  CROSS JOIN national_sales_52w_cte ns

    'Nation' AS campus_region,

    CAST(ROUND(ns.national_sales_52w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_sales_52w,
    '100%' AS contribution_52w_pct
  FROM national_sales_52w_cte ns
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  sales_52w,
  national_sales_52w,
  contribution_52w_pct
FROM final_rows
ORDER BY
  sales_52w DESC;
