question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts which are academic, IDNs and Community

trace.text:
WITH
  max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
  ),
  last_52_weeks_cte AS (
    SELECT d.*
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN max_date_cte m
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date)
      AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
  ),
  mapped_parent_type_cte AS (
    SELECT
      CASE
        WHEN campus_account_type = 'ACADEMIC' THEN 'Academic'
        WHEN campus_account_type = 'COMMUNITY' THEN 'Community'
        ELSE 'IDN'
      END AS mapped_parent_account_type,
      relmora_total_mg
    FROM last_52_weeks_cte
  ),
  national_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
      SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w_mg
    FROM mapped_parent_type_cte
  ),
  type_totals_cte AS (
    SELECT
      mapped_parent_account_type,
      SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w_mg_by_parent_account_type
    FROM mapped_parent_type_cte
    GROUP BY mapped_parent_account_type
  ),
  contribution_calc_cte AS (
    SELECT
      t.mapped_parent_account_type,
      CAST(t.sales_52w_mg_by_parent_account_type AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w_mg_by_parent_account_type,
      CASE
        WHEN n.national_sales_52w_mg = 0 THEN '0%'
        ELSE CONCAT(
          CAST(
            ROUND(
              (t.sales_52w_mg_by_parent_account_type * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w_mg, 0),
              0
            ) AS INTEGER
          ),
          '%'
        )
      END AS sales_contribution_52w_percent
    FROM type_totals_cte t
    CROSS JOIN national_total_cte n
  )
SELECT
  mapped_parent_account_type,
  sales_52w_mg_by_parent_account_type,
  sales_contribution_52w_percent
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY
  CAST(REPLACE(sales_contribution_52w_percent, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC,
  mapped_parent_account_type ASC;

    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) d
),
r4w_week_end_dates_cte AS (
  SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS r4w_week_end_dates_included
  FROM r4w_weeks_cte
),
p4w_week_end_dates_cte AS (
  SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS p4w_week_end_dates_included
  FROM p4w_weeks_cte
),
area_sales_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_52w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_sales_52w_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
),
area_sales_r4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
area_sales_p4w_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_sales_r4w_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r4w_weeks_cte)
),
national_sales_p4w_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_prev_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p4w_weeks_cte)
),
areas_cte AS (
  SELECT campus_region FROM area_sales_52w_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM area_sales_r4w_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM area_sales_p4w_cte
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region,
    COALESCE(s52.sales_52w, 0) AS sales_52w,
    COALESCE(r4.sales_4w, 0) AS sales_4w,
    COALESCE(p4.sales_prev_4w, 0) AS sales_prev_4w,
    n52.national_sales_52w AS national_sales_52w
  FROM areas_cte a
  LEFT JOIN area_sales_52w_cte s52
    ON s52.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN area_sales_r4w_cte r4
    ON r4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN area_sales_p4w_cte p4
    ON p4.campus_region = a.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN national_sales_52w_cte n52
),
area_metrics_formatted_cte AS (
  SELECT
    am.campus_region,
    CAST(am.sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(am.sales_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(am.sales_prev_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN am.national_sales_52w > 0
            THEN (am.sales_52w / NULLIF(am.national_sales_52w, 0)) * 100
          ELSE 0
        END
      , 0),
      '%'
    ) AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CASE
      WHEN am.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND am.sales_4w > 0 THEN CONCAT('100', '%')
      WHEN am.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND am.sales_4w = 0 THEN CONCAT('0', '%')
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(
          ((am.sales_4w - am.sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(am.sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
        , 0),
        '%'
      )
    END AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN am.national_sales_52w > 0
          THEN (am.sales_52w / NULLIF(am.national_sales_52w, 0)) * 100
        ELSE 0
      END
    , 0) AS contribution_pct_value,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN am.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND am.sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN am.sales_prev_4w = 0 AND am.sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ((am.sales_4w - am.sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(am.sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
      END
    , 0) AS growth_pct_value
  FROM area_metrics_cte am
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'National' AS campus_region,
    CAST(n52.national_sales_52w AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(n4.national_sales_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(p4.national_sales_prev_4w AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
    CONCAT('100', '%') AS "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    CASE
      WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN CONCAT('100', '%')
      WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN CONCAT('0', '%')
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(
          ((n4.national_sales_4w - p4.national_sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(p4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
        , 0),
        '%'
      )
    END AS "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    100 AS contribution_pct_value,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN p4.national_sales_prev_4w = 0 AND n4.national_sales_4w = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ((n4.national_sales_4w - p4.national_sales_prev_4w) / NULLIF(p4.national_sales_prev_4w, 0)) * 100
      END
    , 0) AS growth_pct_value
  FROM national_sales_52w_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_sales_r4w_cte n4
  CROSS JOIN national_sales_p4w_cte p4
),
final_with_nation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    contribution_pct_value,
    growth_pct_value
  FROM area_metrics_formatted_cte

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    campus_region,
    sales_52w,
    sales_4w,
    sales_prev_4w,
    "contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
    "growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
    contribution_pct_value,
    growth_pct_value
  FROM national_metrics_cte
),
nation_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(growth_pct_value) AS nation_growth_pct_value
  FROM final_with_nation_cte
  WHERE campus_region = 'National'
)
SELECT
  f.campus_region,
  f.sales_52w,
  f.sales_4w,
  f.sales_prev_4w,
  f."contribution_pct_recent_52w%",
  f."growth_pct_recent_4w_vs_previous_4w%",
  CASE
    WHEN f.campus_region = 'National' THEN 'National'
    WHEN f.growth_pct_value > n.nation_growth_pct_value THEN 'Higher'
    ELSE 'Lower'
  END AS higher_or_lower_than_nation_growth,
  r.r4w_week_end_dates_included,
  p.p4w_week_end_dates_included
FROM final_with_nation_cte f
CROSS JOIN nation_growth_cte n
CROSS JOIN r4w_week_end_dates_cte r
CROSS JOIN p4w_week_end_dates_cte p
ORDER BY f.contribution_pct_value DESC;

question: Provide sales contribution by Area and estimate growth in recent 8 weeks compared to previous 8 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
),
r52w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 52
  ) d
),
r8w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 8
  ) d
),
p8w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r8w_weeks_cte)
    ORDER BY week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 8
  ) d
),
r52w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS r52w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r52w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_r52w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r52w_weeks_cte)
),
r8w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS r8w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r8w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
p8w_area_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS p8w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p8w_weeks_cte)
  GROUP BY campus_region
),
national_r8w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_r8w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM r8w_weeks_cte)
),
national_p8w_total_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_p8w_sales
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
    AND week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM p8w_weeks_cte)
),
nation_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r8.national_r8w_sales,
    p8.national_p8w_sales,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN p8.national_p8w_sales = 0 AND r8.national_r8w_sales > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN p8.national_p8w_sales = 0 AND r8.national_r8w_sales = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(((r8.national_r8w_sales - p8.national_p8w_sales) * 100.0 / NULLIF(p8.national_p8w_sales, 0)), 0)
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS nation_growth_pct
  FROM national_r8w_total_cte r8
  CROSS JOIN national_p8w_total_cte p8
),
areas_cte AS (
  SELECT campus_region FROM r52w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM r8w_area_sales_cte
  UNION
  SELECT campus_region FROM p8w_area_sales_cte
),
area_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    a.campus_region,
    COALESCE(r52.r52w_sales, 0) AS r52w_sales,
    COALESCE(r8.r8w_sales, 0) AS r8w_sales,
    COALESCE(p8.p8w_sales, 0) AS p8w_sales,
    n52.national_r52w_sales,
    ng.nation_growth_pct,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN n52.national_r52w_sales > 0
          THEN ROUND((COALESCE(r52.r52w_sales, 0) * 100.0 / NULLIF(n52.national_r52w_sales, 0)), 0)
        ELSE 0
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS contribution_pct_recent_52w_value,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p8.p8w_sales, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r8.r8w_sales, 0) > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN COALESCE(p8.p8w_sales, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r8.r8w_sales, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(((COALESCE(r8.r8w_sales, 0) - COALESCE(p8.p8w_sales, 0)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COALESCE(p8.p8w_sales, 0), 0)), 0)
      END AS INTEGER
    ) AS growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w_value
  FROM areas_cte a
  LEFT JOIN r52w_area_sales_cte r52
    ON r52.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN r8w_area_sales_cte r8
    ON r8.campus_region = a.campus_region
  LEFT JOIN p8w_area_sales_cte p8
    ON p8.campus_region = a.campus_region
  CROSS JOIN national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN nation_growth_cte ng
),
area_metrics_formatted_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_region AS area,
    CAST(r52w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(r8w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_8w,
    CAST(p8w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_8w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(contribution_pct_recent_52w_value, 0), '%') AS contribution_pct_recent_52w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w_value, 0), '%') AS growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(nation_growth_pct, 0), '%') AS nation_growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    CASE
      WHEN growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w_value >= nation_growth_pct THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS performance_vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_recent_52w_value AS contribution_pct_recent_52w_sort
  FROM area_metrics_cte
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    'National' AS area,
    CAST(n52.national_r52w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_52w,
    CAST(r8.national_r8w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_8w,
    CAST(p8.national_p8w_sales AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_8w,
    '100%' AS contribution_pct_recent_52w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(ng.nation_growth_pct, 0), '%') AS growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(ng.nation_growth_pct, 0), '%') AS nation_growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    'Higher' AS performance_vs_nation,
    100 AS contribution_pct_recent_52w_sort
  FROM national_r52w_total_cte n52
  CROSS JOIN national_r8w_total_cte r8
  CROSS JOIN national_p8w_total_cte p8
  CROSS JOIN nation_growth_cte ng
),
final_with_nation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    area,
    sales_52w,
    sales_8w,
    sales_prev_8w,
    contribution_pct_recent_52w,
    growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    nation_growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    performance_vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_recent_52w_sort
  FROM area_metrics_formatted_cte

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    area,
    sales_52w,
    sales_8w,
    sales_prev_8w,
    contribution_pct_recent_52w,
    growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    nation_growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
    performance_vs_nation,
    contribution_pct_recent_52w_sort
  FROM national_metrics_cte
),
weeks_included_cte AS (
  SELECT 'R8W' AS period_label, week_end_date
  FROM r8w_weeks_cte
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'P8W' AS period_label, week_end_date
  FROM p8w_weeks_cte
),
weeks_pivot_cte AS (
  SELECT
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R8W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN period_label = 'R8W' THEN week_end_date END) AS weeks_included_r8w,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P8W' THEN TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date) END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CASE WHEN period_label = 'P8W' THEN week_end_date END) AS weeks_included_p8w
  FROM weeks_included_cte
)
SELECT
  f.area,
  f.sales_52w,
  f.sales_8w,
  f.sales_prev_8w,
  f.contribution_pct_recent_52w,
  f.growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
  f.nation_growth_pct_recent_8w_vs_previous_8w,
  f.performance_vs_nation,
  w.weeks_included_r8w,
  w.weeks_included_p8w
FROM final_with_nation_cte f
CROSS JOIN weeks_pivot_cte w
ORDER BY f.contribution_pct_recent_52w_sort DESC;

import pandas as pd import plotly.graph_objects as go from plotly.subplots import make_subplots df_plot = df.copy() def _pct_to_float(x): if pd.isna(x): return None s = str(x).strip() if s.endswith("%"): s = s[:-1] try: return float(s) except Exception: return None df_plot["contribution_pct_num"] = df_plot["CONTRIBUTION_PCT_RECENT_52W"].apply(_pct_to_float) df_plot["growth_pct_num"] = df_plot["GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_8W_VS_PREVIOUS_8W"].apply(_pct_to_float) nation_growth = None if "NATION_GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_8W_VS_PREVIOUS_8W" in df_plot.columns: ng = df_plot["NATION_GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_8W_VS_PREVIOUS_8W"].dropna().astype(str).iloc[0] if len(df_plot) else None nation_growth = _pct_to_float(ng) df_plot = df_plot.sort_values("contribution_pct_num", ascending=False, kind="mergesort") if "AREA" in df_plot.columns and (df_plot["AREA"] == "National").any(): df_plot = pd.concat([df_plot[df_plot["AREA"] != "National"], df_plot[df_plot["AREA"] == "National"]], ignore_index=True) fig = make_subplots(specs=[[{"secondary_y": True}]]) bar_colors = df_plot["PERFORMANCE_VS_NATION"].map({"Higher": "#2ca02c", "Lower": "#d62728"}).fillna("#7f7f7f").tolist() fig.add_trace( go.Bar( x=df_plot["AREA"], y=df_plot["contribution_pct_num"], name="52W Contribution (%)", marker_color=bar_colors, customdata=list( zip( df_plot["SALES_52W"], df_plot["SALES_8W"], df_plot["SALES_PREV_8W"], df_plot["GROWTH_PCT_RECENT_8W_VS_PREVIOUS_8W"], df_plot["PERFORMANCE_VS_NATION"], ) ), hovertemplate="Area=%{x}" "
52W Contribution=%{y:.0f}%" "
52W Sales=%{customdata[0]:,}" "
R8W Sales=%{customdata[1]:,}" "

question: How much did sales grow in the recent 4 weeks?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_4_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
    WHERE d.week_end_date <= (SELECT m.max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte m)
    ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) rw
),
previous_4_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
    WHERE d.week_end_date < (SELECT MIN(rw.week_end_date) FROM recent_4_weeks_cte rw)
    ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC
    LIMIT 4
  ) pw
),
recent_4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS recent_4w_sales,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date ASC) AS recent_4w_weeks_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS recent_4w_week_count
  FROM data_867 d
  WHERE d.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM recent_4_weeks_cte)
),
previous_4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS previous_4w_sales,
    LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(d.week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.week_end_date ASC) AS previous_4w_weeks_included,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date) AS previous_4w_week_count
  FROM data_867 d
  WHERE d.week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM previous_4_weeks_cte)
),
final_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.recent_4w_sales,
    p.previous_4w_sales,
    r.recent_4w_weeks_included,
    p.previous_4w_weeks_included,
    r.recent_4w_week_count,
    p.previous_4w_week_count,
    CASE
      WHEN r.recent_4w_week_count < 4 OR p.previous_4w_week_count < 4 THEN r.recent_4w_sales / NULLIF(r.recent_4w_week_count, 0)
      ELSE r.recent_4w_sales
    END AS recent_basis_sales,
    CASE
      WHEN r.recent_4w_week_count < 4 OR p.previous_4w_week_count < 4 THEN p.previous_4w_sales / NULLIF(p.previous_4w_week_count, 0)
      ELSE p.previous_4w_sales
    END AS previous_basis_sales
  FROM recent_4w_sales_cte r
  CROSS JOIN previous_4w_sales_cte p
)
SELECT
  CAST(ROUND(recent_basis_sales, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
  CAST(ROUND(previous_basis_sales, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_prev_4w,
  CAST(ROUND((recent_basis_sales - previous_basis_sales), 0) AS INTEGER) AS absolute_change_4w,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN previous_basis_sales = 0 AND recent_basis_sales > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN previous_basis_sales = 0 AND recent_basis_sales = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((recent_basis_sales - previous_basis_sales) / NULLIF(previous_basis_sales, 0)) * 100
        END
      , 0) AS INTEGER
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS growth_4w_pct,
  recent_4w_weeks_included,
  previous_4w_weeks_included
FROM final_growth_cte;

question: What is the sales contribution of parent accounts which are academic, IDNs and Community

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
last_52_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AND m.max_week_end_date
),
mapped_parent_bucket_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN parent_id IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(parent_id) <> '' THEN 'IDN'
      WHEN campus_account_type = 'ACADEMIC' THEN 'Academic'
      WHEN campus_account_type = 'COMMUNITY' THEN 'Community'
      ELSE 'Community'
    END AS mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    relmora_total_mg
  FROM last_52_weeks_cte
),
national_total_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS national_sales_52w
  FROM mapped_parent_bucket_cte
),
bucket_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS group_sales_52w
  FROM mapped_parent_bucket_cte
  GROUP BY mapped_parent_account_bucket
),
contribution_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    b.mapped_parent_account_bucket,
    b.group_sales_52w,
    CASE
      WHEN n.national_sales_52w = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND((b.group_sales_52w * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.national_sales_52w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), '%')
    END AS sales_contribution_52w
  FROM bucket_sales_cte b
  CROSS JOIN national_total_sales_cte n
)
SELECT
  mapped_parent_account_bucket,
  group_sales_52w,
  sales_contribution_52w
FROM contribution_calc_cte
ORDER BY
  TRY_TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(sales_contribution_52w, '%', '')) DESC,
  mapped_parent_account_bucket ASC;

question: How much did Trodelvy sales grow in the recent 4 weeks

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
week_ranks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  ) AS d
),
recent_4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM week_ranks_cte
  WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 4
),
prior_4w_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT week_end_date
  FROM week_ranks_cte
  WHERE rn BETWEEN 5 AND 8
),
recent_4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_sls) AS sales_4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM recent_4w_weeks_cte)
),
prior_4w_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT SUM(relmora_total_sls) AS sales_p4w
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM prior_4w_weeks_cte)
),
week_lists_cte AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) FROM recent_4w_weeks_cte) AS recent_4w_week_end_dates,
    (SELECT LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) FROM prior_4w_weeks_cte) AS prior_4w_week_end_dates
),
final_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w,
    CAST(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS sales_p4w,
    CAST(COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS absolute_growth_sales_4w,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) > 0 THEN '100%'
      WHEN COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) = 0 THEN '0%'
      ELSE CONCAT(
        ROUND(
          CAST(
            (
              CAST(COALESCE(r.sales_4w, 0) - COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS FLOAT)
              / NULLIF(CAST(COALESCE(p.sales_p4w, 0) AS FLOAT), 0)
            ) * 100
            AS INTEGER
          ),
          0
        ),
        '%'
      )
    END AS growth_sales_4w,
    wl.recent_4w_week_end_dates,
    wl.prior_4w_week_end_dates
  FROM recent_4w_sales_cte r
  CROSS JOIN prior_4w_sales_cte p
  CROSS JOIN week_lists_cte wl
)
SELECT
  sales_4w,
  sales_p4w,
  absolute_growth_sales_4w,
  growth_sales_4w,
  recent_4w_week_end_dates,
  prior_4w_week_end_dates
FROM final_calc_cte;

question: How much did drug sales grow in recent 4 weeks and how does that compare with growth in recent 8 weeks?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
week_ranks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS rn
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
    FROM data_867
    WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
  ) AS d
),
w4_current_sum AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_4w_current
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM week_ranks_cte WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 4)
),
w4_prior_sum AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_4w_prior
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM week_ranks_cte WHERE rn BETWEEN 5 AND 8)
),
w8_current_sum AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_8w_current
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM week_ranks_cte WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 8)
),
w8_prior_sum AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(relmora_total_mg), 0) AS sales_8w_prior
  FROM data_867
  WHERE week_end_date IN (SELECT week_end_date FROM week_ranks_cte WHERE rn BETWEEN 9 AND 16)
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    w4c.sales_4w_current,
    w4p.sales_4w_prior,
    w8c.sales_8w_current,
    w8p.sales_8w_prior,
    (w4c.sales_4w_current - w4p.sales_4w_prior) AS growth_4w_abs,
    CASE
      WHEN w4p.sales_4w_prior = 0 AND w4c.sales_4w_current > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN w4p.sales_4w_prior = 0 AND w4c.sales_4w_current = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(((w4c.sales_4w_current - w4p.sales_4w_prior) * 100) / NULLIF(w4p.sales_4w_prior, 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS growth_4w_pct_int,
    (w8c.sales_8w_current - w8p.sales_8w_prior) AS growth_8w_abs,
    CASE
      WHEN w8p.sales_8w_prior = 0 AND w8c.sales_8w_current > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN w8p.sales_8w_prior = 0 AND w8c.sales_8w_current = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(((w8c.sales_8w_current - w8p.sales_8w_prior) * 100) / NULLIF(w8p.sales_8w_prior, 0) AS INTEGER)
    END AS growth_8w_pct_int
  FROM w4_current_sum w4c
  CROSS JOIN w4_prior_sum w4p
  CROSS JOIN w8_current_sum w8c
  CROSS JOIN w8_prior_sum w8p
)
SELECT
  CAST(sales_4w_current AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_current,
  CAST(sales_4w_prior AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_prior,
  CAST(growth_4w_abs AS INTEGER) AS growth_4w_abs,
  CONCAT(ROUND(growth_4w_pct_int, 0), '%') AS growth_4w_pct,
  CAST(sales_8w_current AS INTEGER) AS sales_8w_current,
  CAST(sales_8w_prior AS INTEGER) AS sales_8w_prior,
  CAST(growth_8w_abs AS INTEGER) AS growth_8w_abs,
  CONCAT(ROUND(growth_8w_pct_int, 0), '%') AS growth_8w_pct,
  CONCAT(ROUND(CAST((growth_4w_pct_int - growth_8w_pct_int) AS INTEGER), 0), '%') AS comparison_growth_pct_diff,
  CASE
    WHEN growth_4w_pct_int > growth_8w_pct_int THEN 'R4W higher'
    WHEN growth_4w_pct_int < growth_8w_pct_int THEN 'R8W higher'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS growth_rate_comparison
FROM calc;

question: Are we seeing strong short-term sales momentum?

trace.text:
WITH
  max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
  ),
  week_ranks_cte AS (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY d.week_end_date DESC) AS week_rank
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) d
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
      ON d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
    QUALIFY week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 8
  ),
  window_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
      t.week_end_date,
      t.relmora_total_mg,
      CASE
        WHEN wr.week_rank BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 'recent_4w'
        WHEN wr.week_rank BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 'prior_4w'
      END AS window_flag
    FROM data_867 t
    JOIN week_ranks_cte wr
      ON t.week_end_date = wr.week_end_date
    WHERE t.week_end_date >= (
      SELECT DATEADD(WEEK, -7, max_week_end_date) FROM max_week_end_date_cte
    )
      AND wr.week_rank <= 8
  ),
  weekly_totals_cte AS (
    SELECT
      window_flag,
      week_end_date,
      SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg
    FROM window_classification_cte
    WHERE window_flag IN ('recent_4w', 'prior_4w')
    GROUP BY window_flag, week_end_date
  ),
  window_totals_cte AS (
    SELECT
      window_flag,
      SUM(weekly_sales_mg) AS window_sales_mg,
      COUNT(*) AS weeks_in_window,
      LISTAGG(TO_VARCHAR(week_end_date), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS weeks_included
    FROM weekly_totals_cte
    GROUP BY window_flag
  ),
  momentum_calc_cte AS (
    SELECT
      SUM(CASE WHEN window_flag = 'recent_4w' THEN window_sales_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_4w_recent_mg,
      SUM(CASE WHEN window_flag = 'prior_4w' THEN window_sales_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_4w_prior_mg,
      SUM(CASE WHEN window_flag = 'recent_4w' THEN weeks_in_window ELSE 0 END) AS recent_4w_weeks_included,
      SUM(CASE WHEN window_flag = 'prior_4w' THEN weeks_in_window ELSE 0 END) AS prior_4w_weeks_included,
      MAX(CASE WHEN window_flag = 'recent_4w' THEN weeks_included END) AS recent_4w_week_end_dates_included,
      MAX(CASE WHEN window_flag = 'prior_4w' THEN weeks_included END) AS prior_4w_week_end_dates_included
    FROM window_totals_cte
  )
SELECT
  CAST(sales_4w_recent_mg AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_recent_mg,
  CAST(sales_4w_prior_mg AS INTEGER) AS sales_4w_prior_mg,
  CAST((sales_4w_recent_mg - sales_4w_prior_mg) AS INTEGER) AS abs_change_4w_mg,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN sales_4w_prior_mg = 0 AND sales_4w_recent_mg > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN sales_4w_prior_mg = 0 AND sales_4w_recent_mg = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((sales_4w_recent_mg - sales_4w_prior_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sales_4w_prior_mg, 0)
        END
        AS INTEGER
      )
    , 0)
  , '%') AS "growth_4w_pct%",
  CAST(recent_4w_weeks_included AS INTEGER) AS recent_4w_weeks_included,
  CAST(prior_4w_weeks_included AS INTEGER) AS prior_4w_weeks_included,
  recent_4w_week_end_dates_included,
  prior_4w_week_end_dates_included
FROM momentum_calc_cte;

window_boundaries_cte AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -51, max_week_end_date) AS current_52w_start,
    max_week_end_date AS current_52w_end,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -103, max_week_end_date) AS prior_52w_start,
    DATEADD(WEEK, -52, max_week_end_date) AS prior_52w_end
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
first_active_week_per_campus_cte AS (
  SELECT
    campus_id,
    MIN(week_end_date) AS first_active_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
  WHERE relmora_total_mg > 0
  GROUP BY campus_id
),
new_accounts_counts_cte AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN f.first_active_week_end_date BETWEEN w.current_52w_start AND w.current_52w_end THEN f.campus_id
      ELSE NULL
    END) AS new_accounts_52w,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN f.first_active_week_end_date BETWEEN w.prior_52w_start AND w.prior_52w_end THEN f.campus_id
      ELSE NULL
    END) AS new_accounts_prev_52w
  FROM first_active_week_per_campus_cte f
  CROSS JOIN window_boundaries_cte w
),
relmora_volume_windows_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.current_52w_start AND w.current_52w_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg
      ELSE 0
    END) AS relmora_mg_52w,
    SUM(CASE
      WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.prior_52w_start AND w.prior_52w_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg
      ELSE 0
    END) AS relmora_mg_prev_52w
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN window_boundaries_cte w
  WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
)
SELECT

  n.new_accounts_prev_52w AS new_accounts_prev_52w,

        WHEN n.new_accounts_prev_52w = 0 AND n.new_accounts_52w > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN n.new_accounts_prev_52w = 0 AND n.new_accounts_52w = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE CAST(((n.new_accounts_52w - n.new_accounts_prev_52w) / NULLIF(n.new_accounts_prev_52w, 0)) * 100 AS INTEGER)

  ) AS "new_accounts_growth_52w%",

FROM new_accounts_counts_cte n

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    m.max_week_end_date,
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS current_quarter_end,
    (
      SELECT MIN(d.quarter_year)
      FROM data_867 d
      WHERE d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    ) AS quarter_label_current
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
prior_quarter_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    c.max_week_end_date,
    c.current_quarter_start,
    c.current_quarter_end,
    c.quarter_label_current,
    DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, c.current_quarter_start) AS prior_quarter_start,
    DATEADD(DAY, -1, c.current_quarter_start) AS prior_quarter_end
  FROM current_quarter_bounds_cte c
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.current_quarter_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_qtr_complete,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_qtr_complete
  FROM prior_quarter_bounds_cte p
),
weekly_inclusion_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
    pc.current_quarter_start,
    pc.current_quarter_end,
    pc.prior_quarter_start,
    pc.prior_quarter_end,
    pc.quarter_label_current,
    TO_CHAR(pc.prior_quarter_start, '"Q"Q-YY') AS quarter_label_prior,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(
        0,
        DATEDIFF(
          DAY,
          GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), pc.current_quarter_start),
          LEAST(w.week_end_date, pc.current_quarter_end)
        ) + 1
      ) >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS include_current_qtr,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(
        0,
        DATEDIFF(
          DAY,
          GREATEST(DATEADD(DAY, -6, w.week_end_date), pc.prior_quarter_start),
          LEAST(w.week_end_date, pc.prior_quarter_end)
        ) + 1
      ) >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS include_prior_qtr
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) w
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
),
complete_totals_region_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    pc.quarter_label_current AS quarter_label_current,
    TO_CHAR(pc.prior_quarter_start, '"Q"Q-YY') AS quarter_label_prior,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = pc.quarter_label_current THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.prior_quarter_start AND pc.prior_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_prior_qtr
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  WHERE pc.current_qtr_complete = 1
    AND pc.prior_qtr_complete = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.campus_region,
    pc.quarter_label_current,
    TO_CHAR(pc.prior_quarter_start, '"Q"Q-YY')
),
complete_totals_nation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    pc.quarter_label_current AS quarter_label_current,
    TO_CHAR(pc.prior_quarter_start, '"Q"Q-YY') AS quarter_label_prior,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = pc.quarter_label_current THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.prior_quarter_start AND pc.prior_quarter_end THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  WHERE pc.current_qtr_complete = 1
    AND pc.prior_qtr_complete = 1
  GROUP BY
    pc.quarter_label_current,
    TO_CHAR(pc.prior_quarter_start, '"Q"Q-YY')
),
incomplete_weekly_region_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    wi.quarter_label_current AS quarter_label_current,
    wi.quarter_label_prior AS quarter_label_prior,
    CAST(
      SUM(CASE WHEN wi.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wi.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN d.week_end_date END), 0)
      AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(
      SUM(CASE WHEN wi.include_prior_qtr = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wi.include_prior_qtr = 1 THEN d.week_end_date END), 0)
      AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales_prior_qtr
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN weekly_inclusion_cte wi
    ON wi.week_end_date = d.week_end_date
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  WHERE NOT (pc.current_qtr_complete = 1 AND pc.prior_qtr_complete = 1)
  GROUP BY
    d.campus_region,
    wi.quarter_label_current,
    wi.quarter_label_prior
),
incomplete_weekly_nation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    wi.quarter_label_current AS quarter_label_current,
    wi.quarter_label_prior AS quarter_label_prior,
    CAST(
      SUM(CASE WHEN wi.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wi.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN d.week_end_date END), 0)
      AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation,
    CAST(
      SUM(CASE WHEN wi.include_prior_qtr = 1 THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wi.include_prior_qtr = 1 THEN d.week_end_date END), 0)
      AS INTEGER
    ) AS quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN weekly_inclusion_cte wi
    ON wi.week_end_date = d.week_end_date
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  WHERE NOT (pc.current_qtr_complete = 1 AND pc.prior_qtr_complete = 1)
  GROUP BY
    wi.quarter_label_current,
    wi.quarter_label_prior
),
included_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    wi.quarter_label_current AS quarter_label_current,
    wi.quarter_label_prior AS quarter_label_prior,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN wi.include_current_qtr = 1 THEN TO_CHAR(wi.week_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wi.week_end_date) AS included_weeks_current_qtr,
    LISTAGG(CASE WHEN wi.include_prior_qtr = 1 THEN TO_CHAR(wi.week_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END, ', ')
      WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY wi.week_end_date) AS included_weeks_prior_qtr
  FROM weekly_inclusion_cte wi
  GROUP BY
    wi.quarter_label_current,
    wi.quarter_label_prior
),
region_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    r.quarter_label_current,
    r.quarter_label_prior,
    r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    r.quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
    n.quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation,
    n.quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation,
    i.included_weeks_current_qtr,
    i.included_weeks_prior_qtr
  FROM (
    SELECT * FROM complete_totals_region_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM incomplete_weekly_region_cte
  ) r
  JOIN (
    SELECT * FROM complete_totals_nation_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM incomplete_weekly_nation_cte
  ) n
    ON n.quarter_label_current = r.quarter_label_current
   AND n.quarter_label_prior = r.quarter_label_prior
  LEFT JOIN included_weeks_cte i
    ON i.quarter_label_current = r.quarter_label_current
   AND i.quarter_label_prior = r.quarter_label_prior
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  quarter_label_current,
  quarter_label_prior,
  quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
  quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE CAST(
          (
            (quarterly_sales_current_qtr - quarterly_sales_prior_qtr)
            / NULLIF(quarterly_sales_prior_qtr, 0)
          ) * 100 AS INTEGER
        )
      END
    , 0)
  , '%') AS "quarterly_growth_qoq%",
  quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation,
  quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE CAST(
          (
            (quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation - quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation)
            / NULLIF(quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation, 0)
          ) * 100 AS INTEGER
        )
      END
    , 0)
  , '%') AS "quarterly_growth_qoq_nation%",
  CASE
    WHEN
      (
        CASE
          WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(
            (
              (quarterly_sales_current_qtr - quarterly_sales_prior_qtr)
              / NULLIF(quarterly_sales_prior_qtr, 0)
            ) * 100 AS INTEGER
          )
        END
      )
      >
      (
        CASE
          WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation = 0 AND quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(
            (
              (quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation - quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation)
              / NULLIF(quarterly_sales_prior_qtr_nation, 0)
            ) * 100 AS INTEGER
          )
        END
      )
    THEN 'Higher' ELSE 'Lower'
  END AS performance_vs_nation,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CAST(
        (quarterly_sales_current_qtr / NULLIF(quarterly_sales_current_qtr_nation, 0)) * 100
        AS INTEGER
      )
    , 0)
  , '%') AS "contribution_to_national_sales_current_qtr%",
  included_weeks_current_qtr,
  included_weeks_prior_qtr
FROM region_quarter_metrics_cte
ORDER BY quarterly_sales_current_qtr DESC
LIMIT 10;

    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date

period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS r13w_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_week_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date)
                FROM data_867 d
                WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_week_end_date AND pb.r13w_week_end_date
            ) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date)
                FROM data_867 d
                WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_week_end_date AND pb.p13w_week_end_date
            ) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pc.p13w_week_start_date,
        pc.p13w_week_end_date,
        pc.r13w_week_start_date,
        pc.r13w_week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.p13w_week_start_date AND pc.p13w_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.r13w_week_start_date AND pc.r13w_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM period_completeness_cte pc
    CROSS JOIN data_867 d
    GROUP BY
        pc.p13w_week_start_date,
        pc.p13w_week_end_date,
        pc.r13w_week_start_date,
        pc.r13w_week_end_date
),
regional_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_week_end_date AND pc.p13w_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_week_end_date AND pc.r13w_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_week_end_date AND pc.r13w_week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_week_end_date AND pc.p13w_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_week_end_date AND pc.r13w_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_week_end_date AND pc.r13w_week_end_date
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        rs.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        ns.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        ns.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(rs.mg_total_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(ROUND(rs.mg_total_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CAST(ROUND(ns.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(ns.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM regional_sales_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN national_sales_cte ns
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        dam.campus_region,
        dam.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        dam.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        dam.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        dam.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_num
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte dam
),
region_direction_cte AS (
    SELECT
        gm.campus_region,
        gm.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        gm.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        gm.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        gm.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND(gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND(gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_num, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num > 0 THEN 'Growing'
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS region_growth_status,
        CASE
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num > gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_num THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num < gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_num THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num
    FROM growth_metrics_cte gm
)
SELECT
    rd.campus_region,
    pc.p13w_week_start_date,
    pc.p13w_week_end_date,
    pc.r13w_week_start_date,
    pc.r13w_week_end_date,
    nb.p13w_business_days,
    nb.r13w_business_days,
    rd.mg_total_sales_p13w,
    rd.mg_total_sales_r13w,
    rd.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
    rd.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
    rd.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rd.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rd.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
    rd.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
    rd.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rd.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    rd.region_growth_status,
    rd.region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
FROM region_direction_cte rd
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
ORDER BY rd.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_num DESC, rd.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_week_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(((r.mg_volume_sales_r13w - r.mg_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w, 0), 0), '%')
        END AS mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (
                            CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0),
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(((nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w - nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w, 0), 0), '%')
        END AS mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (
                            CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0),
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rm.campus_region,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
    CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_end_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_end_week_end_date,
    nbd.p13w_business_days,
    nbd.r13w_business_days,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    pvn.performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
JOIN performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
    ON pvn.campus_region = rm.campus_region
WHERE pc.is_recent_period_complete = 1
  AND pc.is_previous_period_complete = 1
ORDER BY rm.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS r13w_start_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_end_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_start_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_week_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date)
                FROM data_867 d
                WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date
            ) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.week_end_date)
                FROM data_867 d
                WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date
            ) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pc.p13w_start_date,
        pc.p13w_end_date,
        pc.r13w_start_date,
        pc.r13w_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM period_completeness_cte pc
    JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY
        pc.p13w_start_date,
        pc.p13w_end_date,
        pc.r13w_start_date,
        pc.r13w_end_date
),
regional_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        rs.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        ns.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        ns.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        nb.p13w_business_days,
        nb.r13w_business_days,
        CAST(ROUND(rs.mg_total_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(ROUND(rs.mg_total_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CAST(ROUND(ns.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(ns.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM regional_sales_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN national_sales_cte ns
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        dam.campus_region,
        dam.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        dam.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        dam.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        dam.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        dam.p13w_business_days,
        dam.r13w_business_days,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte dam
),
performance_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.*,
        CASE
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > 0 THEN 'Growing'
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS growth_status_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS region_vs_nation_performance
    FROM growth_metrics_cte g
)
SELECT
    p.campus_region,
    pc.p13w_start_date,
    pc.p13w_end_date,
    pc.r13w_start_date,
    pc.r13w_end_date,
    p.p13w_business_days,
    p.r13w_business_days,
    p.mg_total_sales_p13w,
    p.mg_total_sales_r13w,
    p.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
    p.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(p.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(p.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    p.growth_status_r13w_vs_p13w,
    p.region_vs_nation_performance
FROM performance_classification_cte p
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
ORDER BY p.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value DESC, p.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
),
regional_mg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_mg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region,
        w.r13w_start_date,
        w.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND((r.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%') AS relmora_mg_share_of_national_r13w
    FROM regional_mg_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_mg_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
)
SELECT
    campus_region,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    national_business_days_r13w,
    relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    relmora_mg_share_of_national_r13w
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY relmora_mg_share_of_national_r13w DESC, relmora_total_mg_r13w DESC;

{
  "intent_summary": "Assess quarterly sales performance across regions using data_867, where the recent quarter is the calendar quarter containing the maximum available week_end_date. Because performance is requested, include comparison versus the previous comparable quarter, include regional and national metrics, determine period completeness for both quarters using calendar quarter boundaries, and if any compared quarter is incomplete display only daily average growth with total volume sales and total national sales; otherwise display both total and daily average metrics and their growth.",
  "tables": [
    "data_867"
  ],
  "filters": [
    {
      "column": "quarter_year",
      "operator": "IN",
      "value": "derived:recent_quarter_and_previous_quarter_from_max_week_end_date"
    }
  ],
  "aggregations": [
    {
      "metric_name": "mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter",
      "function": "SUM",
      "column": "relmora_total_mg",
      "group_level": "campus_region"
    },
    {
      "metric_name": "mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter",
      "function": "SUM",
      "column": "relmora_total_mg",
      "group_level": "campus_region"
    },
    {
      "metric_name": "mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation",

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_period_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
        d.quarter_year AS recent_quarter_year
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.date DESC) = 1
),
previous_quarter_period_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.max_week_end_date,
        r.recent_quarter_start_date,
        r.recent_quarter_end_date,
        r.recent_quarter_year,
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS previous_quarter_end_date,
        TO_CHAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date), 'YYYY') || '-Q' || TO_CHAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date), 'Q') AS previous_quarter_year
    FROM recent_quarter_period_cte r
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.*,
        CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
        CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_quarter_complete
    FROM previous_quarter_period_cte p
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pc.recent_quarter_start_date,
        pc.recent_quarter_end_date,
        pc.previous_quarter_start_date,
        pc.previous_quarter_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.recent_quarter_start_date AND pc.recent_quarter_end_date THEN d.date END) AS recent_quarter_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.previous_quarter_start_date AND pc.previous_quarter_end_date THEN d.date END) AS previous_quarter_business_days
    FROM period_completeness_cte pc
    JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.quarter_year IN (pc.recent_quarter_year, pc.previous_quarter_year)
    GROUP BY
        pc.recent_quarter_start_date,
        pc.recent_quarter_end_date,
        pc.previous_quarter_start_date,
        pc.previous_quarter_end_date
),
regional_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = pc.recent_quarter_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = pc.previous_quarter_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
      ON d.quarter_year IN (pc.recent_quarter_year, pc.previous_quarter_year)
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = pc.recent_quarter_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = pc.previous_quarter_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
      ON d.quarter_year IN (pc.recent_quarter_year, pc.previous_quarter_year)
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
        r.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
        n.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation,
        n.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation,
        CAST(r.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter / NULLIF(nb.recent_quarter_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
        CAST(r.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter / NULLIF(nb.previous_quarter_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
        CAST(n.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation / NULLIF(nb.recent_quarter_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation,
        CAST(n.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation / NULLIF(nb.previous_quarter_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation
    FROM regional_quarter_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_quarter_sales_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        dam.campus_region,
        dam.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
        dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
        dam.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation,
        dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND pc.is_previous_quarter_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    CAST(
                        CASE
                            WHEN dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 AND dam.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ROUND(((dam.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter - dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter, 0), 0)
                        END AS INTEGER
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS mg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND pc.is_previous_quarter_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    CAST(
                        CASE
                            WHEN dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ROUND(((dam.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation - dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation, 0), 0)
                        END AS INTEGER
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS mg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter_nation,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                CASE
                    WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter - dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter, 0), 0)
                END AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_daily_avg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                CASE
                    WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation - dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation, 0), 0)
                END AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_daily_avg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter - dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter, 0), 0)
        END AS regional_daily_avg_growth_num,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation - dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation, 0), 0)
        END AS national_daily_avg_growth_num
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte dam
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.*,
        CASE
            WHEN g.regional_daily_avg_growth_num > g.national_daily_avg_growth_num THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN g.regional_daily_avg_growth_num < g.national_daily_avg_growth_num THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
    FROM growth_metrics_cte g
)
SELECT
    pvn.campus_region,
    pc.recent_quarter_start_date,
    pc.recent_quarter_end_date,
    pc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    pc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    nb.recent_quarter_business_days,
    nb.previous_quarter_business_days,
    pvn.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
    pvn.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
    pvn.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation,
    pvn.mg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_nation,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_nation,
    pvn.mg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter,
    pvn.mg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter_nation,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_growth_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter_nation,
    pvn.region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
FROM performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
ORDER BY pvn.mg_quarterly_sales_recent_quarter DESC, pvn.campus_region ASC;
