WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        md.max_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, md.max_date)) AS r3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(md.max_date) AS r3m_end_date,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -3, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, md.max_date))) AS p3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, md.max_date)))) AS p3m_end_date
    FROM max_date_cte md
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.max_date,
        pb.r3m_start_date,
        pb.r3m_end_date,
        pb.p3m_start_date,
        pb.p3m_end_date,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.r3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.p3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
tier_region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date >= DATEADD(MONTH, -5, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', pc.max_date))
      AND d.date <= pc.max_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region, d.campus_tier
),
national_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date >= DATEADD(MONTH, -5, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', pc.max_date))
      AND d.date <= pc.max_date
),
share_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        tr.campus_region,
        tr.campus_tier,
        pc.r3m_start_date,
        pc.r3m_end_date,
        pc.p3m_start_date,
        pc.p3m_end_date,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS total_market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS total_market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                (
                    (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                    -
                    (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
                ) * 100
            , 1),
            '%'
        ) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) > 0 THEN 'Gaining Share'
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) < 0 THEN 'Losing Share'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_direction_r3m_vs_p3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS national_total_market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS national_total_market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                (
                    (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                    -
                    (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
                ) * 100
            , 1),
            '%'
        ) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) > (
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) < (
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'In Line with Nation'
        END AS performance_vs_nation_r3m_vs_p3m
    FROM tier_region_period_agg_cte tr
    CROSS JOIN national_period_agg_cte np
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    campus_region,
    campus_tier,
    r3m_start_date,
    r3m_end_date,
    p3m_start_date,
    p3m_end_date,
    relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    total_market_total_sls_r3m,
    relmora_share_r3m,
    relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    total_market_total_sls_p3m,
    relmora_share_p3m,
    share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    share_direction_r3m_vs_p3m,
    national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    national_total_market_total_sls_r3m,
    national_relmora_share_r3m,
    national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    national_zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    national_total_market_total_sls_p3m,
    national_relmora_share_p3m,
    national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    performance_vs_nation_r3m_vs_p3m
FROM share_metrics_cte
ORDER BY campus_region ASC, campus_tier ASC, share_change_r3m_vs_p3m DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS national_business_day_count_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
),
campus_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_account_name,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_account_name
),
national_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
),
ranked_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT
        w.r13w_start_date,
        w.r13w_end_date,
        c.campus_id,
        c.campus_account_name,
        c.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(c.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_day_count_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        ns.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nbd.national_business_day_count_r13w,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY c.relmora_total_mg_r13w DESC, c.campus_account_name ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM campus_sales_cte c
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_sales_cte ns
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
)
SELECT
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    campus_id,
    campus_account_name,
    relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    national_business_day_count_r13w
FROM ranked_campuses_cte
WHERE rn <= 10
ORDER BY relmora_total_mg_r13w DESC, campus_account_name ASC
LIMIT 10;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
anchor_month_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date) AS anchor_month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) AS anchor_month_end_date,
        TO_CHAR(m.max_week_end_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS anchor_month_year,
        m.max_week_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
trailing_12_months_cte AS (
    SELECT
        TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -seq.n, a.anchor_month_start_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -seq.n, a.anchor_month_start_date) AS month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -seq.n, a.anchor_month_start_date)) AS month_end_date
    FROM anchor_month_cte a
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL
        SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL
        SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11
    ) seq
),
monthly_period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        t.month_year,
        t.month_start_date,
        t.month_end_date,
        CASE WHEN a.max_week_end_date >= t.month_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_month_complete
    FROM trailing_12_months_cte t
    CROSS JOIN anchor_month_cte a
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        t.month_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS monthly_business_days
    FROM trailing_12_months_cte t
    LEFT JOIN data_867 d
        ON d.date BETWEEN t.month_start_date AND t.month_end_date
    GROUP BY
        t.month_year
),
monthly_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        t.month_year,
        COALESCE(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg), 0) AS mg_monthly_sales
    FROM trailing_12_months_cte t
    LEFT JOIN data_867 d
        ON d.month_year = t.month_year
    GROUP BY
        t.month_year
),
monthly_daily_average_cte AS (
    SELECT
        s.month_year,
        s.mg_monthly_sales,
        b.monthly_business_days,
        CAST(ROUND(s.mg_monthly_sales / NULLIF(b.monthly_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly
    FROM monthly_sales_cte s
    JOIN national_business_days_cte b
        ON s.month_year = b.month_year
),
prior_month_mapping_cte AS (
    SELECT
        c.month_year,
        c.month_start_date,
        c.month_end_date,
        c.is_month_complete,
        p.month_year AS previous_month_year,
        p.month_start_date AS previous_month_start_date,
        p.month_end_date AS previous_month_end_date,
        p.is_month_complete AS previous_is_month_complete
    FROM monthly_period_completeness_cte c
    LEFT JOIN monthly_period_completeness_cte p
        ON p.month_start_date = DATEADD(MONTH, -1, c.month_start_date)
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pm.month_year,
        pm.month_start_date,
        pm.month_end_date,
        pm.previous_month_year,
        pm.previous_month_start_date,
        pm.previous_month_end_date,
        cur_bd.monthly_business_days,
        prev_bd.monthly_business_days AS previous_month_business_days,
        cur_avg.mg_monthly_sales,
        prev_avg.mg_monthly_sales AS mg_monthly_sales_previous_month,
        cur_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly,
        prev_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly AS mg_daily_avg_sales_previous_month,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                CASE
                    WHEN prev_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly = 0 AND cur_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN prev_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(
                        ((cur_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly - prev_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly) * 100.0)
                        / NULLIF(prev_avg.mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly, 0),
                        0
                    )
                END AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_daily_avg_growth_month,
        CASE
            WHEN pm.is_month_complete = 1 AND pm.previous_is_month_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    CAST(
                        CASE
                            WHEN prev_avg.mg_monthly_sales = 0 AND cur_avg.mg_monthly_sales > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN prev_avg.mg_monthly_sales = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ROUND(
                                ((cur_avg.mg_monthly_sales - prev_avg.mg_monthly_sales) * 100.0)
                                / NULLIF(prev_avg.mg_monthly_sales, 0),
                                0
                            )
                        END AS INTEGER
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS mg_total_growth_month
    FROM prior_month_mapping_cte pm
    LEFT JOIN monthly_daily_average_cte cur_avg
        ON pm.month_year = cur_avg.month_year
    LEFT JOIN monthly_daily_average_cte prev_avg
        ON pm.previous_month_year = prev_avg.month_year
    LEFT JOIN national_business_days_cte cur_bd
        ON pm.month_year = cur_bd.month_year
    LEFT JOIN national_business_days_cte prev_bd
        ON pm.previous_month_year = prev_bd.month_year
)
SELECT
    month_year,
    month_start_date,
    month_end_date,
    previous_month_year,
    previous_month_start_date,
    previous_month_end_date,
    monthly_business_days,
    previous_month_business_days,
    mg_monthly_sales,
    mg_monthly_sales_previous_month,
    mg_daily_avg_sales_monthly,
    mg_daily_avg_sales_previous_month,
    mg_daily_avg_growth_month,
    mg_total_growth_month
FROM growth_metrics_cte
ORDER BY month_year ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg,
        CAST(ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_average_sales_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_sales_mg,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales_mg,
    t.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte t
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT d.quarter_year AS current_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
      ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    LIMIT 1
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        cq.current_quarter_label,
        DATE_FROM_PARTS(
            CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4) AS INTEGER),
            ((CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1,
            1
        ) AS current_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            DATEADD(
                QUARTER,
                1,
                DATE_FROM_PARTS(
                    CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4) AS INTEGER),
                    ((CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1,
                    1
                )
            )
        ) AS current_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(
            TO_VARCHAR(YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_FROM_PARTS(
                CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4) AS INTEGER),
                ((CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1,
                1
            )))),
            '-Q',
            TO_VARCHAR(QUARTER(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_FROM_PARTS(
                CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4) AS INTEGER),
                ((CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1,
                1
            ))))
        ) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATEADD(
            QUARTER,
            -1,
            DATE_FROM_PARTS(
                CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4) AS INTEGER),
                ((CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1,
                1
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            DATE_FROM_PARTS(
                CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4) AS INTEGER),
                ((CAST(SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1,
                1
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM current_quarter_cte cq
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.current_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
current_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_current_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.current_quarter_start_date AND qb.current_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.previous_quarter_start_date AND qb.previous_quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    qc.current_quarter_label,
    qc.current_quarter_start_date,
    qc.current_quarter_end_date,
    qc.current_quarter_is_complete,
    cqm.business_days_current_quarter,
    cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter,
    CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_relmora_mg_current_quarter,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    pqm.business_days_previous_quarter,
    pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter,
    CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_relmora_mg_previous_quarter,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (
                        CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        -
                        CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                    ) * 100.0
                ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS growth_daily_average_relmora_mg_current_quarter_vs_previous_quarter,
    CASE
        WHEN qc.current_quarter_is_complete = 1 AND qc.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1 THEN
            CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter = 0
                             AND cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter = 0
                             AND cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE (
                            (cqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter - pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter) * 100.0
                        ) / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_previous_quarter, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
    END AS growth_quarterly_relmora_total_mg_current_quarter_vs_previous_quarter
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN current_quarter_metrics_cte cqm
CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg,
        CAST(
            ROUND(
                SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0),
                0
            ) AS INTEGER
        ) AS weekly_daily_average_sales_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
      ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
total_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
      ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_sales_mg,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales_mg,
    tr.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN total_r13w_cte tr
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS r13w_week_start_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_week_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= pb.r13w_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= pb.p13w_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.r13w_week_start_date AND pc.r13w_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.p13w_week_start_date AND pc.p13w_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
),
regional_sales_summary_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_sales_summary_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        rs.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        ns.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        ns.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(rs.mg_total_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(ROUND(rs.mg_total_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CAST(ROUND(ns.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(ns.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM regional_sales_summary_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN national_sales_summary_cte ns
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        dam.*,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte dam
),
regional_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        gm.campus_region,
        gm.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        gm.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        gm.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        gm.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND(gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND(gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value,
        CASE
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > 0 THEN 'Growing'
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS region_growth_status,
        CASE
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < gm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
    FROM growth_metrics_cte gm
)
SELECT
    rc.campus_region,
    pc.p13w_week_start_date AS p13w_start_date,
    pc.p13w_week_end_date AS p13w_end_date,
    nb.p13w_business_days,
    pc.r13w_week_start_date AS r13w_start_date,
    pc.r13w_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
    nb.r13w_business_days,
    rc.mg_total_sales_p13w,
    rc.mg_total_sales_r13w,
    rc.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
    rc.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
    rc.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rc.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rc.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
    rc.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
    rc.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rc.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    rc.region_growth_status,
    rc.region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
FROM regional_classification_cte rc
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
ORDER BY rc.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value DESC, rc.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_relmora_total_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        CAST(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_relmora_total_mg,
    wt.weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    rt.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte rt
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

weekly_trend_cte AS (

)

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(YEAR(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)), '-Q', QUARTER(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
prior_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date)), '-Q', QUARTER(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date))) AS prior_quarter_label
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_prior_quarter_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
),
recent_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
),
prior_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
),
quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        r.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter,
        p.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(r.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(r.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(p.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter
    FROM recent_quarter_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_sales_cte p
)
SELECT
    r.recent_quarter_label AS recent_quarter_label,
    r.recent_quarter_start_date AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    r.recent_quarter_end_date AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    p.prior_quarter_label AS prior_quarter_label,
    p.prior_quarter_start_date AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    p.prior_quarter_end_date AS prior_quarter_end_date,
    c.is_recent_quarter_complete AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
    c.is_prior_quarter_complete AS is_prior_quarter_complete,
    q.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter,
    q.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter,
    q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
    q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
    q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter,
    q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter,
    CASE
        WHEN c.is_recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND c.is_prior_quarter_complete = 1 THEN
            CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter = 0 AND q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter = 0 AND q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter - q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(q.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        ELSE NULL
    END AS quarterly_relmora_total_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter = 0 AND q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter = 0 AND q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE ((q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter - q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(q.quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter, 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS quarterly_relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte c
CROSS JOIN quarter_metrics_cte q
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(
            TO_VARCHAR(YEAR(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))),
            '-Q',
            TO_VARCHAR(QUARTER(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)))
        ) AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
prior_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(
            TO_VARCHAR(YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date))),
            '-Q',
            TO_VARCHAR(QUARTER(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date)))
        ) AS prior_quarter_label
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_prior_quarter_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
),
recent_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
),
prior_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
),
quarter_growth_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        rqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
        pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        pqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS growth_quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
    FROM recent_quarter_metrics_cte rqm
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
)
SELECT
    r.recent_quarter_label AS recent_quarter_label,
    r.recent_quarter_start_date AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    r.recent_quarter_end_date AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    p.prior_quarter_label AS prior_quarter_label,
    p.prior_quarter_start_date AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    p.prior_quarter_end_date AS prior_quarter_end_date,
    qc.is_recent_quarter_complete AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
    qc.is_prior_quarter_complete AS is_prior_quarter_complete,
    qg.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
    qg.quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_recent_quarter,
    qg.quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
    qg.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
    qg.quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_business_days_prior_quarter,
    qg.quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
    qg.growth_quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter AS growth_quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN quarter_growth_cte qg
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg,
        CAST(ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_average_sales_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
      ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
      ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_sales_mg,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales_mg,
    rt.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte rt
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(TO_VARCHAR(YEAR(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))), '-Q', TO_VARCHAR(QUARTER(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)))) AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
prior_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(TO_VARCHAR(YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date))), '-Q', TO_VARCHAR(QUARTER(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date)))) AS prior_quarter_label
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_prior_quarter_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
),
recent_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
),
prior_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_prior_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
),
quarter_growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        rqm.business_days_recent_quarter,
        pqm.business_days_prior_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(ROUND(rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(ROUND(pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter = 0 AND rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter = 0 AND rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((rqm.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter - pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(pqm.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
    FROM recent_quarter_metrics_cte rqm
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
)
SELECT
    r.recent_quarter_label AS recent_quarter_label,
    r.recent_quarter_start_date AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    r.recent_quarter_end_date AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    qc.is_recent_quarter_complete AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
    qg.business_days_recent_quarter AS business_days_recent_quarter,
    qg.relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter AS relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
    qg.relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_quarter,
    p.prior_quarter_label AS prior_quarter_label,
    p.prior_quarter_start_date AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    p.prior_quarter_end_date AS prior_quarter_end_date,
    qc.is_prior_quarter_complete AS is_prior_quarter_complete,
    qg.business_days_prior_quarter AS business_days_prior_quarter,
    qg.relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter AS relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
    qg.relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_prior_quarter,
    CASE
        WHEN qc.is_recent_quarter_complete = 1 AND qc.is_prior_quarter_complete = 1
        THEN qg.relmora_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
        ELSE NULL
    END AS relmora_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter,
    qg.relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN quarter_growth_metrics_cte qg
LIMIT 1;

question: How are sales trending?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg,
        CAST(
            ROUND(
                SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0),
                0
            ) AS INTEGER
        ) AS weekly_daily_average_sales_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
total_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_sales_mg,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales_mg,
    tr.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN total_r13w_cte tr
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT d.quarter_year AS current_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
      ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    LIMIT 1
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        cq.current_quarter_label,
        TO_DATE(
            CONCAT(
                SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                '-',
                LPAD((((SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                '-01'
            )
        ) AS current_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            DATEADD(
                MONTH,
                3,
                TO_DATE(
                    CONCAT(
                        SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                        '-',
                        LPAD((((SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                        '-01'
                    )
                )
            )
        ) AS current_quarter_end_date,
        DATEADD(
            MONTH,
            -3,
            TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM current_quarter_cte cq
),
quarter_labels_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.current_quarter_label,
        CONCAT(
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM qb.previous_quarter_start_date)::VARCHAR,
            '-Q',
            EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM qb.previous_quarter_start_date)::VARCHAR
        ) AS previous_quarter_label,
        qb.current_quarter_start_date,
        qb.current_quarter_end_date,
        qb.previous_quarter_start_date,
        qb.previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        ql.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= ql.current_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= ql.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_labels_cte ql
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
current_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_current_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_labels_cte ql
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (ql.current_quarter_label, ql.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN ql.current_quarter_start_date AND ql.current_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_labels_cte ql
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (ql.current_quarter_label, ql.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN ql.previous_quarter_start_date AND ql.previous_quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    qc.current_quarter_label,
    qc.current_quarter_start_date,
    qc.current_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.current_quarter_is_complete,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter,
    pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter,
    cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    (cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0))::INTEGER AS daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0))::INTEGER AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CASE
        WHEN qc.current_quarter_is_complete = 1 AND qc.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1 THEN
            CASE
                WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
                WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
                ELSE CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        ((cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg - pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0)
                        / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0),
                        0
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            END
        ELSE NULL
    END AS quarterly_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0)) = 0
                     AND (cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0)) > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0)) = 0
                     AND (cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (
                        (cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0))
                        -
                        (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0))
                    ) * 100.0
                ) / NULLIF((pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0)), 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN current_quarter_metrics_cte cqm
CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
LIMIT 1;

- The SQL derives `previous_quarter_label` in an invalid format: it builds values like `2025-Q1`, but `current_quarter_label` parsing assumes the schema format is `YYYY-Qn` and later extracts the quarter number using `SUBSTR(cq.current_quarter_label, 7, 1)`, which on a value like `2025-Q1` returns `Q` instead of the quarter digit. Casting `Q` to INTEGER is invalid Snowflake SQL execution logic.
- Because of the incorrect quarter string parsing, the quarter boundary derivation in `quarter_boundaries_cte` is invalid and will fail for schema-valid quarter labels such as `2025-Q1`.
- The query violates the stated validation rule for incomplete quarters: if either quarter is incomplete, `quarterly_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg` must be omitted from the output schema, but this SQL always includes that column and only returns NULL conditionally.

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT d.quarter_year AS current_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
      ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    LIMIT 1
),
quarter_parts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        current_quarter_label,
        CAST(SPLIT_PART(current_quarter_label, '-', 1) AS INTEGER) AS current_quarter_year_number,
        CAST(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(current_quarter_label, '-', 2), 'Q', '') AS INTEGER) AS current_quarter_number
    FROM current_quarter_cte
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qp.current_quarter_label,
        DATE_FROM_PARTS(qp.current_quarter_year_number, ((qp.current_quarter_number - 1) * 3) + 1, 1) AS current_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, 3, DATE_FROM_PARTS(qp.current_quarter_year_number, ((qp.current_quarter_number - 1) * 3) + 1, 1))) AS current_quarter_end_date,
        CASE
            WHEN qp.current_quarter_number = 1 THEN qp.current_quarter_year_number - 1
            ELSE qp.current_quarter_year_number
        END AS previous_quarter_year_number,
        CASE
            WHEN qp.current_quarter_number = 1 THEN 4
            ELSE qp.current_quarter_number - 1
        END AS previous_quarter_number
    FROM quarter_parts_cte qp
),
quarter_boundaries_labeled_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.current_quarter_label,
        qb.current_quarter_start_date,
        qb.current_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(qb.previous_quarter_year_number, '-Q', qb.previous_quarter_number) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATE_FROM_PARTS(qb.previous_quarter_year_number, ((qb.previous_quarter_number - 1) * 3) + 1, 1) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, 3, DATE_FROM_PARTS(qb.previous_quarter_year_number, ((qb.previous_quarter_number - 1) * 3) + 1, 1))) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qbl.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qbl.current_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qbl.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_labeled_cte qbl
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
current_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_current_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_labeled_cte qbl
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qbl.current_quarter_label, qbl.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qbl.current_quarter_start_date AND qbl.current_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_labeled_cte qbl
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qbl.current_quarter_label, qbl.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qbl.previous_quarter_start_date AND qbl.previous_quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    qc.current_quarter_label,
    qc.current_quarter_start_date,
    qc.current_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.current_quarter_is_complete,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter,
    pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter,
    cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (
                        CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_day_count_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        -
                        CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                    ) * 100.0
                ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN current_quarter_metrics_cte cqm
CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        CAST(ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_average_sales_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_sales_mg,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales_mg,
    w.r13w_start_date,
    w.r13w_end_date,
    t.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte t
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
recent_quarter_label_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.quarter_year AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.date DESC) = 1
),
prior_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
),
prior_quarter_label_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.quarter_year AS prior_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.date DESC) = 1
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_prior_quarter_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
),
recent_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_label_cte rl
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
      AND d.quarter_year = rl.recent_quarter_label
),
prior_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_prior_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_label_cte pl
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
      AND d.quarter_year = pl.prior_quarter_label
),
quarter_growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.business_days_recent_quarter,
        p.business_days_prior_quarter,
        r.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(r.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(r.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(p.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(p.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                             AND CAST(ROUND(r.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(r.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0
                            THEN 100
                        WHEN CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(p.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                             AND CAST(ROUND(r.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(r.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                            THEN 0
                        ELSE (
                            (
                                CAST(ROUND(r.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(r.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) -
                                CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(p.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                            ) * 100.0
                        ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(p.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ) AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS quarterly_daily_avg_growth_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
    FROM recent_quarter_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_sales_cte p
)
SELECT
    rl.recent_quarter_label AS recent_quarter_label,
    r.recent_quarter_start_date AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    r.recent_quarter_end_date AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    pl.prior_quarter_label AS prior_quarter_label,
    p.prior_quarter_start_date AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    p.prior_quarter_end_date AS prior_quarter_end_date,
    qc.is_recent_quarter_complete AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
    qc.is_prior_quarter_complete AS is_prior_quarter_complete,
    g.business_days_recent_quarter AS business_days_recent_quarter,
    g.business_days_prior_quarter AS business_days_prior_quarter,
    g.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
    g.quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
    g.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
    g.quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
    g.quarterly_daily_avg_growth_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter AS quarterly_daily_avg_growth_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_label_cte rl
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_label_cte pl
CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN quarter_growth_metrics_cte g
LIMIT 1;

question: How are sales trending?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_relmora_total_mg,
        CAST(
            SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0)
            AS INTEGER
        ) AS weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_relmora_total_mg,
    wt.weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg,
    tr.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte tr
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;
