WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
recent_quarter_label_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.recent_quarter_start_date,
        r.recent_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM r.recent_quarter_start_date), '-Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM r.recent_quarter_start_date)) AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
),
prior_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
),
prior_quarter_label_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.prior_quarter_start_date,
        p.prior_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.prior_quarter_start_date), '-Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM p.prior_quarter_start_date)) AS prior_quarter_label
    FROM prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_prior_quarter_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
),
recent_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
),
prior_quarter_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_prior_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
),
quarter_performance_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        pqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        rqs.business_days_recent_quarter,
        pqs.business_days_prior_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(rqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqs.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(pqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqs.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqs.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqs.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqs.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqs.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(ROUND(rqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqs.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(ROUND(pqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqs.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqs.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqs.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS growth_daily_average_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
    FROM recent_quarter_sales_cte rqs
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_sales_cte pqs
)
SELECT
    rql.recent_quarter_label AS recent_quarter_label,
    rql.recent_quarter_start_date AS recent_quarter_start_date,
    rql.recent_quarter_end_date AS recent_quarter_end_date,
    pql.prior_quarter_label AS prior_quarter_label,
    pql.prior_quarter_start_date AS prior_quarter_start_date,
    pql.prior_quarter_end_date AS prior_quarter_end_date,
    qc.is_recent_quarter_complete AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
    qc.is_prior_quarter_complete AS is_prior_quarter_complete,
    qpm.business_days_recent_quarter AS business_days_recent_quarter,
    qpm.business_days_prior_quarter AS business_days_prior_quarter,
    qpm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
    qpm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
    qpm.daily_average_relmora_mg_recent_quarter AS daily_average_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
    qpm.daily_average_relmora_mg_prior_quarter AS daily_average_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
    qpm.growth_daily_average_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter AS growth_daily_average_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
FROM recent_quarter_label_cte rql
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_label_cte pql
CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN quarter_performance_metrics_cte qpm
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.quarter_year AS current_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
        ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    LIMIT 1
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        cq.current_quarter_label,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS current_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(
            TO_VARCHAR(YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)))),
            '-Q',
            TO_VARCHAR(QUARTER(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))))
        ) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM current_quarter_cte cq
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.current_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
current_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_current_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.current_quarter_start_date AND qb.current_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.previous_quarter_start_date AND qb.previous_quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    qc.current_quarter_label,
    qc.current_quarter_start_date,
    qc.current_quarter_end_date,
    qc.current_quarter_is_complete,
    cqm.business_days_current_quarter,
    cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    pqm.business_days_previous_quarter,
    pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CASE
        WHEN qc.current_quarter_is_complete = 1 AND qc.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1 THEN
            CONCAT(
                CAST(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg - pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0)
                        END,
                        0
                    ) AS INTEGER
                ),
                '%'
            )
    END AS quarterly_sales_growth_current_vs_previous,
    CONCAT(
        CAST(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0)) = 0
                         AND (cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0)) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0)) = 0
                         AND (cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            (cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0))
                            - (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0))
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF((pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0)), 0)
                END,
                0
            ) AS INTEGER
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_current_vs_previous
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN current_quarter_metrics_cte cqm
CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
LIMIT 1;

REJECT
FEEDBACK:
The derived previous_quarter_label format is inconsistent with the schema/query convention for quarter_year. The schema examples and current_quarter_label use values like 2025-Q1, but the query constructs the previous label as YYYY-QN (for example, 2025-Q1). This mismatch can cause the previous quarter filter on d.quarter_year to fail.
The query violates the stated output rule for incomplete quarters: quarterly_sales_growth_current_vs_previous is still present in the output schema even when either quarter is incomplete, whereas the requirement says this column must be completely omitted from the output schema in that case.

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.max_week_end_date), '-Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM m.max_week_end_date)) AS current_quarter_label,
        m.max_week_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        c.current_quarter_label,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date))) AS current_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date))),
            '-Q',
            EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date)))
        ) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM current_quarter_cte c
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.current_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
current_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_current_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.current_quarter_start_date AND qb.current_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.previous_quarter_start_date AND qb.previous_quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    qc.current_quarter_label,
    qc.current_quarter_start_date,
    qc.current_quarter_end_date,
    qc.current_quarter_is_complete,
    cqm.business_days_current_quarter,
    cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    pqm.business_days_previous_quarter,
    pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (
                        CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        - CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                    ) * 100.0
                ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_current_vs_previous
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN current_quarter_metrics_cte cqm
CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales,
        CAST(ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_average_sales
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
total_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_sales,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales,
    tr.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN total_r13w_cte tr
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(YEAR(m.max_week_end_date), '-Q', DATE_PART(QUARTER, m.max_week_end_date)) AS recent_quarter_label,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.recent_quarter_label,
        r.recent_quarter_start_date,
        r.recent_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date)), '-Q', DATE_PART(QUARTER, DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date))) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM recent_quarter_cte r
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        q.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= q.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= q.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte q
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
recent_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte q
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (q.recent_quarter_label, q.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN q.recent_quarter_start_date AND q.recent_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte q
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (q.recent_quarter_label, q.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN q.previous_quarter_start_date AND q.previous_quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    qc.recent_quarter_label,
    qc.recent_quarter_start_date,
    qc.recent_quarter_end_date,
    qc.recent_quarter_is_complete,
    rqm.business_days_recent_quarter,
    rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter,
    CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_mg_recent_quarter,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    pqm.business_days_previous_quarter,
    pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter,
    CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_mg_previous_quarter,
    CASE
        WHEN qc.recent_quarter_is_complete = 1 AND qc.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1 THEN
            CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter = 0 AND rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter = 0 AND rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter - pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
    END AS growth_quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (
                        CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        - CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                    ) * 100.0
                ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_mg_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS growth_daily_average_sales_mg_recent_quarter_vs_previous_quarter
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_metrics_cte rqm
CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
LIMIT 1;

r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_weekly_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        n.weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS mg_weekly_sales,
        CAST(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(n.weekly_business_day_count, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_weekly_daily_average_sales
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    JOIN national_weekly_business_days_cte n
        ON d.week_end_date = n.week_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.week_end_date,
        n.weekly_business_day_count
),
total_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS mg_total_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)

    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.mg_weekly_sales,
    wt.mg_weekly_daily_average_sales,
    tr.mg_total_sales_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN total_r13w_cte tr
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        max_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -90, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -181, max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -91, max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days_national,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days_national
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date
),
state_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_state,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_state
),
national_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date
),
growth_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        s.campus_state,
        s.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        s.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN s.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND s.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN s.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((s.relmora_total_mg_r13w - s.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(s.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
                >=
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days_national, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            THEN 'Higher'
            ELSE 'Lower'
        END AS state_vs_nation_daily_avg_growth_performance
    FROM state_period_agg_cte s
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_agg_cte np
),
ranking_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.*,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY g.relmora_total_mg_r13w DESC) AS rank_r13w
    FROM growth_comparison_cte g
)
SELECT
    r.rank_r13w,
    r.campus_state,
    pb.r13w_start_date,
    pb.r13w_end_date,
    pb.p13w_start_date,
    pb.p13w_end_date,
    nbd.r13w_business_days_national,
    nbd.p13w_business_days_national,
    r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    r.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    r.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    r.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    r.relmora_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
    r.relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
    r.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    r.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    r.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    r.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    r.national_relmora_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
    r.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_mg_r13w_vs_p13w,
    r.state_vs_nation_daily_avg_growth_performance
FROM ranking_cte r
CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
ORDER BY
    r.rank_r13w ASC,
    r.relmora_total_mg_r13w DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_business_days_by_week_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count_national
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
state_weekly_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_state,
        d.week_end_date,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_relmora_total_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_state, d.week_end_date
),
state_r13w_totals_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_state,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w_state
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_state
),
final_state_weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        s.campus_state,
        n.week_start_date,
        s.week_end_date,
        s.weekly_relmora_total_mg,
        CAST(s.weekly_relmora_total_mg / NULLIF(n.weekly_business_day_count_national, 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg,
        n.weekly_business_day_count_national,
        t.total_mg_r13w_state
    FROM state_weekly_sales_cte s
    JOIN national_business_days_by_week_cte n
        ON s.week_end_date = n.week_end_date
    JOIN state_r13w_totals_cte t
        ON s.campus_state = t.campus_state
)
SELECT
    campus_state,
    week_start_date,
    week_end_date,
    weekly_relmora_total_mg,
    weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg,
    weekly_business_day_count_national,
    total_mg_r13w_state
FROM final_state_weekly_trend_cte
ORDER BY campus_state ASC, week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        CAST(ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_average_sales
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
total_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_sales,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    tr.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN total_r13w_cte tr
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_52_weeks_cte AS (
    SELECT d.*
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    WHERE d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
      AND d.week_end_date >= DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date)
),
weekly_national_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_business_day = 1 THEN date END) AS weekly_business_days,
        SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg
    FROM recent_52_weeks_cte
    GROUP BY week_end_date
),
weekly_daily_average_cte AS (
    SELECT
        week_start_date,
        week_end_date,
        weekly_business_days,
        weekly_sales_mg,
        CAST(weekly_sales_mg / NULLIF(weekly_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg
    FROM weekly_national_sales_cte
),
weekly_growth_cte AS (
    SELECT
        week_start_date,
        week_end_date,
        weekly_business_days,
        weekly_sales_mg,
        weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg,
        LAG(weekly_sales_mg) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS prev_weekly_sales_mg,
        LAG(weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg) OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date) AS prev_weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg
    FROM weekly_daily_average_cte
)
SELECT
    week_start_date,
    week_end_date,
    weekly_business_days,
    weekly_sales_mg,
    weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN prev_weekly_sales_mg = 0 AND weekly_sales_mg > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN prev_weekly_sales_mg = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE ((weekly_sales_mg - prev_weekly_sales_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(prev_weekly_sales_mg, 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS weekly_total_growth_mg,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN prev_weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg = 0 AND weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN prev_weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE ((weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg - prev_weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(prev_weekly_daily_avg_sales_mg, 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS weekly_daily_avg_growth_mg
FROM weekly_growth_cte
ORDER BY week_end_date ASC;

      "use of relmora_total_mg for relmora sales trend analysis"
    ],
    "differences_from_examples": [
      "Used monthly granularity instead of weekly granularity because the request asks about evolution over the past year.",
      "Added R12M versus P12M performance comparison because the user explicitly asks about performance, which requires growth versus the previous comparable period.",
      "Extended the rolling window to 104 weeks to support both recent 12 months and prior 12 months comparison."
    ]
  }
}

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
rolling_year_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r12m_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date) AS r12m_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -51, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p12m_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -103, m.max_week_end_date) AS p12m_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.r12m_start_date,
        p.r12m_end_date,
        p.p12m_start_date,
        p.p12m_end_date,
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(YEAR, 1, p.r12m_start_date)) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(YEAR, 1, p.p12m_start_date)) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM rolling_year_periods_cte p
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.r12m_start_date,
        p.r12m_end_date,
        p.p12m_start_date,
        p.p12m_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN p.r12m_start_date AND p.r12m_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r12m_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN p.p12m_start_date AND p.p12m_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p12m_business_days
    FROM rolling_year_periods_cte p
    JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.week_end_date >= p.p12m_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= p.r12m_end_date
    GROUP BY
        p.r12m_start_date,
        p.r12m_end_date,
        p.p12m_start_date,
        p.p12m_end_date
),
monthly_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.month_year,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', d.date) AS month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(d.date) AS month_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS monthly_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN rolling_year_periods_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date >= p.r12m_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= p.r12m_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.month_year,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', d.date),
        LAST_DAY(d.date)
),
monthly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.month_year,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', d.date) AS month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(d.date) AS month_end_date,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS monthly_sales
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN rolling_year_periods_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date >= p.r12m_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= p.r12m_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.month_year,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', d.date),
        LAST_DAY(d.date)
),
rolling_year_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN p.r12m_start_date AND p.r12m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r12m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN p.p12m_start_date AND p.p12m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p12m
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN rolling_year_periods_cte p
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= p.p12m_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= p.r12m_end_date
),
rolling_year_daily_avg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(ROUND(s.mg_total_sales_r12m / NULLIF(b.r12m_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r12m,
        CAST(ROUND(s.mg_total_sales_p12m / NULLIF(b.p12m_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p12m
    FROM rolling_year_sales_cte s
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte b
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                CASE
                    WHEN r.mg_daily_avg_sales_p12m = 0 AND r.mg_daily_avg_sales_r12m > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN r.mg_daily_avg_sales_p12m = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((r.mg_daily_avg_sales_r12m - r.mg_daily_avg_sales_p12m) * 100.0) / NULLIF(r.mg_daily_avg_sales_p12m, 0), 0)
                END AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_daily_avg_growth_12m
    FROM rolling_year_daily_avg_cte r
)
SELECT
    p.r12m_start_date,
    p.r12m_end_date,
    p.p12m_start_date,
    p.p12m_end_date,
    b.r12m_business_days,
    b.p12m_business_days,
    s.mg_total_sales_r12m,
    s.mg_total_sales_p12m,
    r.mg_daily_avg_sales_r12m,
    r.mg_daily_avg_sales_p12m,
    g.mg_daily_avg_growth_12m,
    mt.month_year,
    mt.month_start_date,
    mt.month_end_date,
    mb.monthly_business_days,
    mt.monthly_sales,
    CAST(ROUND(mt.monthly_sales / NULLIF(mb.monthly_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS monthly_daily_average_sales
FROM monthly_trend_cte mt
JOIN monthly_business_days_cte mb
  ON mt.month_year = mb.month_year
 AND mt.month_start_date = mb.month_start_date
 AND mt.month_end_date = mb.month_end_date
CROSS JOIN rolling_year_periods_cte p
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte b
CROSS JOIN rolling_year_sales_cte s
CROSS JOIN rolling_year_daily_avg_cte r
CROSS JOIN growth_metrics_cte g
JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
  ON p.r12m_start_date = pc.r12m_start_date
 AND p.r12m_end_date = pc.r12m_end_date
 AND p.p12m_start_date = pc.p12m_start_date
 AND p.p12m_end_date = pc.p12m_end_date
WHERE mt.month_end_date <= p.r12m_end_date
  AND mt.month_end_date >= DATEADD(MONTH, -11, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', p.r12m_end_date))
ORDER BY mt.month_year ASC;

),
r13w_window_cte AS (

        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales_mg,
        CAST(
            ROUND(
                SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0),
                0
            ) AS INTEGER
        ) AS weekly_daily_average_sales_mg
    FROM data_867 d

        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
total_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w

       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)

    wt.weekly_business_day_count,

    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales_mg,
    tr.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN total_r13w_cte tr

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS previous_week_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.p13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days_nation,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < cp.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
p13w_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id, d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.p13w_end_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
new_accounts_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT p.campus_id, p.campus_region_id, p.campus_region
    FROM p13w_active_campuses_cte p
    LEFT JOIN pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte h
      ON p.campus_id = h.campus_id
    WHERE h.campus_id IS NULL
),
pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < cp.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
r13w_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id, d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
new_accounts_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT r.campus_id, r.campus_region_id, r.campus_region
    FROM r13w_active_campuses_cte r
    LEFT JOIN pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte h
      ON r.campus_id = h.campus_id
    WHERE h.campus_id IS NULL
),
region_keys_cte AS (
    SELECT campus_region_id, campus_region FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte
    UNION
    SELECT campus_region_id, campus_region FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte
),
region_new_accounts_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        k.campus_region_id,
        k.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.campus_id) AS new_accounts_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.campus_id) AS new_accounts_r13w,
        CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT p.campus_id) / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w,
        CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT r.campus_id) / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w
    FROM region_keys_cte k
    LEFT JOIN new_accounts_p13w_cte p
      ON k.campus_region_id = p.campus_region_id
    LEFT JOIN new_accounts_r13w_cte r
      ON k.campus_region_id = r.campus_region_id
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
    GROUP BY
        k.campus_region_id,
        k.campus_region,
        nb.p13w_business_days_nation,
        nb.r13w_business_days_nation
),
nation_new_accounts_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte) AS new_accounts_p13w_nation,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte) AS new_accounts_r13w_nation,
        CAST((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte) / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation,
        CAST((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte) / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days_nation, 0) AS INTEGER) AS new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation
    FROM national_business_days_cte nb
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.r13w_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.p13w_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
final_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        cp.p13w_start_date,
        cp.p13w_end_date,
        cp.r13w_start_date,
        cp.r13w_end_date,
        nb.p13w_business_days_nation,
        nb.r13w_business_days_nation,
        r.new_accounts_p13w,
        r.new_accounts_r13w,
        r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w,
        r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w = 0 AND r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w = 0 AND r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w - r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w) * 100) / NULLIF(r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        n.new_accounts_p13w_nation,
        n.new_accounts_r13w_nation,
        n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation,
        n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation - n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation) * 100) / NULLIF(n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN
                CASE
                    WHEN r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w = 0 AND r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w = 0 AND r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w - r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w) * 100) / NULLIF(r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w, 0)
                END
                >
                CASE
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation - n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation) * 100) / NULLIF(n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation, 0)
                END
            THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN
                CASE
                    WHEN r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w = 0 AND r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w = 0 AND r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((r.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w - r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w) * 100) / NULLIF(r.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w, 0)
                END
                <
                CASE
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((n.new_accounts_daily_avg_r13w_nation - n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation) * 100) / NULLIF(n.new_accounts_daily_avg_p13w_nation, 0)
                END
            THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_new_accounts_comparison_cte r
    CROSS JOIN nation_new_accounts_comparison_cte n
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    p13w_start_date,
    p13w_end_date,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
current_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(YEAR(m.max_week_end_date), '-Q', QUARTER(m.max_week_end_date)) AS current_quarter_label,
        m.max_week_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        c.current_quarter_label,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date) AS current_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date))) AS current_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, c.max_week_end_date)), '-Q', QUARTER(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, c.max_week_end_date))) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, c.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', c.max_week_end_date)) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM current_quarter_cte c
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.*,
        m.max_week_end_date,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.current_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS current_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
current_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_current_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.current_quarter_start_date AND qb.current_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.current_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.previous_quarter_start_date AND qb.previous_quarter_end_date
),
base_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qc.current_quarter_label,
        qc.current_quarter_start_date,
        qc.current_quarter_end_date,
        qc.current_quarter_is_complete,
        qc.previous_quarter_label,
        qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
        qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
        qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
        cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
        cqm.business_days_current_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(cqm.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg / NULLIF(cqm.business_days_current_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg,
        pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        pqm.business_days_previous_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg
    FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
    CROSS JOIN current_quarter_metrics_cte cqm
    CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
)
SELECT
    b.current_quarter_label,
    b.current_quarter_start_date,
    b.current_quarter_end_date,
    b.current_quarter_is_complete,
    b.previous_quarter_label,
    b.previous_quarter_start_date,
    b.previous_quarter_end_date,
    b.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    b.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    b.business_days_current_quarter,
    b.daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg,
    b.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    b.business_days_previous_quarter,
    b.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    CASE
        WHEN b.current_quarter_is_complete = 1 AND b.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1 THEN
            CASE
                WHEN b.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND b.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
                WHEN b.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND b.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg = 0 THEN CONCAT(0, '%')
                ELSE CONCAT(
                    CAST(ROUND(((b.quarterly_sales_current_quarter_mg - b.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(b.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0), 0) AS INTEGER),
                    '%'
                )
            END
        ELSE NULL
    END AS growth_quarterly_sales_current_quarter_vs_previous_quarter_pct,
    CASE
        WHEN b.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND b.daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
        WHEN b.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND b.daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg = 0 THEN CONCAT(0, '%')
        ELSE CONCAT(
            CAST(ROUND(((b.daily_average_sales_current_quarter_mg - b.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(b.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0), 0) AS INTEGER),
            '%'
        )
    END AS growth_daily_average_sales_current_quarter_vs_previous_quarter_pct
FROM base_metrics_cte b
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_month_period_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_month_end_date,
        TO_CHAR(m.max_week_end_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS recent_month_year
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
previous_month_period_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.max_week_end_date,
        r.recent_month_start_date,
        r.recent_month_end_date,
        r.recent_month_year,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -1, r.recent_month_start_date) AS previous_month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, r.recent_month_start_date)) AS previous_month_end_date,
        TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, r.recent_month_start_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS previous_month_year
    FROM recent_month_period_cte r
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.*,
        CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.recent_month_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_month_complete,
        CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.previous_month_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_month_complete
    FROM previous_month_period_cte p
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pc.recent_month_start_date,
        pc.recent_month_end_date,
        pc.previous_month_start_date,
        pc.previous_month_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.recent_month_start_date AND pc.recent_month_end_date THEN d.date END) AS monthly_relmora_business_days_recent_month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.previous_month_start_date AND pc.previous_month_end_date THEN d.date END) AS monthly_relmora_business_days_previous_month
    FROM period_completeness_cte pc
    JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.month_year IN (pc.recent_month_year, pc.previous_month_year)
    GROUP BY
        pc.recent_month_start_date,
        pc.recent_month_end_date,
        pc.previous_month_start_date,
        pc.previous_month_end_date
),
national_month_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.month_year = pc.recent_month_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS monthly_relmora_total_mg_recent_month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.month_year = pc.previous_month_year THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS monthly_relmora_total_mg_previous_month
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
      ON d.month_year IN (pc.recent_month_year, pc.previous_month_year)
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nms.monthly_relmora_total_mg_recent_month,
        nms.monthly_relmora_total_mg_previous_month,
        nbd.monthly_relmora_business_days_recent_month,
        nbd.monthly_relmora_business_days_previous_month,
        CAST(ROUND(nms.monthly_relmora_total_mg_recent_month / NULLIF(nbd.monthly_relmora_business_days_recent_month, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_month,
        CAST(ROUND(nms.monthly_relmora_total_mg_previous_month / NULLIF(nbd.monthly_relmora_business_days_previous_month, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_previous_month
    FROM national_month_sales_cte nms
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        dam.*,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN dam.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_previous_month = 0 AND dam.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_month > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN dam.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_previous_month = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((dam.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_month - dam.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_previous_month) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_previous_month, 0)
                    END
                , 0) AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS monthly_relmora_daily_avg_growth_month
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte dam
)
SELECT
    pc.recent_month_start_date,
    pc.recent_month_end_date,
    pc.previous_month_start_date,
    pc.previous_month_end_date,
    gm.monthly_relmora_total_mg_recent_month,
    gm.monthly_relmora_total_mg_previous_month,
    gm.monthly_relmora_business_days_recent_month,
    gm.monthly_relmora_business_days_previous_month,
    gm.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_recent_month,
    gm.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_mg_previous_month,
    gm.monthly_relmora_daily_avg_growth_month
FROM growth_metrics_cte gm
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -5, max_date)) AS period_start_date_p3m,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -3, max_date)) AS period_end_date_p3m,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, max_date)) AS period_start_date_r3m,
        LAST_DAY(max_date) AS period_end_date_r3m,
        max_date
    FROM max_date_cte
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_p3m AND pb.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_p3m AND pb.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_r3m AND pb.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_r3m AND pb.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.date <= pb.max_date
      AND d.date >= pb.period_start_date_p3m
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
region_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS market_total_sls_p3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0) AS relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0) AS relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
        - (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM region_period_agg_cte r
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_p3m AND pb.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_p3m AND pb.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_r3m AND pb.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pb.period_start_date_r3m AND pb.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.date <= pb.max_date
      AND d.date >= pb.period_start_date_p3m
),
nation_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0) AS national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0) AS national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0))
        - (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0)) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte n
),
final_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region_id,
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < 0 THEN 'Losing'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_trend,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_share_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN nation_share_cte ns
)
SELECT
    fc.campus_region_id,
    fc.campus_region,
    pb.period_start_date_p3m,
    pb.period_end_date_p3m,
    pb.period_start_date_r3m,
    pb.period_end_date_r3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.share_trend,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.performance_vs_nation
FROM final_classification_cte fc
CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
ORDER BY fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
region_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS national_active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        w.r13w_start_date,
        w.r13w_end_date,
        r.active_accounts_r13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND((r.active_accounts_r13w / NULLIF(n.national_active_accounts_r13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%') AS adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        n.national_active_accounts_r13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM region_active_accounts_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_active_accounts_cte n
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    active_accounts_r13w,
    adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
    relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    national_active_accounts_r13w,
    national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY
    active_accounts_r13w DESC,
    campus_region ASC;

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_relmora_total_mg,
        CAST(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_relmora_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_relmora_total_mg,
    wt.weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg,
    rt.total_relmora_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte rt
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(cd.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM calls_data cd
),
r13w_period_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS period_start_date_r13w,
        m.max_week_end_date AS period_end_date_r13w
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
reached_target_campuses_by_region_cte AS (
    SELECT
        tc.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cd.campus_id) AS reached_target_campuses_r13w
    FROM calls_data cd
    INNER JOIN target_campuses tc
        ON cd.campus_id = tc.campus_id
    CROSS JOIN r13w_period_cte p
    WHERE cd.metric_type = 'CALL'
      AND cd.week_end_date >= p.period_start_date_r13w
      AND cd.week_end_date <= p.period_end_date_r13w
    GROUP BY tc.campus_region
),
total_target_campuses_by_region_cte AS (
    SELECT
        tc.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tc.campus_id) AS total_target_campuses_r13w
    FROM target_campuses tc
    GROUP BY tc.campus_region
),
national_target_campuses_reached_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT cd.campus_id) AS national_reached_target_campuses_r13w
    FROM calls_data cd
    INNER JOIN target_campuses tc
        ON cd.campus_id = tc.campus_id
    CROSS JOIN r13w_period_cte p
    WHERE cd.metric_type = 'CALL'
      AND cd.week_end_date >= p.period_start_date_r13w
      AND cd.week_end_date <= p.period_end_date_r13w
),
national_target_campuses_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT tc.campus_id) AS national_total_target_campuses_r13w
    FROM target_campuses tc
)
SELECT
    tbr.campus_region,
    COALESCE(rbr.reached_target_campuses_r13w, 0) AS reached_target_campuses_r13w,
    tbr.total_target_campuses_r13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND((COALESCE(rbr.reached_target_campuses_r13w, 0) / NULLIF(tbr.total_target_campuses_r13w, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS reach_r13w,
    ntr.national_reached_target_campuses_r13w,
    ntt.national_total_target_campuses_r13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND((ntr.national_reached_target_campuses_r13w / NULLIF(ntt.national_total_target_campuses_r13w, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_reach_r13w,
    MAX(p.period_start_date_r13w) AS period_start_date_r13w,
    MAX(p.period_end_date_r13w) AS period_end_date_r13w
FROM total_target_campuses_by_region_cte tbr
LEFT JOIN reached_target_campuses_by_region_cte rbr
    ON tbr.campus_region = rbr.campus_region
CROSS JOIN national_target_campuses_reached_cte ntr
CROSS JOIN national_target_campuses_total_cte ntt
CROSS JOIN r13w_period_cte p
GROUP BY
    tbr.campus_region,
    rbr.reached_target_campuses_r13w,
    tbr.total_target_campuses_r13w,
    ntr.national_reached_target_campuses_r13w,
    ntt.national_total_target_campuses_r13w
ORDER BY
    reach_r13w DESC,
    tbr.campus_region ASC;

period_boundaries_cte AS (

        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,

),

    SELECT DISTINCT

        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date
),
pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d

    LEFT JOIN pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte p

),
p13w_active_campuses_cte AS (

pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (

    FROM data_867 d

),
new_accounts_p13w_cte AS (

        p.campus_region_id,
        p.campus_region
    FROM p13w_active_campuses_cte p
    LEFT JOIN pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte h

    WHERE h.campus_id IS NULL
),
regional_r13w AS (

regional_p13w AS (

),
regional_new_accounts_summary_cte AS (

            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((rs.new_accounts_r13w - rs.new_accounts_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rs.new_accounts_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)

    FROM regional_new_accounts_summary_cte rs

    pb.p13w_start_date,

    pb.r13w_start_date,

    CONCAT(gc.growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value, '%') AS growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w,

    CASE

        WHEN gc.growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value < gc.national_growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
        ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
    END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
FROM growth_comparison_cte gc
CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
ORDER BY gc.new_accounts_r13w DESC, gc.campus_region ASC;
