WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_week_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(((r.mg_volume_sales_r13w - r.mg_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w, 0), 0), '%')
        END AS mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (
                            CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0),
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(((nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w - nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w, 0), 0), '%')
        END AS mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(0, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (
                            CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0),
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rm.campus_region_id,
        rm.campus_region,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
    CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region_id,
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_end_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_end_week_end_date,
    nbd.p13w_business_days,
    nbd.r13w_business_days,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    pvn.performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
JOIN performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
    ON pvn.campus_region_id = rm.campus_region_id
   AND pvn.campus_region = rm.campus_region
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_week_end_date,
        (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_date
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AND (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AND (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w - rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w, 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w - nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w, 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region_id,
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_end_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_end_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_start_date,
    cp.p13w_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_date,
    cp.r13w_end_date,
    nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
    nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    CASE WHEN pc.is_recent_period_complete = 1 AND pc.is_previous_period_complete = 1 THEN rm.mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w END AS mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE WHEN pc.is_recent_period_complete = 1 AND pc.is_previous_period_complete = 1 THEN nm.mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w END AS mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC;

),
r13w_window_cte AS (

        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_sales,
        CAST(
            ROUND(
                SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0),
                0
            ) AS INTEGER
        ) AS weekly_daily_average_sales
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
total_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)

    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_sales,
    wt.weekly_daily_average_sales,
    tr.total_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN total_r13w_cte tr
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
),
region_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS national_active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        w.r13w_start_date,
        w.r13w_end_date,
        b.national_business_days_r13w,
        r.active_accounts_r13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND((r.active_accounts_r13w / NULLIF(n.national_active_accounts_r13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%') AS adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        n.national_active_accounts_r13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM region_active_accounts_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_active_accounts_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte b
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    national_business_days_r13w,
    active_accounts_r13w,
    adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
    relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    national_active_accounts_r13w,
    national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY
    active_accounts_r13w DESC,
    campus_region ASC;

),
comparison_periods_cte AS (

        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
r13w_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < cp.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
new_accounts_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_id,
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region
    FROM r13w_active_campuses_cte r
    LEFT JOIN pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte h
        ON r.campus_id = h.campus_id
    WHERE h.campus_id IS NULL
),
p13w_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.p13w_end_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < cp.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
new_accounts_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.campus_id,
        p.campus_region_id,
        p.campus_region
    FROM p13w_active_campuses_cte p
    LEFT JOIN pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte h
        ON p.campus_id = h.campus_id
    WHERE h.campus_id IS NULL
),
region_keys AS (
    SELECT campus_region_id, campus_region FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte
    UNION
    SELECT campus_region_id, campus_region FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte
),
region_new_accounts_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rk.campus_region_id,
        rk.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.campus_id) AS new_accounts_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.campus_id) AS new_accounts_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT p.campus_id) = 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT r.campus_id) > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT p.campus_id) = 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT r.campus_id) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((COUNT(DISTINCT r.campus_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT p.campus_id)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.campus_id), 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS region_growth_numeric
    FROM region_keys rk
    LEFT JOIN new_accounts_r13w_cte r
        ON rk.campus_region_id = r.campus_region_id
       AND rk.campus_region = r.campus_region
    LEFT JOIN new_accounts_p13w_cte p
        ON rk.campus_region_id = p.campus_region_id
       AND rk.campus_region = p.campus_region
    GROUP BY
        rk.campus_region_id,
        rk.campus_region
),
nation_new_accounts_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte) AS new_accounts_p13w_nation,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte) AS new_accounts_r13w_nation
),
period_boundary_cte AS (
    SELECT
        cp.r13w_start_date,
        cp.r13w_end_date,
        cp.p13w_start_date,
        cp.p13w_end_date
    FROM comparison_periods_cte cp
),
final_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        r.new_accounts_p13w,
        r.new_accounts_r13w,
        CONCAT(CAST(r.region_growth_numeric AS INTEGER), '%') AS new_accounts_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        n.new_accounts_p13w_nation,
        n.new_accounts_r13w_nation,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                CASE
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN n.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((n.new_accounts_r13w_nation - n.new_accounts_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.new_accounts_p13w_nation, 0), 0)
                END AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN r.region_growth_numeric >
                 CASE
                     WHEN n.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                     WHEN n.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                     ELSE CAST(ROUND(((n.new_accounts_r13w_nation - n.new_accounts_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.new_accounts_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                 END THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN r.region_growth_numeric <
                 CASE
                     WHEN n.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                     WHEN n.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.new_accounts_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                     ELSE CAST(ROUND(((n.new_accounts_r13w_nation - n.new_accounts_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(n.new_accounts_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                 END THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_new_accounts_comparison_cte r
    CROSS JOIN nation_new_accounts_comparison_cte n
    CROSS JOIN period_boundary_cte pb
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    p13w_start_date,
    p13w_end_date,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    new_accounts_p13w,
    new_accounts_r13w,
    new_accounts_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    new_accounts_p13w_nation,
    new_accounts_r13w_nation,
    new_accounts_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    performance_vs_nation
FROM final_comparison_cte
ORDER BY new_accounts_r13w DESC, campus_region ASC;

question: How are sales trending?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
r13w_filtered_cte AS (
    SELECT d.*
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
),
national_business_days_weekly_cte AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_business_day = 1 THEN date END) AS weekly_business_day_count
    FROM r13w_filtered_cte
    GROUP BY week_end_date
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, f.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        f.week_end_date,
        b.weekly_business_day_count,
        SUM(f.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_relmora_total_mg,
        CAST(ROUND(SUM(f.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(b.weekly_business_day_count, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg
    FROM r13w_filtered_cte f
    JOIN national_business_days_weekly_cte b
        ON f.week_end_date = b.week_end_date
    GROUP BY
        f.week_end_date,
        b.weekly_business_day_count
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(relmora_total_mg) AS total_relmora_mg_r13w
    FROM r13w_filtered_cte
)
SELECT
    w.week_start_date,
    w.week_end_date,
    w.weekly_business_day_count,
    w.weekly_relmora_total_mg,
    w.weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg,
    t.total_relmora_mg_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte w
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte t
ORDER BY w.week_end_date ASC;

    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),

)

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
latest_completed_month_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN max_date = LAST_DAY(max_date) THEN max_date
            ELSE LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, max_date))
        END AS latest_completed_month
    FROM max_date_cte
),
recent_3_completed_month_period_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, latest_completed_month)) AS period_start_date_r3m,
        LAST_DAY(latest_completed_month) AS period_end_date_r3m,
        latest_completed_month
    FROM latest_completed_month_cte
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_sls) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(d.zynava_total_sls) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN recent_3_completed_month_period_cte p
    WHERE d.date >= p.period_start_date_r3m
      AND d.date <= p.period_end_date_r3m
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
region_market_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m
    FROM region_period_agg_cte r
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_sls) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(d.zynava_total_sls) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN recent_3_completed_month_period_cte p
    WHERE d.date >= p.period_start_date_r3m
      AND d.date <= p.period_end_date_r3m
),
nation_market_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte n
)
SELECT
    r.campus_region_id,
    r.campus_region,
    p.period_start_date_r3m,
    p.period_end_date_r3m,
    p.latest_completed_month,
    r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    r.market_total_sls_r3m,
    r.relmora_share_r3m,
    n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
),
recent_completed_month_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date)
            ELSE DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date))
        END AS recent_completed_month_start_date,
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) THEN LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date)
            ELSE LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, m.max_week_end_date))
        END AS recent_completed_month_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
r12m_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(MONTH, -11, r.recent_completed_month_start_date) AS r12m_start_date,
        r.recent_completed_month_end_date AS r12m_end_date
    FROM recent_completed_month_cte r
),
targeted_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        t.campus_id,
        t.campus_account_name,
        t.campus_tier
    FROM target_campuses t
    WHERE t.campus_tier IN ('Tier 1', 'Tier 2', 'Tier 3')
),
calendar_months_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(MONTH, seq4(), w.r12m_start_date) AS month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, seq4(), w.r12m_start_date)) AS month_end_date,
        TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, seq4(), w.r12m_start_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM r12m_window_cte w,
         TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 12))
),
monthly_targeted_activity_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.month_year,
        d.campus_id,
        tc.campus_tier,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_monthly_campus,
        CASE WHEN SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_active_monthly
    FROM data_867 d
    INNER JOIN targeted_campuses_cte tc
        ON d.campus_id = tc.campus_id
    CROSS JOIN r12m_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r12m_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r12m_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.month_year,
        d.campus_id,
        tc.campus_tier
),
monthly_targeted_counts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        cm.month_start_date,
        cm.month_end_date,
        cm.month_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tc.campus_id) AS targeted_accounts_total_monthly,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mta.is_active_monthly = 1 THEN tc.campus_id END) AS targeted_accounts_active_monthly,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(mta.is_active_monthly, 0) = 0 THEN tc.campus_id END) AS targeted_accounts_inactive_monthly
    FROM calendar_months_cte cm
    CROSS JOIN targeted_campuses_cte tc
    LEFT JOIN monthly_targeted_activity_cte mta
        ON mta.month_year = cm.month_year
       AND mta.campus_id = tc.campus_id
    GROUP BY
        cm.month_start_date,
        cm.month_end_date,
        cm.month_year
),
monthly_relmora_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.month_year,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_monthly
    FROM data_867 d
    INNER JOIN targeted_campuses_cte tc
        ON d.campus_id = tc.campus_id
    CROSS JOIN r12m_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r12m_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r12m_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.month_year
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.month_year,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_monthly
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r12m_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r12m_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r12m_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.month_year
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        w.r12m_start_date,
        w.r12m_end_date,
        mtc.month_start_date,
        mtc.month_end_date,
        mtc.month_year,
        mtc.targeted_accounts_total_monthly,
        mtc.targeted_accounts_active_monthly,
        mtc.targeted_accounts_inactive_monthly,
        COALESCE(mrs.relmora_total_mg_monthly, 0) AS relmora_total_mg_monthly,
        CAST(COALESCE(mrs.relmora_total_mg_monthly, 0) / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_monthly, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_monthly,
        COALESCE(nbd.national_business_days_monthly, 0) AS national_business_days_monthly
    FROM monthly_targeted_counts_cte mtc
    CROSS JOIN r12m_window_cte w
    LEFT JOIN monthly_relmora_sales_cte mrs
        ON mrs.month_year = mtc.month_year
    LEFT JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
        ON nbd.month_year = mtc.month_year
)
SELECT
    r12m_start_date,
    r12m_end_date,
    month_start_date,
    month_end_date,
    month_year,
    targeted_accounts_total_monthly,
    targeted_accounts_active_monthly,
    targeted_accounts_inactive_monthly,
    relmora_total_mg_monthly,
    relmora_daily_avg_mg_monthly,
    national_business_days_monthly
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY month_year ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
),
latest_completed_month_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) THEN TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date), 'YYYY-MM')
            ELSE TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date)), 'YYYY-MM')
        END AS latest_completed_month,
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) THEN DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date)
            ELSE DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date))
        END AS latest_completed_month_start_date,
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) THEN LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date)
            ELSE LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, m.max_week_end_date))
        END AS latest_completed_month_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
r12m_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        l.latest_completed_month,
        TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -11, l.latest_completed_month_start_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS r12m_start_month,
        l.latest_completed_month AS r12m_end_month,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -11, l.latest_completed_month_start_date) AS r12m_start_date,
        l.latest_completed_month_end_date AS r12m_end_date,
        l.latest_completed_month_start_date,
        l.latest_completed_month_end_date
    FROM latest_completed_month_cte l
),
targeted_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        t.campus_id,
        t.campus_tier
    FROM target_campuses t
    WHERE t.campus_tier IN ('Tier 1', 'Tier 2', 'Tier 3')
),
months_in_scope_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.month_year
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r12m_window_cte w
      ON d.week_end_date >= w.r12m_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= w.r12m_end_date
),
monthly_target_account_status_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.month_year,
        tc.campus_id,
        tc.campus_tier,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg), 0) > 0 THEN 'active'
            ELSE 'inactive'
        END AS monthly_status
    FROM months_in_scope_cte m
    CROSS JOIN targeted_campuses_cte tc
    LEFT JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.campus_id = tc.campus_id
     AND d.month_year = m.month_year
    GROUP BY
        m.month_year,
        tc.campus_id,
        tc.campus_tier
),
monthly_tier_counts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        s.month_year,
        s.campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.campus_id) AS targeted_accounts_total_count_monthly,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.monthly_status = 'active' THEN s.campus_id END) AS targeted_accounts_active_count_monthly,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.monthly_status = 'inactive' THEN s.campus_id END) AS targeted_accounts_inactive_count_monthly
    FROM monthly_target_account_status_cte s
    GROUP BY
        s.month_year,
        s.campus_tier
)
SELECT
    w.r12m_start_date,
    w.r12m_end_date,
    w.latest_completed_month_start_date,
    w.latest_completed_month_end_date,
    mtc.month_year,
    mtc.campus_tier,
    mtc.targeted_accounts_total_count_monthly,
    mtc.targeted_accounts_active_count_monthly,
    mtc.targeted_accounts_inactive_count_monthly
FROM monthly_tier_counts_cte mtc
CROSS JOIN r12m_window_cte w
WHERE mtc.month_year >= w.r12m_start_month
  AND mtc.month_year <= w.latest_completed_month
ORDER BY
    mtc.month_year ASC,
    mtc.campus_tier ASC;

question: Give the trend of targeted accounts from Tier 1 to Tier 3 whether they are active or not for Relmora for recent 12 months considering recent completed month as latest month

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
),
latest_month_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_week_end_date) AS current_month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) AS current_month_end_date,
        CASE
            WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= LAST_DAY(m.max_week_end_date) THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_current_month_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
latest_completed_month_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN l.is_current_month_complete = 1 THEN l.current_month_start_date
            ELSE DATEADD(MONTH, -1, l.current_month_start_date)
        END AS latest_completed_month_start_date,
        CASE
            WHEN l.is_current_month_complete = 1 THEN l.current_month_end_date
            ELSE LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, l.current_month_start_date))
        END AS latest_completed_month_end_date
    FROM latest_month_calendar_cte l
),
r12m_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -11, lc.latest_completed_month_start_date)) AS r12m_start_date,
        lc.latest_completed_month_end_date AS r12m_end_date
    FROM latest_completed_month_cte lc
),
targeted_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        t.campus_id,
        t.campus_account_name,
        t.campus_tier
    FROM target_campuses t
    WHERE t.campus_tier IN ('Tier 1', 'Tier 2', 'Tier 3')
),
months_in_scope_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, seq4(), w.r12m_start_date)) AS month_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, seq4(), w.r12m_start_date))) AS month_end_date,
        TO_VARCHAR(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, seq4(), w.r12m_start_date)), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM r12m_window_cte w,
         TABLE(GENERATOR(ROWCOUNT => 12))
),
targeted_month_grid_cte AS (
    SELECT
        tc.campus_id,
        tc.campus_tier,
        m.month_year,
        m.month_start_date,
        m.month_end_date
    FROM targeted_campuses_cte tc
    CROSS JOIN months_in_scope_cte m
),
monthly_active_targeted_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        TO_VARCHAR(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', d.week_end_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year,
        d.campus_id,
        1 AS active_flag
    FROM data_867 d
    INNER JOIN targeted_campuses_cte tc
        ON d.campus_id = tc.campus_id
    CROSS JOIN r12m_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r12m_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r12m_end_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r12m_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
    GROUP BY
        TO_VARCHAR(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', d.week_end_date), 'YYYY-MM'),
        d.campus_id
),
monthly_targeted_status_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.campus_id,
        g.campus_tier,
        g.month_year,
        g.month_start_date,
        g.month_end_date,
        CASE
            WHEN a.active_flag = 1 THEN 'Active'
            ELSE 'Inactive'
        END AS account_status
    FROM targeted_month_grid_cte g
    LEFT JOIN monthly_active_targeted_accounts_cte a
        ON g.campus_id = a.campus_id
       AND g.month_year = a.month_year
),
monthly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        s.month_year,
        s.month_start_date,
        s.month_end_date,
        s.campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.campus_id) AS targeted_accounts_total_monthly_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.account_status = 'Active' THEN s.campus_id END) AS targeted_accounts_active_monthly_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.account_status = 'Inactive' THEN s.campus_id END) AS targeted_accounts_inactive_monthly_count
    FROM monthly_targeted_status_cte s
    GROUP BY
        s.month_year,
        s.month_start_date,
        s.month_end_date,
        s.campus_tier
)
SELECT
    w.r12m_start_date,
    w.r12m_end_date,
    mt.month_start_date,
    mt.month_end_date,
    mt.month_year,
    mt.campus_tier,
    mt.targeted_accounts_total_monthly_count,
    mt.targeted_accounts_active_monthly_count,
    mt.targeted_accounts_inactive_monthly_count
FROM monthly_trend_cte mt
CROSS JOIN r12m_window_cte w
ORDER BY
    mt.month_year ASC,
    mt.campus_tier ASC;

r13w_period_cte AS (

        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_business_days_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_r13w

    GROUP BY d.campus_account_name
)

WITH max_call_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(call_date) AS max_call_date
    FROM calls_data
),
completed_month_anchor_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN max_call_date < LAST_DAY(max_call_date) THEN DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_call_date))
            ELSE DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_call_date)
        END AS latest_completed_month_start
    FROM max_call_date_cte
),
completed_months_cte AS (
    SELECT TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -2, latest_completed_month_start), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_month_anchor_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, latest_completed_month_start), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_month_anchor_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_completed_month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_month_anchor_cte
),
regional_tier_calls_cte AS (
    SELECT
        c.campus_region_id,
        c.campus_region,
        c.campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.call_id) AS call_effort_r3m
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN completed_months_cte cm
        ON c.month_year = cm.month_year
    WHERE c.metric_type = 'CALL'
    GROUP BY
        c.campus_region_id,
        c.campus_region,
        c.campus_tier
),
national_calls_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.call_id) AS national_call_effort_r3m
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN completed_months_cte cm
        ON c.month_year = cm.month_year
    WHERE c.metric_type = 'CALL'
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        MIN(TO_DATE(cm.month_year || '-01')) AS period_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(cm.month_year || '-01'))) AS period_end_date
    FROM completed_months_cte cm
)
SELECT
    rtc.campus_region_id,
    rtc.campus_region,
    rtc.campus_tier,
    pb.period_start_date,
    pb.period_end_date,
    rtc.call_effort_r3m,
    nc.national_call_effort_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND((rtc.call_effort_r3m / NULLIF(nc.national_call_effort_r3m, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS call_effort_pct_r3m
FROM regional_tier_calls_cte rtc
CROSS JOIN national_calls_cte nc
CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
ORDER BY
    rtc.campus_region ASC,
    rtc.campus_tier ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_windows_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
pre_p13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < cw.p13w_start_date
),
p13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date >= cw.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= cw.p13w_end_date
),
new_accounts_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.campus_id,
        p.campus_region_id,
        p.campus_region,
        p.campus_tier
    FROM p13w_positive_accounts_cte p
    LEFT JOIN pre_p13w_positive_accounts_cte pre
        ON p.campus_id = pre.campus_id
    WHERE pre.campus_id IS NULL
),
pre_r13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < cw.r13w_start_date
),
r13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date >= cw.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= cw.r13w_end_date
),
new_accounts_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_id,
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.campus_tier
    FROM r13w_positive_accounts_cte r
    LEFT JOIN pre_r13w_positive_accounts_cte pre
        ON r.campus_id = pre.campus_id
    WHERE pre.campus_id IS NULL
),
segment_r13w_counts AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_r13w_count
    FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region, campus_tier
),
segment_p13w_counts AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_p13w_count
    FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region, campus_tier
),
segment_counts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(r.campus_region_id, p.campus_region_id) AS campus_region_id,
        COALESCE(r.campus_region, p.campus_region) AS campus_region,
        COALESCE(r.campus_tier, p.campus_tier) AS campus_tier,
        COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0) AS new_accounts_p13w_count,
        COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w_count, 0) AS new_accounts_r13w_count
    FROM segment_r13w_counts r
    FULL OUTER JOIN segment_p13w_counts p
        ON r.campus_region_id = p.campus_region_id
       AND r.campus_region = p.campus_region
       AND r.campus_tier = p.campus_tier
),
nation_counts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte) AS new_accounts_p13w_nation_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte) AS new_accounts_r13w_nation_count
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        sc.campus_region_id,
        sc.campus_region,
        sc.campus_tier,
        sc.new_accounts_p13w_count,
        sc.new_accounts_r13w_count,
        sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count AS new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sc.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ) AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count,
        nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count,
        nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count AS new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ) AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN
                CASE
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sc.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)
                END
                >
                CASE
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count, 0)
                END
            THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN
                CASE
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sc.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)
                END
                <
                CASE
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count, 0)
                END
            THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM segment_counts_cte sc
    CROSS JOIN nation_counts_cte nc
)

question: What is the call effort by tier across regions?

trace.text:
WITH max_call_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(call_date) AS max_call_date
    FROM calls_data
),
completed_month_anchor_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN max_call_date < LAST_DAY(max_call_date) THEN DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_call_date))
            ELSE DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_call_date)
        END AS completed_month_anchor_start
    FROM max_call_date_cte
),
completed_months_cte AS (
    SELECT TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -2, completed_month_anchor_start), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_month_anchor_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, completed_month_anchor_start), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_month_anchor_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TO_CHAR(completed_month_anchor_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_month_anchor_cte
),
regional_tier_calls_cte AS (
    SELECT
        c.campus_region_id,
        c.campus_region,
        c.campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.call_id) AS call_effort_r3m
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN completed_months_cte cm
        ON c.month_year = cm.month_year
    WHERE c.metric_type = 'CALL'
    GROUP BY
        c.campus_region_id,
        c.campus_region,
        c.campus_tier
),
national_calls_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.call_id) AS national_call_effort_r3m
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN completed_months_cte cm
        ON c.month_year = cm.month_year
    WHERE c.metric_type = 'CALL'
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', MIN(TO_DATE(cm.month_year || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS period_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(cm.month_year || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS period_end_date
    FROM completed_months_cte cm
)
SELECT
    rtc.campus_region_id,
    rtc.campus_region,
    rtc.campus_tier,
    pb.period_start_date,
    pb.period_end_date,
    rtc.call_effort_r3m,
    nc.national_call_effort_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND((rtc.call_effort_r3m / NULLIF(nc.national_call_effort_r3m, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS call_effort_pct_r3m
FROM regional_tier_calls_cte rtc
CROSS JOIN national_calls_cte nc
CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
ORDER BY
    rtc.campus_region ASC,
    rtc.campus_tier ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_windows_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
pre_p13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date < cw.p13w_start_date
),
p13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date >= cw.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= cw.p13w_end_date
),
new_accounts_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.campus_id,
        p.campus_region_id,
        p.campus_region,
        p.campus_tier
    FROM p13w_positive_accounts_cte p
    LEFT JOIN pre_p13w_positive_accounts_cte pre
        ON p.campus_id = pre.campus_id
    WHERE pre.campus_id IS NULL
),
pre_r13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date < cw.r13w_start_date
),
r13w_positive_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date >= cw.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= cw.r13w_end_date
),
new_accounts_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_id,
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.campus_tier
    FROM r13w_positive_accounts_cte r
    LEFT JOIN pre_r13w_positive_accounts_cte pre
        ON r.campus_id = pre.campus_id
    WHERE pre.campus_id IS NULL
),
segment_r13w_counts AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_r13w_count
    FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region, campus_tier
),
segment_p13w_counts AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_p13w_count
    FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region, campus_tier
),
segment_counts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(r.campus_region_id, p.campus_region_id) AS campus_region_id,
        COALESCE(r.campus_region, p.campus_region) AS campus_region,
        COALESCE(r.campus_tier, p.campus_tier) AS campus_tier,
        COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0) AS new_accounts_p13w_count,
        COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w_count, 0) AS new_accounts_r13w_count
    FROM segment_r13w_counts r
    FULL OUTER JOIN segment_p13w_counts p
        ON r.campus_region_id = p.campus_region_id
       AND r.campus_region = p.campus_region
       AND r.campus_tier = p.campus_tier
),
nation_counts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte) AS new_accounts_p13w_nation_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte) AS new_accounts_r13w_nation_count
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        sc.campus_region_id,
        sc.campus_region,
        sc.campus_tier,
        sc.new_accounts_p13w_count,
        sc.new_accounts_r13w_count,
        (sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count) AS new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sc.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count,
        nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count,
        (nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count) AS new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN
                CASE
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sc.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)
                END
                >
                CASE
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count, 0)
                END
            THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN
                CASE
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN sc.new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND sc.new_accounts_r13w_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((sc.new_accounts_r13w_count - sc.new_accounts_p13w_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(sc.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)
                END
                <
                CASE
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count = 0 AND nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nc.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count - nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nc.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count, 0)
                END
            THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM segment_counts_cte sc
    CROSS JOIN nation_counts_cte nc
),
period_boundary_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p13w_start_date,
        p13w_end_date,
        r13w_start_date,
        r13w_end_date
    FROM comparison_windows_cte
)
SELECT
    pb.p13w_start_date,
    pb.p13w_end_date,
    pb.r13w_start_date,
    pb.r13w_end_date,
    gm.campus_region_id,
    gm.campus_region,
    gm.campus_tier,
    gm.new_accounts_p13w_count,
    gm.new_accounts_r13w_count,
    gm.new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w,
    gm.new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    gm.new_accounts_p13w_nation_count,
    gm.new_accounts_r13w_nation_count,
    gm.new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    gm.new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    gm.performance_vs_nation
FROM growth_metrics_cte gm
CROSS JOIN period_boundary_cte pb
ORDER BY gm.campus_region ASC, gm.campus_tier ASC;

WITH max_call_date_cte AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(call_date) AS max_call_date
    FROM calls_data
),
completed_months_anchor_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN max_call_date < LAST_DAY(max_call_date) THEN DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_call_date))
            ELSE DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_call_date)
        END AS latest_completed_month_start
    FROM max_call_date_cte
),
completed_months_cte AS (
    SELECT TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -2, latest_completed_month_start), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_months_anchor_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TO_CHAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, latest_completed_month_start), 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_months_anchor_cte
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TO_CHAR(latest_completed_month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS month_year
    FROM completed_months_anchor_cte
),
regional_tier_calls_cte AS (
    SELECT
        c.campus_region_id,
        c.campus_region,
        c.campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.call_id) AS call_effort_r3m
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN completed_months_cte cm
        ON c.month_year = cm.month_year
    WHERE c.metric_type = 'CALL'
    GROUP BY
        c.campus_region_id,
        c.campus_region,
        c.campus_tier
),
national_calls_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.call_id) AS national_call_effort_r3m
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN completed_months_cte cm
        ON c.month_year = cm.month_year
    WHERE c.metric_type = 'CALL'
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        MIN(TO_DATE(cm.month_year || '-01')) AS period_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(MAX(TO_DATE(cm.month_year || '-01'))) AS period_end_date
    FROM completed_months_cte cm
)
SELECT
    rtc.campus_region_id,
    rtc.campus_region,
    rtc.campus_tier,
    pb.period_start_date,
    pb.period_end_date,
    rtc.call_effort_r3m,
    nc.national_call_effort_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND((rtc.call_effort_r3m / NULLIF(nc.national_call_effort_r3m, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS call_effort_pct_r3m
FROM regional_tier_calls_cte rtc
CROSS JOIN national_calls_cte nc
CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
ORDER BY
    rtc.campus_region ASC,
    rtc.campus_tier ASC;

Set prior quarter complete when max_week_end_date is greater than or equal to prior quarter end date. Use calendar quarter boundaries only; never infer completeness from number of weeks present."

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(QUARTER, 1, DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date))) AS recent_quarter_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
recent_quarter_label_cte AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(d.quarter_year) AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
),
prior_quarter_calendar_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, r.recent_quarter_start_date) AS prior_quarter_end_date
    FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
),
prior_quarter_label_cte AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(d.quarter_year) AS prior_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= r.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_quarter_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_prior_quarter_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
),
recent_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN r.recent_quarter_start_date AND r.recent_quarter_end_date
),
prior_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_days_prior_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
    WHERE d.date BETWEEN p.prior_quarter_start_date AND p.prior_quarter_end_date
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
        rqm.business_days_recent_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
        pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
        pqm.business_days_prior_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(ROUND(rqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_days_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(pqm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_days_prior_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS quarterly_daily_avg_growth_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
    FROM recent_quarter_metrics_cte rqm
    CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
)
SELECT
    rql.recent_quarter_label,
    r.recent_quarter_start_date,
    r.recent_quarter_end_date,
    pql.prior_quarter_label,
    p.prior_quarter_start_date,
    p.prior_quarter_end_date,
    qc.is_recent_quarter_complete,
    qc.is_prior_quarter_complete,
    gm.business_days_recent_quarter,
    gm.business_days_prior_quarter,
    gm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_recent_quarter,
    gm.quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_recent_quarter,
    gm.quarterly_relmora_total_mg_prior_quarter,
    gm.quarterly_daily_avg_relmora_mg_prior_quarter,
    gm.quarterly_daily_avg_growth_relmora_mg_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter
FROM recent_quarter_calendar_cte r
CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_label_cte rql
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_calendar_cte p
CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_label_cte pql
CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN growth_metrics_cte gm
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_windows_cte AS (
    SELECT
        TO_DATE('2025-09-12') AS p13w_start_date,
        TO_DATE('2025-12-05') AS p13w_end_date,
        TO_DATE('2025-12-12') AS r13w_start_date,
        TO_DATE('2026-03-06') AS r13w_end_date
),
campus_first_positive_week_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_id,
        MIN(d.week_end_date) AS first_positive_week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date >= TO_DATE('2025-09-12')
      AND d.week_end_date <= TO_DATE('2026-03-06')
    GROUP BY d.campus_id
),
campus_attributes_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier
    FROM data_867 d
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date >= TO_DATE('2025-09-12')
      AND d.week_end_date <= TO_DATE('2026-03-06')
    GROUP BY d.campus_id, d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region, d.campus_tier
),
new_accounts_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        ca.campus_region_id,
        ca.campus_region,
        ca.campus_tier,
        fpw.campus_id
    FROM campus_first_positive_week_cte fpw
    JOIN campus_attributes_cte ca
      ON fpw.campus_id = ca.campus_id
    CROSS JOIN period_windows_cte pw
    WHERE fpw.first_positive_week_end_date >= pw.p13w_start_date
      AND fpw.first_positive_week_end_date <= pw.p13w_end_date
),
new_accounts_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        ca.campus_region_id,
        ca.campus_region,
        ca.campus_tier,
        fpw.campus_id
    FROM campus_first_positive_week_cte fpw
    JOIN campus_attributes_cte ca
      ON fpw.campus_id = ca.campus_id
    CROSS JOIN period_windows_cte pw
    WHERE fpw.first_positive_week_end_date >= pw.r13w_start_date
      AND fpw.first_positive_week_end_date <= pw.r13w_end_date
),
grouped_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_p13w_count
    FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region, campus_tier
),
grouped_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        campus_tier,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_r13w_count
    FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region, campus_tier
),
grouped_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(p.campus_region_id, r.campus_region_id) AS campus_region_id,
        COALESCE(p.campus_region, r.campus_region) AS campus_region,
        COALESCE(p.campus_tier, r.campus_tier) AS campus_tier,
        COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0) AS new_accounts_p13w_count,
        COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w_count, 0) AS new_accounts_r13w_count,
        COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w_count, 0) - COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0) AS new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w_count, 0) > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w_count, 0) = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w_count, 0) - COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w_count, 0), 0)
                    END
                ) AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM grouped_p13w_cte p
    FULL OUTER JOIN grouped_r13w_cte r
      ON p.campus_region_id = r.campus_region_id
     AND p.campus_region = r.campus_region
     AND p.campus_tier = r.campus_tier
),
nation_benchmark_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fpw.first_positive_week_end_date >= pw.p13w_start_date AND fpw.first_positive_week_end_date <= pw.p13w_end_date THEN fpw.campus_id END) AS nation_new_accounts_p13w_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fpw.first_positive_week_end_date >= pw.r13w_start_date AND fpw.first_positive_week_end_date <= pw.r13w_end_date THEN fpw.campus_id END) AS nation_new_accounts_r13w_count
    FROM campus_first_positive_week_cte fpw
    CROSS JOIN period_windows_cte pw
),
nation_growth_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nation_new_accounts_p13w_count,
        nation_new_accounts_r13w_count,
        nation_new_accounts_r13w_count - nation_new_accounts_p13w_count AS nation_new_accounts_growth_abs_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN nation_new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND nation_new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN nation_new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND nation_new_accounts_r13w_count = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((nation_new_accounts_r13w_count - nation_new_accounts_p13w_count) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nation_new_accounts_p13w_count, 0)
                    END
                ) AS INTEGER
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS nation_new_accounts_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN nation_new_accounts_p13w_count = 0 AND nation_new_accounts_r13w_count > 0 THEN 100
