WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT d.quarter_year AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
      ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    LIMIT 1
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rq.recent_quarter_label,
        TO_DATE(
            CONCAT(
                SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                '-',
                LPAD((((SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                '-01'
            )
        ) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            DATEADD(
                QUARTER,
                1,
                TO_DATE(
                    CONCAT(
                        SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                        '-',
                        LPAD((((SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                        '-01'
                    )
                )
            )
        ) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(
            YEAR(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            ))),
            '-Q',
            QUARTER(DATEADD(QUARTER, -1, TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )))
        ) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATEADD(
            QUARTER,
            -1,
            TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1))::INTEGER - 1) * 3 + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM recent_quarter_cte rq
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
recent_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.recent_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.recent_quarter_start_date AND qb.recent_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.recent_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.previous_quarter_start_date AND qb.previous_quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    qc.recent_quarter_label,
    qc.recent_quarter_start_date,
    qc.recent_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.recent_quarter_is_complete,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    rqm.business_day_count_recent_quarter,
    pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter,
    rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
    pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter,
    (rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0))::INTEGER AS daily_average_sales_recent_quarter,
    (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0))::INTEGER AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter,
    CASE
        WHEN qc.recent_quarter_is_complete = 1 AND qc.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1 THEN
            CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 AND rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter = 0 AND rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter - pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter) * 100.0) / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
    END AS quarterly_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0)) = 0
                     AND (rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0)) > 0 THEN 100
                WHEN (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0)) = 0
                     AND (rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (
                        (rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter / NULLIF(rqm.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0))
                        -
                        (pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0))
                    ) * 100.0
                ) / NULLIF((pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter / NULLIF(pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0)), 0)
            END,
            0
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_metrics_cte rqm
CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
LIMIT 1;

        (SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0))::INTEGER AS daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte qc
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qc.recent_quarter_label, qc.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qc.recent_quarter_start_date AND qc.recent_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_previous_quarter,
        (SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END), 0))::INTEGER AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_cte qc
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qc.recent_quarter_label, qc.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qc.previous_quarter_start_date AND qc.previous_quarter_end_date
),
final_output_complete_branch_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qc.recent_quarter_label,
        qc.recent_quarter_start_date,
        qc.recent_quarter_end_date,
        qc.previous_quarter_label,
        qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
        qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
        qc.recent_quarter_is_complete,
        qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
        rqm.business_day_count_recent_quarter,
        pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter,
        rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
        pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
        pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg - pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0)
                END,
                0
            )::INTEGER,
            '%'
        ) AS quarterly_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg - pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0)
                END,
                0
            )::INTEGER,
            '%'
        ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg
    FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_metrics_cte rqm
    CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
    WHERE qc.recent_quarter_is_complete = 1
      AND qc.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1
),
final_output_incomplete_branch_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qc.recent_quarter_label,
        qc.recent_quarter_start_date,
        qc.recent_quarter_end_date,
        qc.previous_quarter_label,
        qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
        qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
        qc.recent_quarter_is_complete,
        qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
        rqm.business_day_count_recent_quarter,
        pqm.business_day_count_previous_quarter,
        rqm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
        pqm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
        pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((rqm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg - pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(pqm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0)
                END,
                0
            )::INTEGER,
            '%'
        ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg
    FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
    CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_metrics_cte rqm
    CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte pqm
    WHERE qc.recent_quarter_is_complete = 0

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_cte AS (
    SELECT d.quarter_year AS recent_quarter_label
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
        ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    LIMIT 1
),
quarter_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rq.recent_quarter_label,
        TO_DATE(
            CONCAT(
                SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                '-',
                LPAD((((CAST(SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                '-01'
            )
        ) AS recent_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            DATEADD(
                MONTH,
                3,
                TO_DATE(
                    CONCAT(
                        SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                        '-',
                        LPAD((((CAST(SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                        '-01'
                    )
                )
            )
        ) AS recent_quarter_end_date,
        CONCAT(
            YEAR(DATEADD(MONTH, -3, TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((CAST(SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            ))),
            '-Q',
            QUARTER(DATEADD(MONTH, -3, TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((CAST(SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )))
        ) AS previous_quarter_label,
        DATEADD(
            MONTH,
            -3,
            TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((CAST(SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            TO_DATE(
                CONCAT(
                    SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 1, 4),
                    '-',
                    LPAD((((CAST(SUBSTR(rq.recent_quarter_label, 7, 1) AS INTEGER) - 1) * 3) + 1)::VARCHAR, 2, '0'),
                    '-01'
                )
            )
        ) AS previous_quarter_end_date
    FROM recent_quarter_cte rq
),
quarter_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        qb.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_is_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= qb.previous_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS previous_quarter_is_complete
    FROM quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
recent_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_recent_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.recent_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.recent_quarter_start_date AND qb.recent_quarter_end_date
),
previous_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS business_day_count_previous_quarter
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN quarter_boundaries_cte qb
    WHERE d.quarter_year IN (qb.recent_quarter_label, qb.previous_quarter_label)
      AND d.date BETWEEN qb.previous_quarter_start_date AND qb.previous_quarter_end_date
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
        p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        c.business_day_count_recent_quarter,
        p.business_day_count_previous_quarter,
        CAST(ROUND(c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg / NULLIF(c.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
        CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(p.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(p.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg / NULLIF(c.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(p.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(ROUND(c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg / NULLIF(c.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(ROUND(c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg / NULLIF(c.business_day_count_recent_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(p.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(ROUND(p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg / NULLIF(p.business_day_count_previous_quarter, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS daily_average_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg = 0 AND c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((c.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg - p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg) * 100.0) / NULLIF(p.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS quarterly_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg
    FROM recent_quarter_metrics_cte c
    CROSS JOIN previous_quarter_metrics_cte p
)
SELECT
    qc.recent_quarter_label,
    qc.recent_quarter_start_date,
    qc.recent_quarter_end_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_label,
    qc.previous_quarter_start_date,
    qc.previous_quarter_end_date,
    qc.recent_quarter_is_complete,
    qc.previous_quarter_is_complete,
    gm.business_day_count_recent_quarter,
    gm.business_day_count_previous_quarter,
    gm.quarterly_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
    gm.quarterly_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    gm.daily_average_sales_recent_quarter_mg,
    gm.daily_average_sales_previous_quarter_mg,
    gm.quarterly_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg,
    gm.daily_average_sales_growth_vs_previous_quarter_mg
FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
CROSS JOIN growth_metrics_cte gm
WHERE qc.recent_quarter_is_complete = 1
  AND qc.previous_quarter_is_complete = 1
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS window_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS window_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
national_weekly_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.week_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS weekly_business_day_count
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weekly_trend_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, d.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        d.week_end_date,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS weekly_relmora_total_mg,
        n.weekly_business_day_count,
        CAST(ROUND(SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) / NULLIF(n.weekly_business_day_count, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
    JOIN national_weekly_business_days_cte n
        ON d.week_end_date = n.week_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.week_end_date,
        n.weekly_business_day_count
),
r13w_total_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS mg_total_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN r13w_window_cte w
        ON d.week_end_date >= w.window_start_date
       AND d.week_end_date <= w.window_end_date
)
SELECT
    wt.week_start_date,
    wt.week_end_date,
    wt.weekly_relmora_total_mg,
    wt.weekly_business_day_count,
    wt.weekly_daily_avg_relmora_mg,
    rt.mg_total_sales_r13w
FROM weekly_trend_cte wt
CROSS JOIN r13w_total_cte rt
ORDER BY wt.week_end_date ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS r13w_start_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS business_days_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((r.mg_volume_sales_r13w - r.mg_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w - nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region_id,
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_end_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_end_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_start_date,
    cp.p13w_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_date,
    cp.r13w_end_date,
    nbd.business_days_p13w,
    nbd.business_days_r13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
WHERE pc.is_recent_period_complete = 1
  AND pc.is_previous_period_complete = 1
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867 d
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
region_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS national_active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        w.r13w_start_date,
        w.r13w_end_date,
        r.active_accounts_r13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND((r.active_accounts_r13w / NULLIF(n.national_active_accounts_r13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%') AS adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        n.national_active_accounts_r13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM region_active_accounts_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_active_accounts_cte n
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    active_accounts_r13w,
    adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
    relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    national_active_accounts_r13w,
    national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY active_accounts_r13w DESC, campus_region ASC;

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(MONTH, -5, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)) AS p3m_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, max_date))) AS p3m_end_date,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)) AS r3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(max_date) AS r3m_end_date
    FROM max_date_cte
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_date,
        p.p3m_start_date,
        p.p3m_end_date,
        p.r3m_start_date,
        p.r3m_end_date,
        CASE WHEN m.max_date >= p.r3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_date >= p.p3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM max_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
region_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS market_total_sls_p3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        ((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) - (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM region_period_agg_cte r
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
),
nation_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        ((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0)) - (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0))) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte n
),
final_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region_id,
        rs.campus_region,
        pc.p3m_start_date,
        pc.p3m_end_date,
        pc.r3m_start_date,
        pc.r3m_end_date,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(rs.relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(rs.relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < 0 THEN 'Losing'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_trend,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND(ns.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND(ns.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_share_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN nation_share_cte ns
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    p3m_start_date,
    p3m_end_date,
    r3m_start_date,
    r3m_end_date,
    relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    market_total_sls_p3m,
    relmora_share_p3m,
    relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    market_total_sls_r3m,
    relmora_share_r3m,
    share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    share_trend,
    relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    national_relmora_share_p3m,
    relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    national_relmora_share_r3m,
    national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    performance_vs_nation
FROM final_classification_cte
ORDER BY share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw DESC;

REJECT
FEEDBACK:
The final ORDER BY references share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw, but that column is not selected in final_classification_cte and is therefore not available in the outer SELECT scope.

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)) AS r3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(max_date) AS r3m_end_date,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -3, DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date))) AS p3m_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date))) AS p3m_end_date,
        max_date
    FROM max_date_cte
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.r3m_start_date,
        pb.r3m_end_date,
        pb.p3m_start_date,
        pb.p3m_end_date,
        pb.max_date,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.r3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.p3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
region_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rpa.campus_region_id,
        rpa.campus_region,
        rpa.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rpa.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (rpa.relmora_total_sls_p3m + rpa.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS market_total_sls_p3m,
        rpa.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rpa.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (rpa.relmora_total_sls_r3m + rpa.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        (rpa.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((rpa.relmora_total_sls_p3m + rpa.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        (rpa.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((rpa.relmora_total_sls_r3m + rpa.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (
            (rpa.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((rpa.relmora_total_sls_r3m + rpa.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
            -
            (rpa.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((rpa.relmora_total_sls_p3m + rpa.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
        ) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM region_period_agg_cte rpa
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
),
nation_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        npa.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        npa.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        (npa.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + npa.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        npa.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        npa.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (npa.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + npa.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (npa.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((npa.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + npa.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        (npa.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((npa.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + npa.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (
            (npa.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((npa.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + npa.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0))
            -
            (npa.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((npa.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + npa.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0))
        ) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte npa
),
final_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region_id,
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < 0 THEN 'Losing'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_trend,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_share_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN nation_share_cte ns
)
SELECT
    fc.campus_region_id,
    fc.campus_region,
    pc.p3m_start_date,
    pc.p3m_end_date,
    pc.r3m_start_date,
    pc.r3m_end_date,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.share_trend,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.performance_vs_nation
FROM final_classification_cte fc
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
ORDER BY fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_week_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        1 AS is_recent_period_complete,
        1 AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.r13w_week_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.p13w_week_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= pc.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= pc.r13w_end_date
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= pc.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= pc.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= pc.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= pc.r13w_end_date
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        CAST(r.mg_total_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_total_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CAST(n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        CAST(n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        nb.p13w_business_days,
        nb.r13w_business_days
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        dam.*,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_total_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_total_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_total_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_total_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_total_sales_r13w - dam.mg_total_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_total_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation - dam.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS national_growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS national_growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte dam
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.*,
        CASE
            WHEN g.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value > 0 THEN 'Growing'
            WHEN g.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS region_trend_direction,
        CASE
            WHEN g.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value > g.national_growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN g.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value < g.national_growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
    FROM growth_metrics_cte g
)
SELECT
    p.campus_region_id,
    p.campus_region,
    pc.p13w_week_start_date AS p13w_start_date,
    pc.p13w_end_date AS p13w_end_date,
    pc.r13w_week_start_date AS r13w_start_date,
    pc.r13w_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
    p.p13w_business_days,
    p.r13w_business_days,
    p.mg_total_sales_p13w,
    p.mg_total_sales_r13w,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(p.growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(p.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
    p.region_trend_direction,
    p.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
    p.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
    p.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(p.national_growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS national_growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(p.national_growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS national_growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
    p.region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
FROM performance_vs_nation_cte p
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
ORDER BY growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_value DESC, campus_region ASC;

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(MONTH, -5, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)) AS period_start_date_p3m,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -3, max_date)) AS period_end_date_p3m,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)) AS period_start_date_r3m,
        LAST_DAY(max_date) AS period_end_date_r3m,
        max_date
    FROM max_date_cte
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.period_start_date_p3m,
        pb.period_end_date_p3m,
        pb.period_start_date_r3m,
        pb.period_end_date_r3m,
        pb.max_date,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.period_end_date_r3m THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.period_end_date_p3m THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.period_start_date_p3m
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
region_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS market_total_sls_p3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0) AS relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0) AS relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
        - (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM region_period_agg_cte r
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.period_start_date_p3m
),
nation_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0) AS national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0) AS national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0))
        - (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0)) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte n
),
final_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region_id,
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        rs.relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < 0 THEN 'Losing'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_trend,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_share_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN nation_share_cte ns
)
SELECT
    fc.campus_region_id,
    fc.campus_region,
    pc.period_start_date_p3m,
    pc.period_end_date_p3m,
    pc.period_start_date_r3m,
    pc.period_end_date_r3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.share_trend,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.performance_vs_nation
FROM final_classification_cte fc
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
ORDER BY fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
region_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS national_active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        w.r13w_start_date,
        w.r13w_end_date,
        r.active_accounts_r13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND((r.active_accounts_r13w / NULLIF(n.national_active_accounts_r13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%') AS adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        n.national_active_accounts_r13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM region_active_accounts_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_active_accounts_cte n
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    active_accounts_r13w,
    adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
    relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    national_active_accounts_r13w,
    national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY active_accounts_r13w DESC, campus_region ASC;

question: How does account adoption look across regions?

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
r13w_window_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
region_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_active_accounts_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.campus_id) AS national_active_accounts_r13w,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= w.r13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= w.r13w_end_date
      AND d.relmora_total_mg > 0
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        w.r13w_start_date,
        w.r13w_end_date,
        r.active_accounts_r13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND((r.active_accounts_r13w / NULLIF(n.national_active_accounts_r13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%') AS adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        n.national_active_accounts_r13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM region_active_accounts_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_active_accounts_cte n
    CROSS JOIN r13w_window_cte w
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    r13w_start_date,
    r13w_end_date,
    active_accounts_r13w,
    adoption_share_of_national_accounts_r13w,
    relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    national_active_accounts_r13w,
    national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
FROM final_metrics_cte
ORDER BY
    active_accounts_r13w DESC,
    campus_region ASC;

question: How do new account additions look across regions?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
r13w_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date
),
pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < pb.r13w_start_date
),
new_accounts_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_id,
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region
    FROM r13w_active_campuses_cte r
    LEFT JOIN pre_r13w_historical_active_campuses_cte p
        ON r.campus_id = p.campus_id
    WHERE p.campus_id IS NULL
),
p13w_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        d.campus_id,
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date
),
pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.campus_id
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    WHERE d.relmora_total_mg > 0
      AND d.week_end_date < pb.p13w_start_date
),
new_accounts_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.campus_id,
        p.campus_region_id,
        p.campus_region
    FROM p13w_active_campuses_cte p
    LEFT JOIN pre_p13w_historical_active_campuses_cte h
        ON p.campus_id = h.campus_id
    WHERE h.campus_id IS NULL
),
regional_r13w AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_r13w
    FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region
),
regional_p13w AS (
    SELECT
        campus_region_id,
        campus_region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) AS new_accounts_p13w
    FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte
    GROUP BY campus_region_id, campus_region
),
regional_new_accounts_summary_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(r.campus_region_id, p.campus_region_id) AS campus_region_id,
        COALESCE(r.campus_region, p.campus_region) AS campus_region,
        COALESCE(p.new_accounts_p13w, 0) AS new_accounts_p13w,
        COALESCE(r.new_accounts_r13w, 0) AS new_accounts_r13w
    FROM regional_r13w r
    FULL OUTER JOIN regional_p13w p
        ON r.campus_region_id = p.campus_region_id
),
national_new_accounts_summary_cte AS (
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_r13w_cte) AS new_accounts_r13w_nation,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campus_id) FROM new_accounts_p13w_cte) AS new_accounts_p13w_nation
),
growth_comparison_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region_id,
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.new_accounts_p13w,
        rs.new_accounts_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.new_accounts_p13w = 0 AND rs.new_accounts_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN rs.new_accounts_p13w = 0 AND rs.new_accounts_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((rs.new_accounts_r13w - rs.new_accounts_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rs.new_accounts_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        ns.new_accounts_p13w_nation,
        ns.new_accounts_r13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN ns.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND ns.new_accounts_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN ns.new_accounts_p13w_nation = 0 AND ns.new_accounts_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((ns.new_accounts_r13w_nation - ns.new_accounts_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(ns.new_accounts_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS national_growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value
    FROM regional_new_accounts_summary_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN national_new_accounts_summary_cte ns
)
SELECT
    gc.campus_region_id,
    gc.campus_region,
    pb.p13w_start_date,
    pb.p13w_end_date,
    pb.r13w_start_date,
    pb.r13w_end_date,
    gc.new_accounts_p13w,
    gc.new_accounts_r13w,
    CONCAT(gc.growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value, '%') AS growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w,
    gc.new_accounts_p13w_nation,
    gc.new_accounts_r13w_nation,
    CONCAT(gc.national_growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value, '%') AS national_growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN gc.growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value > gc.national_growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value THEN 'Higher than Nation'
        WHEN gc.growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value < gc.national_growth_new_accounts_r13w_vs_p13w_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
        ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
    END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
FROM growth_comparison_cte gc
CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
ORDER BY gc.new_accounts_r13w DESC, gc.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS r13w_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS is_recent_period_complete,
        1 AS is_previous_period_complete
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (
                            CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0),
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (
                            CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0),
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rm.campus_region_id,
        rm.campus_region,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
    CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region_id,
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_date,
    cp.p13w_end_week_end_date AS p13w_end_date,
    nbd.p13w_business_days,
    cp.r13w_start_date,
    cp.r13w_end_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
    nbd.r13w_business_days,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    pvn.performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
JOIN performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
    ON pvn.campus_region_id = rm.campus_region_id
   AND pvn.campus_region = rm.campus_region
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC;

{
  "intent_summary": "Determine which campus regions are growing versus slowing down by comparing relmora volume sales in mg for Recent 13 Weeks versus Prior 13 Weeks using data_867, grouped by campus_region and campus_region_id, and include regional and national absolute sales, daily average sales, growth metrics subject to period completeness, and a performance-versus-nation classification based strictly on daily average growth.",
  "tables": [
    "data_867"
  ],
  "filters": [
    {
