WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, 0, DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, 0, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(((r.mg_volume_sales_r13w - r.mg_volume_sales_p13w) / NULLIF(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%')
        END AS mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) - CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER))
                        / NULLIF(CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                    ) * 100,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        n.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(n.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND n.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(((n.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w - n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w) / NULLIF(n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w, 0)) * 100, 0), '%')
        END AS mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                 AND CAST(n.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN CONCAT(ROUND(100, 0), '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    (
                        (CAST(n.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) - CAST(n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER))
                        / NULLIF(CAST(n.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                    ) * 100,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM national_period_sales_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rm.campus_region_id,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
    CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region_id,
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_date,
    cp.p13w_end_date,
    cp.p13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_end_week_end_date,
    nbd.p13w_business_days,
    cp.r13w_start_date,
    cp.r13w_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_end_week_end_date,
    nbd.r13w_business_days,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    pvn.performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
JOIN performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
    ON pvn.campus_region_id = rm.campus_region_id
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC;

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_date,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_date)) AS r3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(m.max_date) AS r3m_end_date,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -3, DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_date))) AS p3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_date)))) AS p3m_end_date
    FROM max_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.r3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.p3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
tier_region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
      AND d.date <= pc.max_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region, d.campus_tier
),
national_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
      AND d.date <= pc.max_date
),
share_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        tr.campus_region,
        tr.campus_tier,
        pc.r3m_start_date,
        pc.r3m_end_date,
        pc.p3m_start_date,
        pc.p3m_end_date,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m AS total_market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m AS total_market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN ((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) > 0 THEN 'Gaining Share'
            WHEN ((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) < 0 THEN 'Losing Share'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_direction_r3m_vs_p3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m AS national_total_market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m AS national_total_market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN ((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) > ((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN ((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) < ((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m, 0)) - (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF(np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m, 0))) THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'In Line with Nation'
        END AS performance_vs_nation_r3m_vs_p3m
    FROM tier_region_period_agg_cte tr
    CROSS JOIN national_period_agg_cte np
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    campus_region,
    campus_tier,
    r3m_start_date,
    r3m_end_date,
    p3m_start_date,
    p3m_end_date,
    relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    total_market_total_sls_r3m,
    relmora_share_r3m,
    relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    total_market_total_sls_p3m,
    relmora_share_p3m,
    share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    share_direction_r3m_vs_p3m,
    national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    national_total_market_total_sls_r3m,
    national_relmora_share_r3m,
    national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    national_zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    national_total_market_total_sls_p3m,
    national_relmora_share_p3m,
    national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    performance_vs_nation_r3m_vs_p3m
FROM share_metrics_cte
ORDER BY campus_region ASC, campus_tier ASC, share_change_r3m_vs_p3m DESC;

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_date,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_date)) AS r3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(m.max_date) AS r3m_end_date,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -3, DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_date))) AS p3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -1, DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', m.max_date)))) AS p3m_end_date
    FROM max_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.r3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.p3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
tier_region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        d.campus_tier,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
      AND d.date <= pc.max_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region, d.campus_tier
),
national_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS national_zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
      AND d.date <= pc.max_date
),
share_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        tr.campus_region,
        tr.campus_tier,
        pc.p3m_start_date,
        pc.p3m_end_date,
        pc.r3m_start_date,
        pc.r3m_end_date,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS total_market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
        tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS total_market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                (
                    (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                    -
                    (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
                ) * 100
            , 1),
            '%'
        ) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) > 0 THEN 'Gaining Share'
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) < 0 THEN 'Losing Share'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_direction_r3m_vs_p3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS national_total_market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
        np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS national_total_market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                (
                    (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                    -
                    (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
                ) * 100
            , 1),
            '%'
        ) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) > (
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN (
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_r3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((tr.relmora_total_sls_p3m + tr.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) < (
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_r3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
                -
                (np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((np.national_relmora_total_sls_p3m + np.national_zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
            ) THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'In Line with Nation'
        END AS performance_vs_nation_r3m_vs_p3m
    FROM tier_region_period_agg_cte tr
    CROSS JOIN national_period_agg_cte np
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    campus_region,
    campus_tier,
    p3m_start_date,
    p3m_end_date,
    r3m_start_date,

question: How does relmora growth look like across regions and how does it compare with nation

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
ordered_week_end_dates_cte AS (
    SELECT
        w.week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY w.week_end_date DESC) AS seq_num
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
    ) w
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
      ON w.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        CASE
            WHEN seq_num BETWEEN 1 AND 13 THEN 'R13W'
            WHEN seq_num BETWEEN 14 AND 26 THEN 'P13W'
            ELSE NULL
        END AS period_label
    FROM ordered_week_end_dates_cte
    WHERE seq_num BETWEEN 1 AND 26
),
weekly_period_dates_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, MIN(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN week_end_date END)) AS p13w_start_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN week_end_date END) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, MIN(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN week_end_date END)) AS r13w_start_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN week_end_date END) AS r13w_end_date
    FROM period_boundaries_cte
),
national_business_days_r13w_cte AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE p.period_label = 'R13W'
),
national_business_days_p13w_cte AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE p.period_label = 'P13W'
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN week_end_date END) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN week_end_date END) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte
),
regional_r13w_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE p.period_label = 'R13W'
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
regional_p13w_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE p.period_label = 'P13W'
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_r13w_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE p.period_label = 'R13W'
),
national_p13w_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT SUM(d.relmora_total_mg) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE p.period_label = 'P13W'
),
regional_base_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(r.campus_region_id, p.campus_region_id) AS campus_region_id,
        COALESCE(r.campus_region, p.campus_region) AS campus_region,
        COALESCE(p.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        COALESCE(r.relmora_total_mg_r13w, 0) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM regional_r13w_agg_cte r
    FULL OUTER JOIN regional_p13w_agg_cte p
      ON r.campus_region_id = p.campus_region_id
),
final_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rb.campus_region_id,
        rb.campus_region,
        wpd.p13w_start_date,
        wpd.p13w_end_date,
        wpd.r13w_start_date,
        wpd.r13w_end_date,
        pb.p13w_business_days,
        br.r13w_business_days,
        rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                                 AND CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                                 AND CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE (
                                (CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                                 CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                            ) / NULLIF(CAST(rb.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                        END,
                        0
                    ) AS INTEGER
                ) >
                CAST(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                                 AND CAST(nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                                 AND CAST(nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE (
                                (CAST(nr.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(br.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                                 CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                            ) / NULLIF(CAST(np.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(pb.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                        END,
                        0
                    ) AS INTEGER
                )
            THEN 'Higher'
            ELSE 'Lower'
        END AS region_vs_nation_performance
    FROM regional_base_cte rb
    CROSS JOIN weekly_period_dates_cte wpd
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_p13w_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_r13w_cte br
    CROSS JOIN national_p13w_agg_cte np
    CROSS JOIN national_r13w_agg_cte nr
)

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(WEEK, -25, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -13, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_week_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_week_end_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_week_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.p13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_week_end_date AND cp.r13w_end_week_end_date
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) - CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) - CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value
    FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rm.campus_region_id,
        rm.campus_region,
        CASE
            WHEN rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
    CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region_id,
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.p13w_end_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_week_end_date,
    cp.r13w_end_week_end_date,
    nbd.p13w_business_days,
    nbd.r13w_business_days,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    pvn.performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
JOIN performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
    ON pvn.campus_region_id = rm.campus_region_id
   AND pvn.campus_region = rm.campus_region
ORDER BY rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value DESC, rm.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(MONTH, -5, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)) AS period_start_date_p3m,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -3, max_date)) AS period_end_date_p3m,
        DATEADD(MONTH, -2, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)) AS period_start_date_r3m,
        LAST_DAY(max_date) AS period_end_date_r3m,
        max_date
    FROM max_date_cte
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        period_start_date_p3m,
        period_end_date_p3m,
        period_start_date_r3m,
        period_end_date_r3m,
        max_date,
        CASE WHEN max_date >= period_end_date_r3m THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN max_date >= period_end_date_p3m THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.period_start_date_p3m
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
region_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS market_total_sls_p3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        CASE
            WHEN (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)
        END AS relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)
        END AS relmora_share_r3m_raw
    FROM region_period_agg_cte r
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.period_start_date_p3m
),
nation_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0)
        END AS national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        CASE
            WHEN (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0)
        END AS national_relmora_share_r3m_raw
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte n
),
final_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region,
        pb.period_start_date_p3m,
        pb.period_end_date_p3m,
        pb.period_start_date_r3m,
        pb.period_end_date_r3m,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        rs.relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (rs.relmora_share_r3m_raw - rs.relmora_share_p3m_raw) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        ns.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (ns.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw - ns.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM region_share_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN nation_share_cte ns
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
)
SELECT
    fc.campus_region,
    fc.period_start_date_p3m,
    fc.period_end_date_p3m,
    fc.period_start_date_r3m,
    fc.period_end_date_r3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    CASE
        WHEN fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
        WHEN fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < 0 THEN 'Losing'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS share_trend,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    CASE
        WHEN fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > fc.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < fc.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS performance_vs_nation
FROM final_classification_cte fc
ORDER BY fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        1 AS is_recent_period_complete,
        1 AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pc.p13w_start_date,
        pc.p13w_end_date,
        pc.r13w_start_date,
        pc.r13w_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM period_completeness_cte pc
    JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.week_end_date >= pc.p13w_start_date
     AND d.week_end_date <= pc.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY
        pc.p13w_start_date,
        pc.p13w_end_date,
        pc.r13w_start_date,
        pc.r13w_end_date
),
regional_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= pc.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= pc.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
national_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= pc.p13w_start_date
      AND d.week_end_date <= pc.r13w_end_date
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(r.mg_total_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(ROUND(r.mg_total_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CAST(ROUND(n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM regional_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_sales_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        dam.campus_region,
        dam.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        dam.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        dam.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        dam.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        CASE
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(dam.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte dam
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.*,
        CASE
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > 0 THEN 'Growing'
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS growth_direction_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
    FROM growth_metrics_cte g
)
SELECT
    pvn.campus_region,
    pc.p13w_start_date,
    pc.p13w_end_date,
    pc.r13w_start_date,
    pc.r13w_end_date,
    nb.p13w_business_days,
    nb.r13w_business_days,
    pvn.mg_total_sales_p13w,
    pvn.mg_total_sales_r13w,
    pvn.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
    pvn.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
    pvn.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(pvn.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CONCAT(ROUND(pvn.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    pvn.growth_direction_r13w_vs_p13w,
    pvn.region_vs_nation_growth_comparison
FROM performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
ORDER BY mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w DESC, pvn.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_date_bounds_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.r13w_start_date,
        p.r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, p.r13w_start_date) AS r13w_start_date_calendar,
        p.r13w_end_date AS r13w_end_date_calendar,
        p.p13w_start_date,
        p.p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, p.p13w_start_date) AS p13w_start_date_calendar,
        p.p13w_end_date AS p13w_end_date_calendar
    FROM period_boundaries_cte p
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.*,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.r13w_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN m.max_week_end_date >= p.p13w_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_date_bounds_cte p
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pc.p13w_start_date,
        pc.p13w_end_date,
        pc.r13w_start_date,
        pc.r13w_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date_calendar AND pc.p13w_end_date_calendar THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date_calendar AND pc.r13w_end_date_calendar THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM period_completeness_cte pc
    JOIN data_867 d
      ON d.date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date_calendar AND pc.r13w_end_date_calendar
    GROUP BY
        pc.p13w_start_date,
        pc.p13w_end_date,
        pc.r13w_start_date,
        pc.r13w_end_date
),
regional_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.r13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN pc.p13w_start_date AND pc.r13w_end_date
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(r.mg_total_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(ROUND(r.mg_total_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CAST(ROUND(n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM regional_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_sales_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.*,
        CASE
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value,
        CASE
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE CAST(ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER)
        END AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte d
),
region_trend_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.campus_region_id,
        g.campus_region,
        g.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        g.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        g.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        g.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        g.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        g.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        g.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        g.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND(g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(ROUND(g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value, 0), '%') AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation_value THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS region_vs_nation_growth_comparison,
        CASE
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value > 0 THEN 'Growing'
            WHEN g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS region_trend_direction,
        g.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value
    FROM growth_metrics_cte g
)
SELECT
    r.campus_region_id,
    r.campus_region,
    nb.p13w_start_date,
    nb.p13w_end_date,
    nb.p13w_business_days,
    nb.r13w_start_date,
    nb.r13w_end_date,
    nb.r13w_business_days,
    r.mg_total_sales_p13w,
    r.mg_total_sales_r13w,
    r.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
    r.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
    r.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    r.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    r.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
    r.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
    r.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    r.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    r.region_vs_nation_growth_comparison,
    r.region_trend_direction
FROM region_trend_classification_cte r
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
ORDER BY
    r.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w_value DESC,
    r.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date))) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)) AS r13w_week_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, DATEADD(WEEK, -1, DATEADD(WEEK, -12, m.max_week_end_date)))) AS p13w_week_start_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS is_recent_period_complete,
        1 AS is_previous_period_complete
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.p13w_week_start_date AS p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date AS p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_week_start_date AS r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date AS r13w_end_date,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pb.p13w_week_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.date BETWEEN pb.r13w_week_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    GROUP BY
        pb.p13w_week_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_week_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.p13w_start_date AND pb.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN pb.r13w_start_date AND pb.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_total_sales_r13w_nation
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
),
daily_average_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_total_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_total_sales_r13w,
        n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
        n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(r.mg_total_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(ROUND(r.mg_total_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CAST(ROUND(n.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.p13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
        CAST(ROUND(n.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation / NULLIF(nb.r13w_business_days, 0), 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
        nb.p13w_start_date,
        nb.p13w_end_date,
        nb.r13w_start_date,
        nb.r13w_end_date,
        nb.p13w_business_days,
        nb.r13w_business_days
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte n
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nb
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.*,
        CASE
            WHEN d.mg_total_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_total_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
            WHEN d.mg_total_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_total_sales_r13w = 0 THEN CONCAT(0, '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(((d.mg_total_sales_r13w - d.mg_total_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_total_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), '%')
        END AS growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN CONCAT(0, '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), '%')
        END AS growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN d.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
            WHEN d.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN CONCAT(0, '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(((d.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation - d.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), '%')
        END AS growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN CONCAT(100, '%')
            WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN CONCAT(0, '%')
            ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0) AS INTEGER), '%')
        END AS growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
        CASE
            WHEN (CASE
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0)
                  END) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
            WHEN (CASE
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0)
                  END) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS region_growth_direction,
        CASE
            WHEN (CASE
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0)
                  END)
               >
               (CASE
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0)
                END) THEN 'Higher than Nation'
            WHEN (CASE
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w, 0), 0)
                  END)
               <
               (CASE
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ROUND(((d.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation - d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation) * 100.0) / NULLIF(d.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0)
                END) THEN 'Lower than Nation'
            ELSE 'Equal to Nation'
        END AS performance_vs_nation_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM daily_average_metrics_cte d
)
SELECT
    g.campus_region_id,
    g.campus_region,
    g.p13w_start_date,
    g.p13w_end_date,
    g.r13w_start_date,
    g.r13w_end_date,
    g.p13w_business_days,
    g.r13w_business_days,
    g.mg_total_sales_p13w,
    g.mg_total_sales_r13w,
    g.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    g.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    g.growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.region_growth_direction,
    g.mg_total_sales_p13w_nation,
    g.mg_total_sales_r13w_nation,
    g.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w_nation,
    g.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_nation,
    g.growth_mg_total_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    g.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w_nation,
    g.performance_vs_nation_r13w_vs_p13w
FROM growth_metrics_cte g
ORDER BY
    CAST(REPLACE(g.growth_mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC,
    g.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_date
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13
             AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_both_periods_complete
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w - rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                    END,
                    0
                ),
                '%'
            )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    g.campus_region_id,
    g.campus_region,
    g.p13w_start_date,
    g.p13w_end_date,
    g.r13w_start_date,
    g.r13w_end_date,
    g.national_business_days_p13w,
    g.national_business_days_r13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) >
             CAST(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) <
             CAST(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS region_vs_nation_performance
FROM growth_metrics_cte g
ORDER BY g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w DESC, g.campus_region ASC;
