WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_date
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13
             AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13
            THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_both_periods_complete
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w - rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END,
                        0
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END,
                        0
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_date
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_both_periods_complete
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w - rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    g.campus_region_id,
    g.campus_region,
    g.p13w_start_date,
    g.p13w_end_date,
    g.r13w_start_date,
    g.r13w_end_date,
    g.national_business_days_p13w,
    g.national_business_days_r13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) >
             CAST(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) <
             CAST(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS region_vs_nation_performance
FROM growth_metrics_cte g
ORDER BY g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w DESC, g.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_date
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13
             AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_both_periods_complete
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w - rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END,
                        0
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
        END AS relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END,
                        0
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
        END AS national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                     AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    g.campus_region_id,
    g.campus_region,
    g.p13w_start_date,
    g.p13w_end_date,
    g.r13w_start_date,
    g.r13w_end_date,
    g.national_business_days_p13w,
    g.national_business_days_r13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) > TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) < TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS region_vs_nation_performance

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(
            MONTH,
            -5,
            DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)
        ) AS p3m_start_date,
        DATEADD(
            DAY,
            -1,
            DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, max_date))
        ) AS p3m_end_date,
        DATEADD(
            MONTH,
            -2,
            DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', max_date)
        ) AS r3m_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(max_date) AS r3m_end_date,
        max_date
    FROM max_date_cte
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.p3m_start_date,
        pb.p3m_end_date,
        pb.r3m_start_date,
        pb.r3m_end_date,
        pb.max_date,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.r3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.p3m_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
region_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS market_total_sls_p3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (
            (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
            - (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
        ) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM region_period_agg_cte r
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.r3m_start_date AND pc.r3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.p3m_start_date AND pc.p3m_end_date THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.p3m_start_date
),
nation_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_p3m_raw,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_r3m_raw,
        (
            (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0))
            - (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0))
        ) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte n
),
final_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region_id,
        rs.campus_region,
        pc.p3m_start_date,
        pc.p3m_end_date,
        pc.r3m_start_date,
        pc.r3m_end_date,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_p3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(rs.relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(rs.relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < 0 THEN 'Losing'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_trend,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND(ns.national_relmora_share_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        CONCAT(ROUND(ns.national_relmora_share_r3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
        CONCAT(ROUND(ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw > ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw < ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m_raw THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_share_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN nation_share_cte ns
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    campus_region_id,
    campus_region,
    p3m_start_date,
    p3m_end_date,

    market_total_sls_r3m,

    share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    share_trend,
    relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    national_relmora_share_p3m,
    relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,

    market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    national_relmora_share_r3m,
    national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    performance_vs_nation
FROM final_classification_cte
ORDER BY share_change_r3m_vs_p3m DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks_cte AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks_cte AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks_cte
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks_cte)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks_cte) AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks_cte)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks_cte) AS p13w_end_date
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks_cte r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks_cte p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks_cte r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks_cte p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    GROUP BY
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks_cte r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks_cte p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks_cte) = 13
             AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks_cte) = 13
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_both_periods_complete
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w - rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                    END
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                    END
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    g.campus_region_id,
    g.campus_region,
    g.p13w_start_date,
    g.p13w_end_date,
    g.r13w_start_date,
    g.r13w_end_date,
    g.national_business_days_p13w,
    g.national_business_days_r13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) >
             CAST(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) <
             CAST(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS region_vs_nation_performance
FROM growth_metrics_cte g
ORDER BY
    g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w DESC,
    g.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
ordered_week_end_dates_cte AS (
    SELECT
        w.week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY w.week_end_date DESC) AS seq_num
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
    ) w
    JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
      ON w.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        CASE
            WHEN seq_num BETWEEN 1 AND 13 THEN 'R13W'
            WHEN seq_num BETWEEN 14 AND 26 THEN 'P13W'
            ELSE NULL
        END AS period_label
    FROM ordered_week_end_dates_cte
    WHERE seq_num BETWEEN 1 AND 26
),
period_dates_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, MIN(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN week_end_date END)) AS p13w_start_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN week_end_date END) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, MIN(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN week_end_date END)) AS r13w_start_date,
        MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN week_end_date END) AS r13w_end_date
    FROM period_boundaries_cte
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.period_label = 'P13W' THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.period_label = 'R13W' THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.period_label = 'P13W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.period_label = 'R13W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.period_label = 'P13W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.period_label = 'R13W' THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    JOIN period_boundaries_cte p
      ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN week_end_date END) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN week_end_date END) = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete,
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN week_end_date END) = 13
             AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN week_end_date END) = 13
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS both_periods_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        pd.p13w_start_date,
        pd.p13w_end_date,
        pd.r13w_start_date,
        pd.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        r.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(r.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                            CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(n.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        pc.both_periods_complete
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN period_dates_cte pd
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte n
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
),
vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        g.*,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) >
                 CAST(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER)
            THEN 'Higher'
            ELSE 'Lower'
        END AS region_vs_nation_performance
    FROM growth_metrics_cte g
)
SELECT
    v.campus_region_id,
    v.campus_region,
    v.p13w_start_date,
    v.p13w_end_date,
    v.r13w_start_date,
    v.r13w_end_date,
    v.national_business_days_p13w,
    v.national_business_days_r13w,
    v.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    v.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    v.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    v.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    v.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    v.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    v.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    v.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    v.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    v.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    v.region_vs_nation_performance,
    CASE
        WHEN v.both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN v.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND v.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN v.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND v.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((v.relmora_total_mg_r13w - v.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(v.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        )
        ELSE NULL
    END AS relmora_total_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN v.both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN v.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND v.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN v.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND v.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((v.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - v.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(v.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        )
        ELSE NULL
    END AS national_relmora_total_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
FROM vs_nation_cte v
ORDER BY v.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_date
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS r13w_business_days,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS p13w_business_days
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13
             AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS is_both_periods_complete
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        pb.p13w_start_date,
        pb.p13w_end_date,
        nbd.p13w_business_days,
        pb.r13w_start_date,
        pb.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.r13w_business_days,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w - rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                    END
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN CONCAT(
                ROUND(
                    CASE
                        WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                        WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                        ELSE ((nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                    END
                ),
                '%'
            )
        END AS national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.r13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.p13w_business_days, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN period_boundaries_cte pb
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    g.campus_region_id,
    g.campus_region,
    g.p13w_start_date,
    g.p13w_end_date,
    g.p13w_business_days,
    g.r13w_start_date,
    g.r13w_end_date,
    g.r13w_business_days,
    g.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    g.relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) > TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) < TO_NUMBER(REPLACE(g.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '')) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS region_vs_nation_performance
FROM growth_metrics_cte g
ORDER BY g.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w DESC, g.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
distinct_weeks AS (
    SELECT
        week_end_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY week_end_date DESC) AS rn
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
        FROM data_867
        WHERE week_end_date <= (SELECT max_week_end_date FROM max_week_end_date_cte)
    ) w
),
r13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 13
),
p13w_weeks AS (
    SELECT week_end_date
    FROM distinct_weeks
    WHERE rn BETWEEN 14 AND 26
),
comparison_windows_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks)) AS r13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM r13w_weeks) AS r13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, (SELECT MIN(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks)) AS p13w_start_date,
        (SELECT MAX(week_end_date) FROM p13w_weeks) AS p13w_end_date
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.date END) AS national_business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
),
region_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT p13w_start_date FROM comparison_windows_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT r13w_end_date FROM comparison_windows_cte)
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.week_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS national_relmora_total_mg_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    LEFT JOIN p13w_weeks p
        ON d.week_end_date = p.week_end_date
    LEFT JOIN r13w_weeks r
        ON d.week_end_date = r.week_end_date
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= (SELECT p13w_start_date FROM comparison_windows_cte)
      AND d.week_end_date <= (SELECT r13w_end_date FROM comparison_windows_cte)
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM r13w_weeks) = 13 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM p13w_weeks) = 13 THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_both_periods_complete
),
growth_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rps.campus_region_id,
        rps.campus_region,
        cw.p13w_start_date,
        cw.p13w_end_date,
        cw.r13w_start_date,
        cw.r13w_end_date,
        nbd.national_business_days_p13w,
        nbd.national_business_days_r13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
        nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
        CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w - rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
        END AS relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CASE
            WHEN pc.is_both_periods_complete = 1 THEN
                CONCAT(
                    ROUND(
                        CASE
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                            WHEN nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w = 0 AND nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                            ELSE ((nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w - nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w, 0)
                        END
                    ),
                    '%'
                )
        END AS national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(rps.relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) -
                         CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.national_business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM region_period_sales_cte rps
    CROSS JOIN comparison_windows_cte cw
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
    CROSS JOIN national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
)
SELECT
    gm.campus_region_id,
    gm.campus_region,
    gm.p13w_start_date,
    gm.p13w_end_date,
    gm.r13w_start_date,
    gm.r13w_end_date,
    gm.national_business_days_p13w,
    gm.national_business_days_r13w,
    gm.relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    gm.relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    gm.national_relmora_total_mg_p13w,
    gm.national_relmora_total_mg_r13w,
    gm.relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    gm.relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    gm.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_p13w,
    gm.national_relmora_daily_avg_mg_r13w,
    gm.relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    gm.national_relmora_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    gm.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    gm.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(gm.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) >
             CAST(REPLACE(gm.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(gm.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) <
             CAST(REPLACE(gm.national_relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS region_vs_nation_performance
FROM growth_metrics_cte gm
ORDER BY gm.relmora_daily_avg_growth_pct_r13w_vs_p13w DESC, gm.campus_region ASC;

WITH max_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM data_DDD
),
period_boundaries_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -5, max_date)) AS period_start_date_p3m,
        LAST_DAY(DATEADD(MONTH, -3, max_date)) AS period_end_date_p3m,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', DATEADD(MONTH, -2, max_date)) AS period_start_date_r3m,
        LAST_DAY(max_date) AS period_end_date_r3m,
        max_date
    FROM max_date_cte
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        pb.*,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.period_end_date_r3m THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_recent_period_complete,
        CASE WHEN pb.max_date >= pb.period_end_date_p3m THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_previous_period_complete
    FROM period_boundaries_cte pb
),
region_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.period_start_date_p3m
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
region_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m) AS market_total_sls_p3m,
        r.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        r.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m) AS market_total_sls_r3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_p3m,
        (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0)) AS relmora_share_r3m,
        (
            (r.relmora_total_sls_r3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_r3m + r.zynava_total_sls_r3m), 0))
            - (r.relmora_total_sls_p3m / NULLIF((r.relmora_total_sls_p3m + r.zynava_total_sls_p3m), 0))
        ) AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m
    FROM region_period_agg_cte r
),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_r3m AND pc.period_end_date_r3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.relmora_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.date BETWEEN pc.period_start_date_p3m AND pc.period_end_date_p3m THEN d.zynava_total_sls ELSE 0 END) AS zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation
    FROM data_DDD d
    CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    WHERE d.date <= pc.max_date
      AND d.date >= pc.period_start_date_p3m
),
nation_share_cte AS (
    SELECT
        n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation) AS market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
        (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0)) AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
        (
            (n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation), 0))
            - (n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation / NULLIF((n.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation + n.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation), 0))
        ) AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m
    FROM nation_period_agg_cte n
),
final_classification_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rs.campus_region_id,
        rs.campus_region,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_p3m,
        rs.relmora_share_p3m,
        rs.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.market_total_sls_r3m,
        rs.relmora_share_r3m,
        rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m > 0 THEN 'Gaining'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m < 0 THEN 'Losing'
            ELSE 'Flat'
        END AS share_trend,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_p3m,
        ns.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
        ns.national_relmora_share_r3m,
        ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
        CASE
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m > ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN rs.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m < ns.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM region_share_cte rs
    CROSS JOIN nation_share_cte ns
)
SELECT
    fc.campus_region_id,
    fc.campus_region,
    pc.period_start_date_p3m,
    pc.period_end_date_p3m,
    pc.period_start_date_r3m,
    pc.period_end_date_r3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_p3m * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.relmora_share_r3m * 100, 1), '%') AS relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m * 100, 1), '%') AS share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.share_trend,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_p3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_p3m * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_p3m,
    fc.relmora_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.zynava_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    fc.market_total_sls_r3m_nation,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_relmora_share_r3m * 100, 1), '%') AS national_relmora_share_r3m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(fc.national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m * 100, 1), '%') AS national_share_change_r3m_vs_p3m,
    fc.performance_vs_nation
FROM final_classification_cte fc
CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
ORDER BY fc.share_change_r3m_vs_p3m DESC;
