WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM data_867
),
comparison_periods_cte AS (
    SELECT
        DATEADD(DAY, -181, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_start_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -91, m.max_week_end_date) AS p13w_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -90, m.max_week_end_date) AS r13w_start_date,
        m.max_week_end_date AS r13w_end_date
    FROM max_week_end_date_cte m
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS is_recent_period_complete,
        1 AS is_previous_period_complete,
        1 AS is_both_periods_complete
),
national_business_days_cte AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.p13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS business_days_p13w,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.is_business_day = 1 AND d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date THEN d.date END) AS business_days_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
),
regional_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        d.campus_region_id,
        d.campus_region,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date
    GROUP BY d.campus_region_id, d.campus_region
),
national_period_sales_cte AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.p13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.r13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date THEN d.relmora_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS mg_national_volume_sales_r13w
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
    WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN cp.p13w_start_date AND cp.r13w_end_date
),
regional_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        r.campus_region_id,
        r.campus_region,
        r.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
        r.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN r.mg_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND r.mg_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((r.mg_volume_sales_r13w - r.mg_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(r.mg_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM regional_period_sales_cte r
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
national_metrics_cte AS (
    SELECT
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
        nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
        CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) AS mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w = 0 AND nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE ((nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w - nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w) * 100.0) / NULLIF(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w, 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
        CONCAT(
            ROUND(
                CASE
                    WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 100
                    WHEN CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0
                         AND CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 THEN 0
                    ELSE (
                        (
                            CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_r13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                            - CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER)
                        ) * 100.0
                    ) / NULLIF(CAST(nps.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w / NULLIF(nbd.business_days_p13w, 0) AS INTEGER), 0)
                END,
                0
            ),
            '%'
        ) AS mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w
    FROM national_period_sales_cte nps
    CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
),
performance_vs_nation_cte AS (
    SELECT
        rm.campus_region_id,
        rm.campus_region,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Higher'
            WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < CAST(REPLACE(nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) THEN 'Lower'
            ELSE 'Equal'
        END AS performance_vs_nation
    FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
    CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
)
SELECT
    rm.campus_region_id,
    rm.campus_region,
    cp.p13w_start_date,
    cp.p13w_end_date,
    cp.r13w_start_date,
    cp.r13w_end_date,
    nbd.business_days_p13w,
    nbd.business_days_r13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_volume_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_volume_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_sales_r13w,
    rm.mg_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_total_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    nm.mg_national_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w,
    CASE
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 'Growing'
        WHEN CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) < 0 THEN 'Slowing Down'
        ELSE 'Flat'
    END AS region_trend,
    pvn.performance_vs_nation
FROM regional_metrics_cte rm
CROSS JOIN comparison_periods_cte cp
CROSS JOIN national_business_days_cte nbd
CROSS JOIN national_metrics_cte nm
JOIN performance_vs_nation_cte pvn
    ON rm.campus_region_id = pvn.campus_region_id
   AND rm.campus_region = pvn.campus_region
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(rm.mg_daily_avg_growth_r13w_vs_p13w, '%', '') AS INTEGER) DESC;

WITH max_week_end_date AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM ENROLLMENTS
),
max_year_context AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CAST(year AS INTEGER)) AS current_year,
        TO_DATE(CONCAT(MAX(CAST(year AS INTEGER)), '-01-01')) AS year_start_date,
        MAX(week_end_date) AS ytd_end_date
    FROM ENROLLMENTS
    WHERE CAST(year AS INTEGER) = (
        SELECT MAX(CAST(year AS INTEGER))
        FROM ENROLLMENTS
    )
),
weekly_enrollments AS (
    SELECT
        CAST(e.year AS INTEGER) AS year,
        myc.year_start_date,
        myc.ytd_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, e.week_end_date) AS week_start_date,
        e.week_end_date,
        COUNT(e.crinetics_id) AS weekly_enrollments
    FROM ENROLLMENTS e
    INNER JOIN max_year_context myc
        ON CAST(e.year AS INTEGER) = myc.current_year
    WHERE CAST(e.year AS INTEGER) = myc.current_year
    GROUP BY
        CAST(e.year AS INTEGER),
        myc.year_start_date,
        myc.ytd_end_date,
        DATEADD(DAY, -6, e.week_end_date),
        e.week_end_date
)
SELECT
    we.year,
    we.year_start_date,
    we.ytd_end_date,
    we.week_start_date,
    we.week_end_date,
    we.weekly_enrollments,
    SUM(we.weekly_enrollments) OVER (
        ORDER BY we.week_end_date ASC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS cumulative_weekly_enrollments
FROM weekly_enrollments we
ORDER BY
    we.week_end_date ASC;

question: How do enrollments look across areas?

trace.text:
WITH max_week_end_date AS (
    SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM ENROLLMENTS
),
current_quarter_context AS (
    SELECT
        e.quarter_year,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date) AS quarter_start_date,
        LAST_DAY(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date), 'QUARTER') AS quarter_end_date
    FROM ENROLLMENTS e
    INNER JOIN max_week_end_date m
        ON e.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
    GROUP BY
        e.quarter_year,
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date),
        LAST_DAY(DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', m.max_week_end_date), 'QUARTER')
),
quarter_total_enrollments AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(e.crinetics_id) AS total_quarterly_enrollments
    FROM ENROLLMENTS e
    INNER JOIN current_quarter_context c
        ON e.quarter_year = c.quarter_year
    WHERE e.qtd_flag = 1
),
area_enrollments AS (
    SELECT
        e.area,
        c.quarter_year,
        c.quarter_start_date,
        c.quarter_end_date,
        COUNT(e.crinetics_id) AS quarterly_enrollments
    FROM ENROLLMENTS e
    INNER JOIN current_quarter_context c
        ON e.quarter_year = c.quarter_year
    WHERE e.qtd_flag = 1
    GROUP BY
        e.area,
        c.quarter_year,
        c.quarter_start_date,
        c.quarter_end_date
)
SELECT
    a.area,
    a.quarter_year,
    a.quarter_start_date,
    a.quarter_end_date,
    a.quarterly_enrollments,
    CONCAT(ROUND((a.quarterly_enrollments / NULLIF(t.total_quarterly_enrollments, 0)) * 100, 2), '%') AS area_enrollment_pct_contribution,
    t.total_quarterly_enrollments
FROM area_enrollments a
CROSS JOIN quarter_total_enrollments t
ORDER BY
    a.quarterly_enrollments DESC,
    a.area ASC;

question: What is the national reach?

trace.text:
WITH max_quarter_period AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(quarter_year) AS max_quarter_year
    FROM calls_data
),
period_bounds AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', MAX(c.call_date)) AS period_start_date,
        MAX(c.call_date) AS period_end_date,
        MAX(c.week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN max_quarter_period m
        ON c.quarter_year = m.max_quarter_year
),
target_hcp_universe AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        mt.npi
    FROM marketting_target mt
    WHERE mt.tier IN ('Tier 1', 'Tier 2', 'Tier 3', 'Tier 4')
),
reached_target_hcps AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        c.npi
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN max_quarter_period m
        ON c.quarter_year = m.max_quarter_year
    INNER JOIN target_hcp_universe t
        ON c.npi = t.npi
    WHERE c.tier IN ('Tier 1', 'Tier 2', 'Tier 3', 'Tier 4')
      AND c.channel IN ('Face To Face', 'Phone', 'Video')
),
nation_reach_calc AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.npi) AS target_hcps_qtd,
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.npi) AS reached_hcps_qtd,
        ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT r.npi) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT t.npi), 0), 1) AS nation_reach_qtd_value
    FROM target_hcp_universe t
    LEFT JOIN reached_target_hcps r
        ON t.npi = r.npi
)
SELECT
    p.period_start_date,
    p.period_end_date,
    n.target_hcps_qtd,
    n.reached_hcps_qtd,
    CONCAT(TO_VARCHAR(n.nation_reach_qtd_value), '%') AS nation_reach_qtd
FROM period_bounds p
CROSS JOIN nation_reach_calc n;

question: What is the reach across regions?

trace.text:
WITH max_quarter AS (
    SELECT MAX(quarter_year) AS max_quarter_year
    FROM calls_data
),
qtd_period_bounds AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', MAX(c.call_date)) AS period_start,
        MAX(c.call_date) AS period_end
    FROM calls_data c
    INNER JOIN max_quarter mq
        ON c.quarter_year = mq.max_quarter_year
),
target_hcp_universe_region AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        mt.region,
        mt.npi
    FROM marketting_target mt
    WHERE mt.tier IN ('Tier 1', 'Tier 2', 'Tier 3', 'Tier 4')
),
reached_target_hcps_region AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        cd.region,
        cd.npi
    FROM calls_data cd
    INNER JOIN max_quarter mq
        ON cd.quarter_year = mq.max_quarter_year
    CROSS JOIN qtd_period_bounds pb
    INNER JOIN target_hcp_universe_region tu
        ON cd.region = tu.region
       AND cd.npi = tu.npi
    WHERE cd.tier IN ('Tier 1', 'Tier 2', 'Tier 3', 'Tier 4')
      AND cd.channel IN ('Face To Face', 'Phone', 'Video')
      AND cd.call_date BETWEEN pb.period_start AND pb.period_end
),
target_counts AS (
    SELECT
        region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT npi) AS target_hcps_qtd
    FROM target_hcp_universe_region
    GROUP BY region
),
reached_counts AS (
    SELECT
        region,
        COUNT(DISTINCT npi) AS reached_hcps_qtd
    FROM reached_target_hcps_region
    GROUP BY region
)
SELECT
    tc.region,
    pb.period_start,
    pb.period_end,
    tc.target_hcps_qtd,
    COALESCE(rc.reached_hcps_qtd, 0) AS reached_hcps_qtd,
    CONCAT(TO_VARCHAR(ROUND((COALESCE(rc.reached_hcps_qtd, 0) / NULLIF(tc.target_hcps_qtd, 0)) * 100, 1)), '%') AS reach_qtd
FROM target_counts tc
LEFT JOIN reached_counts rc
    ON tc.region = rc.region
CROSS JOIN qtd_period_bounds pb
ORDER BY reach_qtd DESC, tc.region ASC;
